name: Voter Action Project
subject: States passing the SAVE America Act on their own
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]
Democracy Docket: As SAVE America Act stalls, GOP states are quietly enacting their own proof of citizenship laws [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=041126_2&amount=35]
When the House rammed the SAVE America Act (the new version of the SAVE Act) to passage earlier this year, we turned to the Senate to stop it. So far that effort has been successful, but that doesn't mean the threat is over.
State by state, opponents of voting rights in state legislatures around the country are pushing their own version of this suppressive legislation ahead of the midterm elections , folks.
Ten states have laws -- four of which passed during this second Trump administration -- that require proof of citizenship when registering to vote. Florida, Mississippi, South Dakota and Utah all enacted proof of citizenship voting bills in the past two weeks . In as many as 12 other states, bills are moving through state legislatures. If they all pass, that would mean nearly half the states in our country have passed mini versions of the SAVE America Act .
Defenders of voting rights know that non-citizen voting is already illegal, extremely rare, and that these bills are written in ways that could disenfranchise millions of eligible women across the country. That hasn't stopped anti-voting groups from pressuring states to pass these new restrictive voting laws, because the suppression is their goal.
Please, Team, we need to stop this dangerous legislation wherever we can. Pitch in with $35 or whatever you can and ensure millions of women's voices continue to be heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=041126_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=041126_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=041126_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=041126_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=041126_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=041126_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=041126_2&amount=35]
Opponents of voting rights in Congress, state legislatures, governor's mansions, and in the White House favor bills like the SAVE America Act because they know it could suppress millions of eligible voters, changing the composition of the electorate and potentially empowering them and their party for years to come.
These bills are all being fast-tracked by vote suppressors to be in place before November, folks. This movement is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this kind of anti-democratic legislation become law.
Catherine Engelbrecht, the founder of suppressive organization True the Vote, described the right-wing conspiracy theory group’s focus during a recent livestream: “ If the SAVE America Act isn’t going to pass then I’m going to use every tool at my disposal to try and get states to react to something ,” Engelbrecht said.
These dark-money suppression groups are willing to go state-by-state to enact their agenda and we have no choice but to match them with our grassroots power.
The consequences of these bills could be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $35 or whatever you can today to stop more of these voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=041126_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project[https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=041126_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=041126_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=S%2BKHxyMgGmplT85AXL6ayOlGFkUKEuEqdzQRsX2he0AFClD%2FSlpnFMBtLBe1TUdPW0ZLpTNYSbToJTKa6%2BBHcLfwZWqWy%2Fw%2BgFUws1%2FDcMHhbNOVPM5J5lsuBq23kl56gZ61PTPVkEgdBykNDie3RuuBYdSYEGbrTJP733FaA4%2FufCWdJN0xUccWpLrnFaq%2BXC9cQoouSm38GSEadjbKyupGqHh1VSHoTtB0WXn6r46r%2BBNgVatcvTBEoQBe9y5FbWfFCI7eI%2BoC9l9RP8FQVDUo2GXIu0H2HwU8QQiPQGBqmsJjAPaezX1OB%2FpCC6WnKZEhb4hBuiN2RHRPcdTXiIZF7q2WvoPH8bLPXDxUM1Gp0qnH20ZIrmjdch8lXumhBbnxX7O%2BBsPZIFtGubrbNRCyZDs%2Be2oU7JyaUO84aE4%3D .

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: I'll tell you exactly what I told my team this morning.
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Virginians For Fair Maps
body:
Early voting is underway in Virginia's April 21 referendum on the most gerrymandered congressional map in American history.
Early voting is underway in Virginia's April 21 referendum on the most gerrymandered congressional map in American history.
| Patriot, Early voting is underway in Virginia's April 21 referendum on the most gerrymandered congressional map in American history. And Hakeem Jeffries is spending $20 million to make sure it passes. For every $1 we have on the air showing Virginia voters the truth about this map, Hakeem Jeffries and George Soros have $10. Their ads are running in every media market in the state during every single commercial break, but we are still beating them. However, we need more resources ASAP. **Here's what I know: when Virginia voters learn the facts, they vote NO. ** **[What your contribution does today.](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=d0b0d68202624e728897d797109c5d13&_e=wlZlv4tvUhej8Niw_iKX9aoYETuwPk2OcKbhEeORWQELj_1neu_sFWqlgyr02hDM9UGjZSiB55Jsnko9KLH6VHRLv0Wa_YULGwGzJCnBsabEgYlGl7bj3syE0ttzUPosVjjStaea4Pd-X7qGU8FcEg1t7DKkvujR0MsEk03BZ3P8-veyxdPnP_1LP_VzXNo8SpSVxzDQXCqYViCjzugWbRePb1k_Le_ImXmeJasuwEAT9kFQZjMMu1AP_pOSZYcULi7b55wkjSgOTCE4qNNry6Ghj3DGUSt31wX3FpSpM60WTlWIP1xkoGd2H4vsuT035o9onWWg5L1u6UxQj3j0W8gjoaWIooa1oKhNZgr-GIIHyi7l6v9cTEGBlvCyTKmxsxnjTZB2eAeX5BSrRZxnuEiZ0sixMjzd_w8p2d4Zpva4AhxnCkdgZEmgidrxRhEPpiy45T6O2NQavcdKzhZgliWTw3k-2dKvdYDMI2D9hYoVPpjHE6jmC1CQJLk_R2Cz)**
---
| | • | $50 puts our ad in front of 500 Virginia voters who haven't seen the truth yet.
---|---
• | $250 funds a full day of digital outreach to low propensity voters.
• | $1,000 helps us match Jeffries dollar-for-dollar in a single media market for 24 hours.
If this map passes, here is what happens: **Four Republican congressional seats could be eliminated before a single vote is cast in November.** Putting us in a dangerous spot heading into November's midterm elections. Hakeem Jeffries made a calculation: if he spent enough money in Virginia fast enough, he could win before Republicans could respond. He is now at $20 million. Twenty million dollars in television, digital, and direct mail -- all of it pushing a single message based on lies to Virginia voters: vote yes. Voters are not falling for the lies claiming this map is 'fair.' Nonpartisan political scientists (read: Liberals) have called it the most lopsided gerrymander in United States history. But Jeffries isn't buying fairness. He's buying repetition. And repetition, at $20 million worth of frequency, starts to sound like truth. If we don't have the resources to respond at scale, he's going to get away with it. **[That’s why we need you to step up - right now.](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=d0b0d68202624e728897d797109c5d13&_e=wlZlv4tvUhej8Niw_iKX9aoYETuwPk2OcKbhEeORWQELj_1neu_sFWqlgyr02hDM9UGjZSiB55Jsnko9KLH6VHRLv0Wa_YULGwGzJCnBsabEgYlGl7bj3syE0ttzUPosVjjStaea4Pd-X7qGU8FcEvqA8YsJKYzA044fhIlU3Pf45Vsj3q3SAds_ge-wkgmRazui0MrLHBHL2yN32jHAZu-j-mrJuF_0gz5O3W3eZZdCA7aCo0g7qp5BnlL6yqnLEh8cGT0LmCMViFYAx1ShtX5f41s0OGQlgjNSx-iWfEEQAcGOuPaJE414c6dNIUsJtY9DX_oVMitmfP68ow_pOq8QD8I7WfSPe94Gos5wHSas4VCahZnErFoxB01shRfiZF-hBLonkXZOG_kk2gjjcYIGAPHoNT3RqrGZgfbKiCZ_UMqWBHDs6jdz-yomEL5VHIOFEz7_JzbeFyzjiftRsG1bjFsz2vDFii39tHWHJ1wIjjCWppq9sHEZ7CRKvG5o)**
| [ DONATE ](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=d0b0d68202624e728897d797109c5d13&_e=wlZlv4tvUhej8Niw_iKX9aoYETuwPk2OcKbhEeORWQELj_1neu_sFWqlgyr02hDM9UGjZSiB55Jsnko9KLH6VHRLv0Wa_YULGwGzJCnBsabEgYlGl7bj3syE0ttzUPosVjjStaea4Pd-X7qGU8FcEtfMQIfs9EKa4cPP2nJlSojIAKHtc6_D7L6i3PAQQOEU3tnfo6TtPqnlRG2FTMS7LP1wk3HIM_7olS3cjYe7aEC02DWrZWRHzqnTOw9lr9D-Ha_7bY9PnnHvPFRKOAca7zd1y-JNzLtPvv0n251gYP3Xy7Lhnj5tyt9Q8Mi0KgOX-ZyleVfqzVBzEJOSpNSjwIEDkskVusAjtwmeXCQldeaw6_Mm5UmJMQb-ae1NfOS1AfRds8OH1ZjoMNgOAlmDT77ISnwwb0xDI4_9z295q2wOvwyYPjXeY_cgFa6vaLsfU6hjtiZNMEr0hZsV-VfksNsYOxu8Dz-7BLFnkVuQrUa-srS4BUoH7dr56PVRajPq)
---
The clock is running. Virginia voters are making up their minds right now and casting their ballots early. I wouldn't ask if this weren't the most urgent fight I've seen in years.

-- Speaker Mike Johnson

| Paid For by Virginians For Fair Maps
---

P.O. Box 1472
Richmond, VA 23218 [Unsubscribe](https://links.stayinformednow.net/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_s=d0b0d68202624e728897d797109c5d13&_t=qef1za-_Kj4YgdtPx9Alg54K4c02i4dj13WS4uCCLwQoepULkvpXNv14LQFtWRGT6aNiHz35aygRvYMQPwDWlgi2Tc3SUIQYtCQikgUTZmgBMseLZpZFUsV_Raw5G4_O)

---
Peter,
While I was sitting in the back of the Presidential Motorcade, I put together something **VERY IMPORTANT** that needs your signature right away.
I put together an official Trump petition to put maximum pressure on the Senate to pass the SAVE America Act without further delay.
[We must mandate Voter ID!](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/K19ola8bB2NahFAeNsJTmIgMpmuIRmRxBjhguZ7aSQqPCzTwmTv1SUxEq0R9WbZ9n-8sRoa_LMU3z7JMKG75BBxmqXFh_2g-7-Sy9EGXl9o2imxBIAcKwQ98ULMW3XL-rFSjZO1akJohiewAfn6jtihPkmIDjnDxHVnme6uSyU0KHteUOTNQvFuu0L32-8jvoEt4V1ylmYe0zeQwciFtp3BYmGij8wgLYwHeJz5sQ3d2xdbPRT95OWFdTaXXuQ7RbplFECM3ptiW4K7wh_x2fE13sxcshbbAjSvR8_7qduZ5AQQcLl2YXAwIF1R7CTu4uIwXQDAUV5d6tttKaysHkk9vvvDq_QoCw6wLgTLz1dfRdLizcBeeUDPUebaBKbcdx1GwcziAlP3EBA8YBmZtpgAEOTK0VfHUkUPPDUKHJdDjRNbXt-mDDQ4Zq1gRO5tutPoqXNYjOiVWDAdezdwqDFwQEcbAFQZKcD2VWwzHU9gbxDQ39DYI71qzfWEzji-19zGacuVvxDVUQK2YejCKI4XIjbuq2IYYBNYkybjG2Kpk2jydXSGie7b2v4Y1Rj4CxPthZKrrN-EszpURf1Qt8OlVY5NKPxFWVE5oMONLw6-8UrDh9oEFBJNqnvQNTadN6LIUImzyNG7JbxaH1THIIsSNoQJAEC2fBoangQFJ_pbYC3IKgp0DD72HQpeWQefHGRbxXom1rn-LV_1q9TyS1xWExJmB/m70shsQQ51zXv9V6VbeW565EGZGVhmsV/19)
**_[I need 1 million + signatures before the end of the day or safe and fair elections may FOREVER be a thing of the past! >>>](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/vOlTsx0R6BTSvui_0TzJTC-5N2lEHKrws_nl5vw3CB80NCfXG9cvnDdVbFg7AYlHT0TDPIZuekTH0SdXWSMhBTJh61VHQiVmEi-l40WnEYNozyXcu7_5lvOGKQ6rkm5ZZ0Dr6JV1fM217V81BUXAU9iLkiVCcTv2q7uC68yYnJOuSyczJDqaXvnpnOdgPlS_1LmpM7uRoN7oCmx9raOqlrq_EaEqJFgqCsn2vYoSsnMdoPwQCavPq8XBFFDWybFcAinwgfaA34dEAZnqJT6XJtXfwaKgKo6LNgr1UQ0u91yttvj8DhcLIRrIXNcKxqNi6XBrVWAXFcR8XPz7lMYe7h1kVzLRtRq5oUJZqrRCbp9qFFj_KSgijmXCet_lFo4IUkhZxHmELOzA-oiqsZYIsTs0_1T_AjjhmjDD_V9PuybW0KUXLjQM-iFPTWeqK5qkkmhGgYL8_xhtyN3-i7L-oe_587eHJe_gbs1PsS1yTez8xkEf6M0SPd9ieDF_nBOXc3C7jnx4ufTnLa9xycTjXTefmFSxoLVTxsxzfKvowJxzDPahc0ABVUkoPKMg2HCOrNmIKNz0XLbE3Qhx_XPo95GO4tC-pkdmtzrbCG6RfOwsOo63EM6PGyvg3sXjQqI0yvRP80hWMCYEM8-Dq8kETe8JqsscZQicllTRl-dZ6CuS1gcPz9TKYQB0FUeN-AWhR1rc-VuOEPFPsUt-ATxsN3OOaL8K/vTczHLm4JSO1WaI_qEYF5r9utGfn_ilE/19)_**

During his powerful remarks in Corpus Christi, he introduced me to the crowd and said these words that **still give me chills:** _**"A phenomenal friend and a phenomenal Congressman. Thank you for the great job."**_ Coming straight from the man who put America First, crushed the radical left, and delivered for America – that meant the world to me. **Now I want to thank President Trump by showing him how GRATEFUL We The People are for having him as our President.** I'm sending President Trump a personal thank you card to say thanks for his endorsement, his friendship, and his unbreakable leadership. **But I want it signed by YOU – the patriots who make this fight possible.** [**Will you sign my Trump Thank You Card and add a short message I can pass along to him?**](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/Y1tK__5GGGz53FVKrxMFS2csZV_V_e0DgIYrNRYhN9vZdrqyuybgZCWkP_SBPeSKG8L-i88eI6EZaufSpaYjX6gdGrwZxTXHXhe19r0UDoF7-4m7G2ZPQLNtxT9Ek7QQVbVkIFJfm4fAcwByWlvP0f4auwQ0_YV9tAClVyRV-1WO_dqBJ0Jf79TnlYil-VmyL0lyPS0kEriOqggcpaboCOcig0-8Dek_KfV-Q7qdL7WoBrYNq0Aza7HmvjeIBpfjqrT8HRZ8Z1qn0nSRFfjfdKe2J5t58GFu8vsU0mxHwm8WST68sgHx3ZYNkHLXxnDLfSfFC2vBOKwj9pvMC_cHIZizzUY7ElwSZYe117IbAvYTI1PefEqw-wsdgLKDE0mmwO-aGWTvFJyce32UEI9rWTByiwqTXRLp2pZFk7bMMji1jfmiEu333Dq_dkZWg7wNmcqE5HxxOYwc58zc_10rS33WXv2tRPmAjkE88hORZbBb9cU8dp_z5Ziu7muTlJrgCTqQ4V0Inm8s3uieVFBlpHT7X6GP-VrXGb0I5wXIlCLUIYrq52fyodcPguQ1cczboYcMIKCK56ualFI9Az7GuGqdeP-Af_Kly_sVLy7fvMgcqGVUfyuR-MiDjZM6QxT0uNPln9-qz-zbLBX531IXiRpW_KszLPCk2iRWtf6rCvL0JKLQScVtW_Wi5JHGSvUYlBGCcR5TgAoe55RozTwIP8RYqay6fuZ34EWKt8TcHHs_MCrMDiJchUzST9If_Hpb7kdPuR1tZZLkVglCDbNSzQUNQ-dbmFZxdrUjb-1pYsKYAIjdPChFAxS5Cp1Tdf-z5kvBC9maRfBsg5uJeprSl-BvDWmtHZtoO5OnL3MRcqcxFDCFTibbxoi27TSLez6urRZGW1VSfz8AO3JnHDVutmeoDDG4bEFnlTHK196iRM4vpHUGvMb4UXQyFARI1LKy7YdNeWqmJmpgQr0eTFXcT-poTUivkPJPRokach-poYE5xcO9SzX7e5SARul1MX9fSjcpUV35jgbM89z6Fq3Sax040Zub-ZcyJ41cffpq5ssGwDaw0NtBR7GpkpHdYHQ32uDAzgr9Fea1syXBxOOGa7bYsTGMCWHpf4vi/JhlcaYcyAlHtdjgHZym1HX0oV_7GZIoT/19)

clean_body: | | | Peter, President Trump just gave me one of the biggest honors of my life. During his powerful remarks in Corpus Christi, he introduced me to the crowd and said these words that still give me chills: "A phenomenal friend and a phenomenal Congressman. Thank you for the great job." Coming straight from the man who put America First, crushed the radical left, and delivered for America – that meant the world to me. Now I want to thank President Trump by showing him how GRATEFUL We The People are for having him as our President. I'm sending President Trump a personal thank you card to say thanks for his endorsement, his friendship, and his unbreakable leadership. But I want it signed by YOU – the patriots who make this fight possible. | | With honor, Michael Cloud United States Congress (R-TX) | | | | Paid for by Cloud for Congress | | P.O. Box 7027 Victoria, TX 77903 | |

name: Eric Metaxas
subject: Imagine this, it's horrifying.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
The threat is real. Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zseevo1v1f96edj9edq98hnngcamk16vem4910m8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs)
---
Dear Faithful Friend, **Imagine this:** A man steps outside his own home in a quiet neighborhood. Suddenly, violence erupts, his kneecap shattered in a brutal attack. His car torched. His family terrorized for years, children taunted with slurs in the streets, living under police protection for nearly a decade. This isn't a scene from some distant war zone. **This happened in Bradford, England – to Nissar Hussain.** **His only "crime"? Leaving Islam and embracing Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior.** For 17 years, Nissar endured relentless persecution from his former community. The Church of England? _**SILENT.**_ Not one bishop stood with him or his family. **But Save the Persecuted Christians, where I’m proud to serve as a board member, refused to stand by. We brought Nissar here to the U.S. to help him share his story, and he is now fighting back boldly – in part by pursuing a groundbreaking legal case against 11 countries that still mandate death for apostasy. ** [**Your support has amplified his voice and his mission to expose this evil.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb1rie627sim3faft2qppcc7blao1uv9j6ufbp08_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs) Nissar's story is heartbreaking, but it's not isolated. Over 380 million Christians face severe persecution globally, and the numbers are growing. _**In Iran, 254 believers were arrested**_ in 2025 alone for simply practicing their faith, escalating further amid the regime's war on Christians. _**In Nigeria, thousands have been slaughtered**_ by Islamist militants: entire villages massacred, girls held captive for years, all because they refused to deny Christ. _**In Pakistan, blasphemy laws **_are twisted to destroy Christian lives. _**In North Korea, owning a Bible**_ can mean a lifetime in a labor camp. **It is for all of these reasons that Save the Persecuted Christians is relentlessly educating Americans and rallying the faithful to recognize the threat before it takes deeper root here.** A powerful example: Our ongoing education and advocacy efforts helped fuel the overwhelming success on March 3, when **95% of Texas Republican primary voters stood up and voted to ban Sharia law** – sending a clear, faithful message: We will not let this ideology gain a foothold in America and threaten our freedoms or our persecuted brothers and sisters in Christ. **The threat is real.** _Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there._ We must be extra vigilant, and **we need your help right now** to keep pushing back. [**Q1 ends at midnight on March 31, and we’ve set a goal of 1,000 individual donations from believers across America to sustain this vital work. Will you be one of them today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zus8qorruromuub4p6mu8lllnk0hkf7eec93re6o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs)
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt5su34bm325he4t6bkdt9u7nmrguc7sv2frmrvo_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs)
---
Your gift, especially a monthly commitment through The Defenders Guild, multiplies our impact and sustains the fight against this growing evil. [**Click here to give and carry the burden with us.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmg4r9bhlqefe19pvvo5psar8b1fnno1tlss4ku8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs) [**From media campaigns to conferences and everything in between, I’ve seen firsthand how effectively and tirelessly Save the Persecuted Christians guides a coalition of 200+ leaders in order to expose evil and rally the Church – and any support you can offer is well-placed.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z06nlmqoqr3vik2kb8askd3u8e4rsl7il8n8upm8_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs) **Paul wrote in Galatians 6:2, **_**“Carry each other’s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.”**_ **That is our mandate as the Body of Christ.** The Church must rise in one spirit, refusing silence in the face of darkness. Thank you for your faithfulness and courage in this hour. In Christ,
---
---
Eric Metaxas Member, Board of Directors Save the Persecuted Christians
---
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1hcd6f1tii890kcskcheu7h60nof03k4qa8lrno_rp22sh2s8i6epr5cjge1o32cth2bs)
---
|
---

---

Monument, CO 80132
USA

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

We support patriotic Americans who believe in a bright future and are ready to make it happen. **The Democrats?** The Democrat Party is the party of rich, clueless, coastal elites who sip soy lattes with their pinkies in the air. The Democrats fight for the freeloaders, fraudsters, and foreign citizens who illegally enter our country. The Democrats support pessimistic, angry, far-left, malicious special interests that want to destroy all that is good about America. Who will win control of America in 2026? The Democrats who are hellbent on transforming America into a Marxist nightmare? Or will Republicans win and hold the Senate & House for President Trump, and all of our truck drivers, steel workers, patriotic families, cops, firefighters, and small business owners we depend on? **Who will win?** What vision for our country will prevail? Well, the answer is up to you and me. We _MUST_ stand together and ensure we hold the United States Senate this year. Who will win? What vision for our country will prevail? Well, the answer is up to you and me. We MUST stand together and ensure we hold the United States Senate this year. Urgent Note: Recently, Democrats have been winning small but important local races across the country. Headlines like this, " A Wow Moment': Democrats Make Big Gains In Key Battlegrounds, " are flashing a warning sign. Thank you for standing with us, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate | | PO Box 25400 Houston, TX 77265 | | | To stop receiving emails from Ted Cruz for Senate, to unsubscribe. |

# Sunday, April 12, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1861, the Civil War officially began when Confederate forces, led by Brig. Gen. P.G.T. Beauregard, [attacked Fort Sumter](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D1uxCAUBODT4A4LsPFPQZHG3aZNaWF4LC_CxgJi5NtHu8oNUn-jGWm-HutDY8Dj-al3UMXF9YCaA5QCaS0Jf_bT66CT8TWmYPMGueSyCiYGynrKxWo1hnvtG6scgICuAcXHUc7TJIex8coIM3TjxibTQb9pzuU2T1MHmzSSOS4bVK821nPBGZuFbO08WjdPBlznwDhLegYWS0ztd8SjeHDhjhek1sS9CcqXcmbSfRCxELHUWluPucR0v5yIpXjM1Oqb4kH_hIhFnwkD5eIdAGrwwkCrTnSDJx65ScqeFUPAPIykZ89dY3gPln-9dCnxGwAA__-Xgn39) in South Carolina, forcing Union Maj. Robert Anderson to surrender the next day. Few TV shows captured late-1970s culture like _Charlie's Angels_ —and this week, Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith, and Cheryl Ladd [reunited in Los Angeles](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd0SYgB0XFNu4m223tF7gEd4MhgjexPLfr7L7CVPd5uro6Pz52D6AMpXHb9jRcaxbwaNnZMa2caPv_ZkgQ_PpqC2HfsfOnTet9CSVkaPeAlA-NzMEFxE1Xgd04zzb5Xaz0zwk5ycVFwBlTLALmLudlY0qgL3d5zHc_UDuTVNm1KNSi7aXsMwhLjeP8RrRxyCMwkBc2-WzUuGEMZ_1he3i6z5kl5ifXVx_Cb0KvR7HceEXlU7h_0PoddR2snYSevUJWibsEsoDc5edoXXZ8LsQo7SKk4RS6IWtQzvlFzDKT_BfvZb35rPIvhMn6RO2M8sMIchnqlyFXofmwvOgnKlPszDqsQPlf5L8o7Ivp_8GAAD__38YkVc) to mark the show's 50th anniversary, drawing a standing ovation. We take a look at where the franchise stands today in _Whatever Happened To..._ In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , CEO Cole Strehlow unpacked the context and latest developments behind Tucker Carlson and President Trump’s public feud. This isn’t a minor disagreement, but a high-stakes clash between two of the most powerful voices in conservative media and politics. Cole breaks down what happened, what’s been said, and how it all unraveled. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUANDT4C0W_tgGBoZKlbd06NJuFjGfmOg7WPCTyLev2iv0Ak96X-f57BOl-_XDb-g45vmOr0rIjGXmkh7bvnryZVlfuVCoF6xceQYJ40n2pw7m4BMdc98EFxEBVYOu03qwxgyjblZnlFXD6K3R0dgAwyilVp26WDn6qAw2yf1qsu-gk9LC0AarQ7RmwagiLjGIXmJInEt7y-nOK0Y68hNLu-StIbcy71WoNwGTgOnID360FxQw7bfrNxPZ86cUamKh3sFAU1zYX4ko1VGLXl43n-hP4n_1nw5-AgAA__8gLG2k). Today’s sponsor, [BIOptimizers](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO3CAQQL8Gd7fCg42XwkWklbu9JkVKxMJgTwTGgvGtLl8fbS7KD6R-ozfzND_u9u4o0b6-u4wzx2J3fLaEzFgtVzrzsbnkqt-epabQHti4sQUJ-k0Obz3Y4Ch92qELc0QEVB3O_TSN5nod9dRts-uN66MZg48QtDFa6l4PXodx0uoadUfzyyaHHnopDYyXYKYQzdVjVBF9DGKQGIhLvfwstPOGMX2WD6wXX3KX5o35aEJ9E7AIWB5UDqZMv7C214CApW3lELD4khJ6prI3AUt2646NzsyVXIJ2PrzLh6N1F7AcQi1rEuqmTZiiQjWOY2-iHB5GTuCkF6D5aVs5q0ehboejYDE7Su2L_HOp23eubg_2joGcAH1ythkDnVmo2_IVYt_d6yyX_nJfdsadhbrJwfZgQXd1DseTUqKmJzHI9bXrTz__19M-ZvgdAAD__yPrrkw), is helping people break the cycle of stress and poor sleep by restoring a critical mineral your body needs for relaxation, recovery, and deeper rest.

## US, Iran in Direct Talks as US Enters Hormuz
Top officials from the U.S. and Iran began [direct negotiations](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u7CAQhZ_G7mzhMf6hoLiNu71tSmsWhoUEmxVMFu3bR84rpDvSkT6d833c9huGGM7HfzxIs0v7SbVEYqa8cw7fx9NjxGx8TTnacqfChXcQMHdCdgPsFkN877K12hEBjS3pYVkmta7TvLRe4yQMklLSjcOIM4wAAlAOtJITxtzboC-akAMMQiiYeqsW69RqyI2OjLONFGQDp9x_pnCyJxff6UW5N-loo_bMz9KM_xrYGthqrf0bfUpX28B23Wlgw8zBRLriC09DXSgRD7yj7ULGs2OMX6W7qMWjTZVsJ2aphnVSsvd8xDZr-6whxlDmpZHicWCIvwv4T9peGn4CAAD__xf5g7I) in Pakistan yesterday, marking the highest-level, face-to-face talks between the two nations since 1979. Vice President J.D. Vance led the U.S. delegation in Islamabad Saturday as reports indicated a “stalemate” with Iran, with talks characterized as having “[mood swings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMiPTMPwEDjYhm003RI3dHrxrbGQ3g-b2K17wLvDSKqnqq_rzXJ7og4-v37iTZpeWSFcJxEx54ezP_dgwYDbblXKwZaXChRdQ0EvVyQYWiz58lq6y2hEBtRXpZhge0zg--qHatBtXbKe2Qdt3NLjVTACAaqVGOQuTrby-01TXQKPUBI_aToN102jItY6Ms6JTZD2nXP9NPvJGLnzSm3Jt0l4FvTEfRbS_BMwC5uu66kwnUy63fys3uIAZi0d5oPHOGwHzWaTPGGUhlgehIckY_hVp07lykbRTfpG8e2SgFWOKsmA07FMs8nt_I2CusrbH5UPwpR9Ep147-vAFxz969K3hfwAAAP__-7CNTg)” on both sides. Iran’s demand to maintain complete sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz remained central to the negotiations, even as the U.S. Navy crossed into the strait for the first time since the war began, and President Trump took to social media claiming the U.S. was “[clearing out](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OtCAYha9GOwx_ylBQfI3dfO2WBuFlYINi4J0x3v3GvYXtTnKSc_I8X8_laVNO--u_3cBgKMsOZ8uACHXBmt7bEW221cWz1OzbCg0bLpzyiVBJGF-8TflaZO9NAOAgejBMqVE_HuOk-mi0hVXpdRLr5JlTEKhWMojRycCUC75P5l6jknFGqebj4LXyQT8cBBHABd9JCj5hqcN3STtGCPkqH6iDK1ufTUQ8Wif-dXzu-Hye53DZWMrddny-cTo-24rJZbgj1vd2kGavRt6NhFIdNOIy2Jr2F2FCCsYpp0PELffV-ONMOac2qU7S12ZT_v3FP8n6GP4TAAD__2XXgEQ)” the strait. Iran disputed Trump’s claim and [threatened to fire](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp8Gd7PCGP9s4SIN3U2b0pqF4UKCwYLZXTlPH3lfIfUnHX3n_PravjCmmL9_4k4r-7JlerdEzFQ3rvG5HwETVhvepSbXHtS48aakmkBq6NXmMKZz051bPZGioaO1n-fxvizjNHdhRXJ6GifdjxKH3i6Lm_T0eMx2cDSilV1cL5rUveqlvKvx5u6z8_fFkh88We-EluQil3r7XWLmQD6d5UX1ZsvepTUwH00MP4QyQpl8HqXxNQllLrBQRmqhTN8LZT4ScCkKZWLFDBwqIVNuwAWQGe0fwHzCs0HG1wktxKMBB2SgzFSBA0HjipGheAil7s-_Qpmuru54x5Rim2ah5feOMX0e8n9lfa3qXwAAAP__RIWOUA) on U.S. ships “within 30 minutes” if they continued moving toward the strait. The U.S. Navy reported that two guided-missile destroyers passed through the strait without incident as they began “[setting conditions](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9u6jAUgPGncTbQyfG_ZPBwhW426FKpY-Tax8SVQ5B9gPL2FX2Frt_wG76P43z0ueTL-eRXcpy2-UKPVoiZ6sw139br4ouvYXlstcT2SY0bzwhodqB2Pc7R5_KcVRddIkKSHbneWj0Ogza2W5weBgMehpBQpqhNImPAyhB7LbXRocvupYHqsQcYUe_jaGMah0BJJgopCgUUM291_7XlCy-UynO7U92Hbe2KW5ivTch_AieB0_erCpwO_0_vh7ejwKmx51sTOCEoCaBBSgOg7Kh701UXr49cSm7GCgXn1efy6_KfZtwd_gQAAP__hhVwSg)” to clear mines and provide a safe passage through the waterway.
## Triumphal Arch Renderings Revealed
The Trump administration [unveiled renderings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpDAQBNCvMZmRaQweBw4uIZtLL0Q-uj14ZTCye4adv1-xwf7AxiVV6dW_-3z3McX98ddv5DjkeaezJmKmMnOJz-1YffJlWc9cEtb_VLnyDApGqbTsYEYf03vWDbpABNQ35DpjBnu7DaNpVuft4pXpLXrVaeiQLGDQZI0dtUc1NNFdbUp30CllYWjRGgz2tlDoAy0BhVaEkXNpP3LceaWQ3vlFpV3y1iS3Mh9V9H8ETAKm8zzbkD_tFQqYLo2AqdCOVOL-qLLQi3wilFye21ElDEqGnFn-aOXFbYrD44wpxToaodVj8zF9L_Kvbno5-AoAAP__SG5-4A) of the proposed Triumphal Arch on Friday, detailing plans for what would be the tallest structure of its kind in the world. Modeled after Paris’ Arc de Triomphe, the arch would stand at about 250 feet tall, and the [proposed location](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd0RwjQ0UFNu4y7ZbWhguMStsEJBY-ftV9r0_eOVopBmd8-e-3m1M8Xz8tgeaHvJ64tUS9o517TU-j7LbZKvbr1yTbxu23voKDGbKBOWwehvTexWDNwERcBzQcCknrdQ0y2E3DGyASQeFKMbNjZN3UmiEDQJy5-chms8aExw4Yxqmm9fSB60chjGgC54Ihj72XG9_czz7jiG98wvrzeVjSGbvvTQy_iKwEFjs5uSnILCU3DqB5cSLVjw91ng-Gq2Y0Db0tNfnURotNZf8lb9p6QeXwMKVknzUisAyVOPLFVOKbZZEsMdhY_r_338k7WXgXwAAAP__aZiDCg) is near Arlington National Cemetery across the Potomac River from the Lincoln Memorial. Renderings show [national mottos](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSnDAQRL8GstkCLSwQKHBCdk4dUjpmJMY1jChJnOr-3rX2Jzjv6u73fn1sH46FNfx0J9ni46ZUs1AplLaS-D6vw4lL-1FjEsyflEsum-nMC7oBerOhY_nehhatJzL0bMn20zQu8zy-pvawpvcdutHPCzoyM46-34d5HJdl-hxeU9-yfbd1Q2_6rlvM-MBlQr_MO_mnp91jM3SEXGJ6_I6s5SAv3_GL0mOPZyv2KOXKzfNHY9bGrLXWxxtBXeGoGus71Zj1isKF99yY1V1Q0n1eGarLB2soUeGNCJc4BdZdbqQMIQqSQmUNhOA53ImAXBDKIBw1g1OEqAT_xuBWpAQhYmPWNlm8Kotwfk3N0IXTsfx9XP5L85c1fwIAAP__E-aXjg) “One Nation Under God” and “Liberty and Justice For All” on both sides of the arch, with a Lady Liberty figure at its top, flanked by two eagles, and four lions at its base. President Trump said the arch, commemorating the nation’s 250th anniversary, would be _“the GREATEST and MOST BEAUTIFUL Triumphal Arch, anywhere in the World."_ You can see the [renderings here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2u4yAQhuGrwR0RHv9SUGxDl223tFgY4llhsGCSKHe_8inODZx6pFfzPX_u291Rovz47Q40HMuW8d0SMmPduNLzOHeXXPX7u9QU2l9s3HgDBbNUo-xhC47SZxu7YCIi4NCh6Zdl0us6zUu3mxg16n4clmHVfphmtwYfYO59XD36gB2Zq6bGHnqlNEy3oJcQ9eoxDhF9DGJUGIhLvf0rlHnHmD7lhfXmy9ElszOfTQy_BFgBNn_O0vg6CbBXWIBVowDbKwH22eS1T4Dl-jxO6cJBmRpXx1SyrPhCl5qESclYCstvAXkRyICNHlmeyWUBtqsmnG9Kidq8iFE9Dkfp6yn-keTLwP8AAAD__4IJiZ4).
## World's Best Steak Restaurants Ranked
The [2026 World's 101 Best Steak Restaurants](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7ty6yAUheGngc4aLpKQCorTuPNpUzJcNhYJEhrYMeO3z9h5hPRr_vnWx83cbMrpuP-3O2iMxRzQWwZEqAZr-t7PzWZb_dZLzaE5aNjQCCbmCxsvXJhgU36akQYdAQRICporNa3LMs2KbtpOi3eTDM45voJkVsngrRMsejsvjtOkXzU2csEZW8U0hFWFuC4eoozgYyAjg5Cw1OGzpAM3iPlZHlAHX3aa9YZ4NiL_EXEl4tp7H97UXynYr_baEXGlVYezp5xTmxUZ2X23Kb8b-KfjDy1-AgAA___MkW9D) list is out, and a small restaurant in Spain's village of Jiménez de Jamuz—La Cúpula de El Capricho—has claimed the top spot, nudging out last year's three-time winner, Buenos Aires' Parrilla Don Julio, which was retired into a new "Hall of Fire" category for sustained excellence. Rounding out the global top five are restaurants in Sydney, Australia; Spain's Basque Country; rural Italy; and Madrid, Spain. The best steakhouse in North America is [The Eighty Six](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OwyAUBODT4M4RPHCwC4pt3GXbLS1-HjEbbCx4SZTbr5IrbD3SjL75uSwXm3Lar992Q0OxLDs-W0YirAvVdN-O1WZb_fosNYfmsFGjBTice656AUuwKb8W1QUTEQFlh0ZoPUzjOJx1txolovdSyWkIbnQOJCJ4lFIjjFE67JJ5t3ElQHA-wXAKkw5xGj1GGdHHwBTHkKjU029JO60Y86s8sJ582bpsVqKjMfnFYGYw1-JcxaNUescM5lhK6ENN-43BHNKe9iuD-e3oG6G9reXesPUfXi9Aai2GcdAM5q6acDxTzqmdNVP8utmUP6P0r6ceBv4CAAD__6iQfp4) in New York City, coming in at No. 12, followed by Chicago's [Asador Bastian](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykz7FuwyAQgOGnsbdY-MDGDAxdsqVrR3Q2R0yFTQTXoLx9lb5C91-f9H_d3A1jiuf9Ew-yHLI7qdVEzFQcl_hzPHZMWLa95ZJ8XalyZQcC5otQlxGcx5heTvXeBiIg2ZMdtZ7Mskyz7ncLkmCVYCDIsJqFtCCYlVlxQTNJHfpo35pQI4xCGJgGb7QPZtkoyEBb8J0S5CPnMnznePJOIb3yk8qw5aNPdmd-1E5-dHDt4NpaG7Ciz2XFyhHPd9XBtS_WP1pMKdZZd0rcD4zpT-B_bT8t_AYAAP___05tRQ) at No. 15 overall. You can see the [full list of 101 restaurants](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6yAYxvGrgS0WHzaYgeEs2XLWjgibl0CLQwRvg3L3VdJL6P7or5-ej4u7-Fzy7frfH2AxVneD0QsgQnPY8vdxT774tqdRWwl9g44dnWBCndh84sIFn8vTzTTYCCBAUrBc68Ws66I0TVZKzQNTi9-YMntcInjFNwPbBmyVPtJsXzU2c8EZM2KZgtEhmnWHKCPsMZCZQchY2_RZ8w0TxPKsD2jTXg9abEK8dyL_EXEm4jzGmN7UXyn4r_7aEXHGBKeSO9Jmw33kUnJXmszsevhc3i380wEPK34CAAD__yFGch8) which spans nearly every continent.

**Whatever happened to _Charlie's Angels_?** Few TV shows captured late-1970s culture like _Charlie 's Angels_. When it debuted in 1976, starring Farrah Fawcett, Kate Jackson, and Jaclyn Smith, it blended crime drama, glamour, and a then-novel idea: women as action leads. [Here's the opening credit scene](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAUheGnwVusa-xgGBgqtdnSjpW6IAKXQItDBDdBefsqfYWu50jf8H8ezdGmnC7nd7uhplDMBXvLSITVUE237RptttXFXmr27YSNGhkOXOxg2U3ceJvywyyD1wGR4zygntZ1r6Tci3WI2qGQTliUPICU0wQnJaQCBQ68nJ0dkn5qsEx8AlB8P3q1-qCkwzAHdMGzBdAnKnX8LulCEUN-lDvW0ZVtyDoSXRubXxg_MH7ovY-PcqPbCZ__c7HkIpsPdza_vtVk4OP8Y7-OQ9X-2lPOqYmVLXDebMp_JP2rw13z3wAAAP__Hp5yjQ). Critics scoffed at its "jiggle TV" style, but audiences didn't care. The Angels became instant icons, and [Fawcett's poster](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyklMt2ujoUxp8mznDlAgkZOFAptVrrhR5tO2GFXLgUhEIq6NOfJX2E_yzJ_vb-kuxfct7GW5GX-SV9E5WeWVPHF913pbZWt7Ft89-qyUQpWpn1dVuqLtGd7WyMIaYOdB2EYyXy8ha7EzUzWmNNJnqGGPO473uUTbKZkZhw41OiNKRUcapdio1UGjHBmJKTfPaoBl2EEYQce1PFmTLcl9oQo6VRwIVa5bZup0WdX2ymTXmrr7qdyrqalLPM2qYDZA5wCHDY9_1UVOJeXx5hgMNN3dS1s687q1snFG0rMicUvdTWOgths_ySAhyqBuBwAf3l8uO4WvkAh602gARdG6MYAxIKlbZNrgAJECHIgxy5jHMEsQcwVXkCSKBva_xS1Pk2WvPp-iDg9XPzYlfxDTnu7pB23fm__fvqUJzQJYpWyy99Co3XVB5Z-2T_MSh5-4rC5_ehidzNKzNkHpyLZHku2BGdaZ7JupfiZLp5uZ6_ajf5QdE6-1nNtfp2Xz-uAR6ajcfuAXpzWOX-yvTCUm8x39PYcwfv8JRGTxl9S8tkLorNcEgi17r75fWupTF44yQyunR6foz6_v477NhnVh2e3_yP4-t1_v5z6_Kv4XB6ea-d9VNdbH91E22WxTraDDsT-2dbDJ-r9-X5shPDJtlL_7A7RdyKUKb35LPxF0ouFpifcmJOz0fevUnduH1QucfyZTq__4bWba-YZKQcvl5Pu7bKB-IVx-i4ab8xsYV0tmfefm3_Lju2In00RwNMs6tQY198ghEnnEAXeh4eI0llAQmSP5nSV0ACOY7LWjbZDZCAU4rJuHTRtgckqMfJz5j4l2dFm44G371yRhPKKCUUEQiwR-ZlLR3E4UN7U0LJ9sEI5tyLEfQggfQR-ta3vm5VB0hgRgYBXpg_CgFeNCOdANNKjk5YIAYphNIYSHxFEmO8xNNSGA4VY4-CVSfL71HsKqQkYohBhpCAVHocC1-4LlcJNvBx4J8_cBnzPB9RRAGm3WObvoMn7Uw1fV6WeUcZcGFaibwcX5b9p-_gOsP_BwAA___l1GNI) helped cement the show's place in pop culture. The magic didn't last. Cast turnover, declining ratings, and a formula that wore thin, led to its cancellation in 1981. For years, the franchise lingered as nostalgia, familiar but dormant. It roared back in 2000 with a glossy, self-aware film starring Drew Barrymore, Cameron Diaz, and Lucy Liu. Leaning into humor and high-energy action, it turned camp into a strength ([see the opening sequence here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6yAYxvGrwVssDLYxA8M5qtIpHdtuiI-XQIRDBG-CcvdVegtdn0f6Df-vkz6ZlNP1_GF2UBiKvkJvGRChaqzpvt-iyaa62EvNvllo2FAzytYDnQ8T096k_NTz4FUAYMAHUJMQi9y2ZRVDVDYEC1Y4MTMZ1m2hEhbGqduMs-vE_ZDUS6PzxCZKJVtGL4UPcnMQeAAXPJkp-ISljpeSrhgh5Gd5QB1d2YesIuKtEf6PsCNhx977-Cx3vFt4_a_FoIuEHx-Ev13270_-fv6vNzdU5W895ZzaKshMz7tJ-ZfEP3V4KPYTAAD__44DcuY)). Audiences responded. The first two films together grossed more than $500 million worldwide, becoming defining artifacts of early-2000s pop entertainment. But the revival proved fleeting. A 2011 TV reboot vanished almost instantly, and a 2019 film relaunch failed to connect with either longtime fans or new viewers. The problem wasn't just execution. It was identity. Every version struggles to answer: Is it serious action? Campy comedy? Feminist statement? The 2000 films worked because they embraced camp fully. Later versions didn't. Today, _Charlie 's Angels_ remains widely recognized but creatively adrift. Last week in Los Angeles, [Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith, and Cheryl Ladd](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd0SYgB0XFNu4m223tF7gEd4MhgjexPLfr7L7CVPd5uro6Pz52D6AMpXHb9jRcaxbwaNnZMa2caPv_ZkgQ_PpqC2HfsfOnTet9CSVkaPeAlA-NzMEFxE1Xgd04zzb5Xaz0zwk5ycVFwBlTLALmLudlY0qgL3d5zHc_UDuTVNm1KNSi7aXsMwhLjeP8RrRxyCMwkBc2-WzUuGEMZ_1he3i6z5kl5ifXVx_Cb0KvR7HceEXlU7h_0PoddR2snYSevUJWibsEsoDc5edoXXZ8LsQo7SKk4RS6IWtQzvlFzDKT_BfvZb35rPIvhMn6RO2M8sMIchnqlyFXofmwvOgnKlPszDqsQPlf5L8o7Ivp_8GAAD__38YkVc) reunited to mark the show's 50th anniversary, drawing a standing ovation. And another reboot is reportedly in development even now, a reminder of the brand's stubborn appeal. That tells you where _Charlie's Angels_ stands now: It's too famous to abandon--but too outdated to easily succeed. _Were you a fan of Charlie's Angels on TV or in the movies? Let us know your thoughts by replying to this email._

clean_body: The Trump administration of the proposed Triumphal Arch on Friday, detailing plans for what would be the tallest structure of its kind in the world. | | | | | | Sunday, April 12, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1861, the Civil War officially began when Confederate forces, led by Brig. Gen. P.G.T. Beauregard, in South Carolina, forcing Union Maj. Robert Anderson to surrender the next day. Few TV shows captured late-1970s culture like Charlie's Angels —and this week, Kate Jackson, Jaclyn Smith, and Cheryl Ladd to mark the show's 50th anniversary, drawing a standing ovation. We take a look at where the franchise stands today in Whatever Happened To... In case you missed it, this week on The Flyover Podcast , CEO Cole Strehlow unpacked the context and latest developments behind Tucker Carlson and President Trump’s public feud. This isn’t a minor disagreement, but a high-stakes clash between two of the most powerful voices in conservative media and politics. Cole breaks down what happened, what’s been said, and how it all unraveled. . Today’s sponsor, , is helping people break the cycle of stress and poor sleep by restoring a critical mineral your body needs for relaxation, recovery, and deeper rest. | US, Iran in Direct Talks as US Enters Hormuz Top officials from the U.S. and Iran began in Pakistan yesterday, marking the highest-level, face-to-face talks between the two nations since 1979. Vice President J.D. Vance led the U.S. delegation in Islamabad Saturday as reports indicated a “stalemate” with Iran, with talks characterized as having “” on both sides. Iran’s demand to maintain complete sovereignty over the Strait of Hormuz remained central to the negotiations, even as the U.S. Navy crossed into the strait for the first time since the war began, and President Trump took to social media claiming the U.S. was “” the strait. Iran disputed Trump’s claim and on U.S. ships “within 30 minutes” if they continued moving toward the strait. The U.S. Navy reported that two guided-missile destroyers passed through the strait without incident as they began “” to clear mines and provide a safe passage through the waterway. Triumphal Arch Renderings Revealed The Trump administration of the proposed Triumphal Arch on Friday, detailing plans for what would be the tallest structure of its kind in the world. Modeled after Paris’ Arc de Triomphe, the arch would stand at about 250 feet tall, and the is near Arlington National Cemetery across the Potomac River from the Lincoln Memorial. Renderings show “One Nation Under God” and “Liberty and Justice For All” on both sides of the arch, with a Lady Liberty figure at its top, flanked by two eagles, and four lions at its base. President Trump said the arch, commemorating the nation’s 250th anniversary, would be “the GREATEST and MOST BEAUTIFUL Triumphal Arch, anywhere in the World." You can see the . World's Best Steak Restaurants Ranked The list is out, and a small restaurant in Spain's village of Jiménez de Jamuz—La Cúpula de El Capricho—has claimed the top spot, nudging out last year's three-time winner, Buenos Aires' Parrilla Don Julio, which was retired into a new "Hall of Fire" category for sustained excellence. Rounding out the global top five are restaurants in Sydney, Australia; Spain's Basque Country; rural Italy; and Madrid, Spain. The best steakhouse in North America is in New York City, coming in at No. 12, followed by Chicago's at No. 15 overall. You can see the which spans nearly every continent. () ➤****Britain’s plan to transfer the Chagos Islands to Mauritius is on indefinite hold after President Trump withdrew U.S. support, stalling legislation tied to a key joint military base. () Flying together with our sponsor ➤****Are you taking this popular blood thinner? You may have been told it’s safe... But stunning research reveals this “harmless” drug is linked to dangerous, life-threatening side effect...including death. More than 3 million Americans currently take this blood thinner. Do you? . | Whatever happened to Charlie's Angels? Few TV shows captured late-1970s culture like Charlie 's Angels. When it debuted in 1976, starring Farrah Fawcett, Kate Jackson, and Jaclyn Smith, it blended crime drama, glamour, and a then-novel idea: women as action leads. . Critics scoffed at its "jiggle TV" style, but audiences didn't care. The Angels became instant icons, and helped cement the show's place in pop culture. The magic didn't last. Cast turnover, declining ratings, and a formula that wore thin, led to its cancellation in 1981. For years, the franchise lingered as nostalgia, familiar but dormant. It roared back in 2000 with a glossy, self-aware film starring Drew Barrymore, Cameron Diaz, and Lucy Liu. Leaning into humor and high-energy action, it turned camp into a strength (). Audiences responded. The first two films together grossed more than $500 million worldwide, becoming defining artifacts of early-2000s pop entertainment. But the revival proved fleeting. A 2011 TV reboot vanished almost instantly, and a 2019 film relaunch failed to connect with either longtime fans or new viewers. The problem wasn't just execution. It was identity. Every version struggles to answer: Is it serious action? Campy comedy? Feminist statement? The 2000 films worked because they embraced camp fully. Later versions didn't. Today, Charlie 's Angels remains widely recognized but creatively adrift. Last week in Los Angeles, reunited to mark the show's 50th anniversary, drawing a standing ovation. And another reboot is reportedly in development even now, a reminder of the brand's stubborn appeal. That tells you where Charlie's Angels stands now: It's too famous to abandon--but too outdated to easily succeed. Were you a fan of Charlie's Angels on TV or in the movies? body:
In good hands

| Peter,
Throughout my life, my hands have done a lot of different things!
---
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
They comforted hearts and healed wounds when I was a Nurse Practitioner.
---
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-w0mr8rqv7h2POw)
---
They flew helicopters to protect our freedom when I served in the Navy.
---
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._w)
---
They packed lunches, held hands, and instilled our values as a Mom to my four kids.
---
[](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
Now on the campaign trail, I use these hands to put up yard signs and shake voters' hands!
Look, I'll be honest... campaigning is a grind. It is unglamorous, exhausting work.
But I have never been afraid of getting my hands dirty. Whether it was flying Helos in the Persian Gulf, caring for patients as a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner, or hammering in my own yard signs on the side of the highway--I do what needs to be done.
Why? [Because the Left is coming for this seat with everything they have.](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
They are furious that we have the White House, the Senate, and the House. They are desperate to break our Republican majority and stop the America First agenda cold. I am their #1 target to flip the House.
I'm humbly asking you to lend me a hand. I can't fight the liberal dark money machine alone.
---
| [LEND JEN A HAND](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| [CHIP IN TODAY](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._HD9pweB2B4WKl0ang)
---
Every dollar goes to the frontlines of this battleground. I'm willing to do the heavy lifting, but I need you to help buy the fuel.
Please step up today so I can keep fighting for you..!
Jen Kiggans

subject: Anti-Drone Lasers, Drug-Soaked Bibles, Historic Bridge Reopens
body:
Federal Aviation Administration said on Friday that [high-energy anti-drone lasers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4M4RYIxxQfEad3ntlNYN92KjwWABk4_dj5ItTH2kv_Q7X9f1CiGGtP2Hg2x7-rwmetRIrVFZIbWAJSeKUKlULD9bzfBNuEoudc9VL-SKEOJrVR3aG8dZdGTFNI3zLAwX3W5hdOC4GzQ6cMZJ9OZmNJLxDsWkRRfsO8aVkELwQZiLU4Pncr4N2oMWODLFCUPL5dJ2avSE6uMr36lcXD66aPfWzsqGf0wuTC5tpz3E-N6YXM4cg3sxuSB5SpWYXEYjtTJDf1JqsOXUe4D-o-w_zB62QnRQakwuXbF4PkKMoeqJKb4dED7trv3trbuVvwEAAP__Ypp_1Q) used near the Texas-Mexico border can be deployed safely without disrupting commercial flights. The agreement follows a federal safety review after laser use prompted temporary airspace closures near El Paso earlier this year.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK4zAQRp9G7mJmRvKtULEQ3GXbLc3EGiVi5QuSnMRvv2Rf4W8_Ps6B8-c23TjEsD5-8yK2fPw2rfLOUUqRNPFagkvbKpGzpOzS8cgb_xU3EVB7AXNBmhyHeE6mcvYObsBKLHZdMwzYA1ZPi77pEGbsByTfgjYExgt1Dbt-hsZXwX5hYJAQQWNfz0Z7oOGuW88tukYZEBfKlurylCIfzj6e20tSPW9LFe2zlD0r_UvRqGjMMh9J6mVb5fweFI17UjSejB2w8V46Vnrk_cNa6SsCDoraoyzTIi4ci9JXWTjEKlm3v0OMIbedMvD4jv-N5WedXpb-BQAA__8DV3qo) | |
# Sunday, April 12, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1836, General Santa Anna's army captured [Thompson's Ferry](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO4yAUgOHT4C4WDxMcCopt3GXbLa1n87BRMETwNk5uP5q5wlzg_6Xv332-Y0wxb3_xIMfvUOZMZ0vETHXGzNHXkilho9p8_b-1gg_ys5LKXKS-gJo9xvSZdefdIr2FjhyM49VauEnodieNDesqA9BqBq-shSuCNOM4aLotC3bRfcekBgUgB7j1qx6CVHYZTEAD_iq0JB-51J53YnpjC-lTXlT7tRxdcjvzs4nhj1CTUNN5nj23HUtOMVNf6ibUtGP2SykPoSbKXCM1oSbey_FsJbdLoFo_XXX-ecaUYjOj0HI7MKafBf8O5uXUVwAAAP__E9V5VQ) on the Brazos River as Sam Houston's army retreated eastward toward San Jacinto. A monument was erected at the site in 1936. From renewed confidence in [Texas border airspace](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4M4RYIxxQfEad3ntlNYN92KjwWABk4_dj5ItTH2kv_Q7X9f1CiGGtP2Hg2x7-rwmetRIrVFZIbWAJSeKUKlULD9bzfBNuEoudc9VL-SKEOJrVR3aG8dZdGTFNI3zLAwX3W5hdOC4GzQ6cMZJ9OZmNJLxDsWkRRfsO8aVkELwQZiLU4Pncr4N2oMWODLFCUPL5dJ2avSE6uMr36lcXD66aPfWzsqGf0wuTC5tpz3E-N6YXM4cg3sxuSB5SpWYXEYjtTJDf1JqsOXUe4D-o-w_zB62QnRQakwuXbF4PkKMoeqJKb4dED7trv3trbuVvwEAAP__Ypp_1Q) to the long-awaited reopening of [the historic Rainbow Bridge](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2uozAQRp_GdI5s8xcKF9vQZdst0YDHYMXYaDwJ4e1Xua9w60_6dM7595geEGJI61_Y0fLH5ynhWSIyI02QODjKCSMUpOLotZYMT3STUaaTqpHaTA5CvKamcnZWbtAVWt337TDou9LVZtu7dwhLOwy-A_Smrd3c9oh6ML5furoK9numGm20VrW-35am9soMc9156LRrRaPQBc504w0ZP1B8vPIb6bbkvYp2Yz6KqP8IMwozPr3bv4Mw49dEmDHmBaIw4xYKZwqLJAhpzqecKbgVJWdJmA9MsgC_yMElwTNSyjlJKHKHkBgTpAXlSXAUiUDxqsi64wwxhtL1olHrDiH-IPHvQr6t-R8AAP__UjyL5A), today's lineup covers a little bit of everything across the state. Find these stories and more in _The Roundup_ and _Et Cetera_. In case you missed it, this week on _The Flyover Podcast_ , CEO Cole Strehlow unpacked the context and latest developments behind Tucker Carlson and President Trump's public feud. This isn't a minor disagreement, but a high-stakes clash between two of the most powerful voices in conservative media and politics. Cole breaks down what happened, what's been said, and how it all unraveled. [Listen here.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykzz1uwyAUAODT4C0WPDDYA0Olyls6dGk3hMPDoSUmgpcf375qr9ALfNL3cXRHn3La1jd_QUvPWNyGj5aRCKvzG6VQy4bZN6wt1Nvaiv_G4ICDPnB1EOCCT3l3qgt24WESHVphzDBNYuSiO9tTNNKrRQpc-Dh5GLThwZgo9RB0VKJL9hfjSoAQXIqxPykZOUyL1NFrEQamOIZEpfZ0RsKnbzHv5Y61P5VLl-2Z6NqYfGEwM5j3cqNbvyCD-fq1flLO0_GdMzkTk68wQldtuD5SzqlpwxRfLz7lP4n-979b-AkAAP__lgFtpQ) Today's sponsor, [Lemonade Pet Insurance](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvK4zAQRp9G7mJmRvKtULEQ3GXbLc3EGiVi5QuSnMRvv2Rf4W8_Ps6B8-c23TjEsD5-8yK2fPw2rfLOUUqRNPFagkvbKpGzpOzS8cgb_xU3EVB7AXNBmhyHeE6mcvYObsBKLHZdMwzYA1ZPi77pEGbsByTfgjYExgt1Dbt-hsZXwX5hYJAQQWNfz0Z7oOGuW88tukYZEBfKlurylCIfzj6e20tSPW9LFe2zlD0r_UvRqGjMMh9J6mVb5fweFI17UjSejB2w8V46Vnrk_cNa6SsCDoraoyzTIi4ci9JXWTjEKlm3v0OMIbedMvD4jv-N5WedXpb-BQAA__8DV3qo), helps pet owners manage rising vet costs with affordable plans starting around $10/month and flexible coverage designed to protect both your pet's health and your budget.

## Ribbon-Cutting Welcomes New State Park
[Texas leaders held a ribbon-cutting](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOwyAQBNCvwR0WYGzHBcU17nLtldbau05QCFiwF5K_PyW_cPWMnkbzc17O4IOPl2-4k-PnnpZItQRiprxAZI85RQpQKBfMv5eS4Ea4GGUGqazUZkHw4bXYBt2qcNINOT2O_TTpk9LN1fWrOgFtMOCuRtQIuqdeW2Wt3aEbVOPdG1NWG61Vp0_tZrtdmWnthh0Gjb2witBzyi1fiekJZQ-v9KDcbuneBHdlPorovoSZhZlrrW2CBO9QmLkwMAkzw7omZpkOikXuPheWkar8cPJTkgfkm_RRRoIcXpJrkkgbIBVh5iY7PKoPwZdhFFZd7uDDZwD_77aHM38BAAD__86Cg8E) on Friday for Palo Pinto Mountains State Park, marking the first new state park to open in North Texas in more than 25 years and one of the state's largest recent outdoor expansions. Gov. Greg Abbott joined other officials at the [4,871-acre site](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDtuwzAQBU9DdRaWS-pXsAgQqHPalMJau5KJUKJDMv7cPrCRG6QfvMGbz-N0JB_8vn7QJq7clzjtcstBSpE00V48p7hLoCwpc_pZc6Qv4QkB2wPYg8aJyYfHZCt2J-BBV-J01zXDoHvQ1dktRgw0QAYH4I6x6XtaZjsb7uYW7VB59xwDq1FrMLqvZ2sWwOFk2oVazY2yIOxLTHU5S5E75SU84lVSPcetCu5cyiUr86ZwVDiWy43rF1Wv8apwfP7ZhD0pHJMEoSz5iZoxybcy7392kCo5vtx8CD63nbKwbuTDy1H-V-bq8DcAAP__Joh2fA) between Abilene and Dallas-Fort Worth. The park first opened to visitors on March 1 and drew more than 15,000 people in its first month, according to Texas Parks and Wildlife. The former ranchland includes more than 16 miles of trails, a 90-acre lake, campsites, picnic areas, and day-use areas. State officials said the opening is part of a broader push to expand park access as Texas grows. Recent state investments include the voter-approved Centennial Parks Conservation Fund for future park projects.
## FAA Clears Border Anti-Drone Lasers
The FAA said on Friday that [high-energy anti-drone lasers](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2O6yAUxfHV4M4RYIxxQfEad3ntlNYN92KjwWABk4_dj5ItTH2kv_Q7X9f1CiGGtP2Hg2x7-rwmetRIrVFZIbWAJSeKUKlULD9bzfBNuEoudc9VL-SKEOJrVR3aG8dZdGTFNI3zLAwX3W5hdOC4GzQ6cMZJ9OZmNJLxDsWkRRfsO8aVkELwQZiLU4Pncr4N2oMWODLFCUPL5dJ2avSE6uMr36lcXD66aPfWzsqGf0wuTC5tpz3E-N6YXM4cg3sxuSB5SpWYXEYjtTJDf1JqsOXUe4D-o-w_zB62QnRQakwuXbF4PkKMoeqJKb4dED7trv3trbuVvwEAAP__Ypp_1Q) used near the Texas-Mexico border can be deployed safely without disrupting commercial flights. The agreement follows a federal safety review after laser use prompted temporary airspace closures near El Paso earlier this year. The FAA said testing in New Mexico showed the systems do not pose added risk to passenger aircraft when proper safeguards are in place. [The new agreement](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9ygzAMBvCnMZs52xAIg4cubOnakXOw7OjqP5ythvD2PTJ176r7TtL3-7otN4MBk_80ETS9XF4S7DUAEZTFJEJbcoJgKpRqy4-v2XyDXZRQAxc9l2qxBsOx9I3Vd2En2YCW43iZJnkVsnloANFNwo4KnJiu630aRlitg8FelJRubFCfy0QvlZSik9d27Tsn1HTvBmcGaS-sF2CRcmnpAQQvU1048hNKu-bYBP0g2irrPpiamZr3fW8jBiRTDsII9UwxNZ-1mJo3SGR8TnzNyReo5-y8z9QseqZmKf6GnDG8ok_c-AIQIRHPiVvYQj4weX4C8bcQfxPxelSCyBOYwiO8cM1MzU3RdtsxBKzDyHrho8Hwfp7-R_7U6jcAAP__tJGYcQ) outlines procedures for future use, though officials did not release details. The review followed [two incidents in February](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGu2zAMBuDTyBsDSbEdZ9DQxdvr2tFgJCoWnmIZIvOc3L5QeoRuBEjw58c_X8sXppy2-298kJNXLMtGB2cSobrgJinUslFGpsqhPu9c8JvCYrUdQfdg7BIw5ffSd8HddLiajpy5XIbr1UzadKuLFKYw6qgH32sz-puP0zAOYaAw6EBTl1xbpntjjdFnM518f47aXm_nMeJowqB6TSFJqSdZSeiFHPO7_FA9-fLosltFdlbnX8rOys7HcZy-GaU1lZ2bRtl5LzlJ8q1sacrOuld2NlrZOSIC45thr2WnCk8mKBEaHj56-McHWVHa0GMXCvC5BDBV3tET-Fz4WYkhMTBGglgqxJzuq7TUrrqwHynnxONF9fr-wJQ_APm_t_84-zcAAP__hpqZdQ) that briefly halted flights in West Texas, including a shutdown at El Paso International Airport. ## Fort Worth Food Fest Adds New Flavor
The Fort Worth Food + Wine Festival expanded this weekend with [new chef-driven events](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUBeCnwRsRf8HxwNDFW7p2tK65FwcVmwhonPTpK-cVup_zHel8XacrxBS35RNWcu0Z8rTRXhO1RmWCrUUseaMElUrF8rPUDN-EkxLKcmG4VBNCTK_JdOhmgYPsyMm-Pw-DvAjZ3dzsURnfWwX6bPCCFtDPekb0vZDWyy66AxNGKimFlpeTNzoINczaBrASz8wIwthyObUbNXpCDemVH1ROPq9dcrfW7pXpD6ZGpkZtxU61rbDAb9zoyDA1NqiNeA783ecl7zzsYQ_82GZq7IrD-x5TitX2zIhlhZjefvvfKw-n_gIAAP__gRx2_Q), including Saturday's debut of Taste of Texas Row and a new Sunday finale called The Big Brunch. Organizers said the additions were expected to make this year's four-day festival its biggest yet. [Taste of Texas Row](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OwjAQBOCncTojr2PyU7i4Jh3XXhkt2TWxMDGy9wi8_Qle4doZ6Rtpfk7zCWOK2-Ubb-zlGfK88V4Ti3CZcZNIJW-csHKpVH4vNeOVabbGdto4DXYmjOk1u4b82dAIDXvo--M4wmCgWf3Q4wJdQIM4uh5aWBZrezoaouHMxjTRvzHjwAKYFobD4tpg7Hhuu4Ad0FE5wxQll4OsLPzEGtIrP7gclnxrkl9F7lW1X8pOyk5hl-e7UHZiFE0lbtd3nIvoPRdZdciZ9B431oGrxAcm_VF1ybuyU1M83feYUqxdr5y53DCmz5T876CHt38BAAD__6yFe5w) brought together chefs from Fort Worth, Dallas, Austin, Houston, and smaller Texas towns for a statewide culinary showcase at Clearfork. The event featured Michelin-starred chefs, James Beard honorees, and top regional restaurateurs. The festival wraps up today with The Big Brunch, a new closing event featuring coffee, quiche, doughnuts, and other favorites, as organizers highlight Fort Worth's growing dining reputation.

clean_body: Federal Aviation Administration said on Friday that used near the Texas-Mexico border can be deployed safely without disrupting commercial flights. The agreement follows a federal safety review after laser use prompted temporary airspace closures near El Paso earlier this year. | | | | | | Sunday, April 12, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1836, General Santa Anna's army captured on the Brazos River as Sam Houston's army retreated eastward toward San Jacinto. A monument was erected at the site in 1936. From renewed confidence in to the long-awaited reopening of , today's lineup covers a little bit of everything across the state. Find these stories and more in The Roundup and Et Cetera. In case you missed it, this week on The Flyover Podcast , CEO Cole Strehlow unpacked the context and latest developments behind Tucker Carlson and President Trump's public feud. This isn't a minor disagreement, but a high-stakes clash between two of the most powerful voices in conservative media and politics. Cole breaks down what happened, what's been said, and how it all unraveled. Today's sponsor, , helps pet owners manage rising vet costs with affordable plans starting around $10/month and flexible coverage designed to protect both your pet's health and your budget. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog--your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | Ribbon-Cutting Welcomes New State Park on Friday for Palo Pinto Mountains State Park, marking the first new state park to open in North Texas in more than 25 years and one of the state's largest recent outdoor expansions. Gov. Greg Abbott joined other officials at the between Abilene and Dallas-Fort Worth. The park first opened to visitors on March 1 and drew more than 15,000 people in its first month, according to Texas Parks and Wildlife. The former ranchland includes more than 16 miles of trails, a 90-acre lake, campsites, picnic areas, and day-use areas. State officials said the opening is part of a broader push to expand park access as Texas grows. Recent state investments include the voter-approved Centennial Parks Conservation Fund for future park projects. FAA Clears Border Anti-Drone Lasers The FAA said on Friday that used near the Texas-Mexico border can be deployed safely without disrupting commercial flights. The agreement follows a federal safety review after laser use prompted temporary airspace closures near El Paso earlier this year. The FAA said testing in New Mexico showed the systems do not pose added risk to passenger aircraft when proper safeguards are in place. outlines procedures for future use, though officials did not release details. The review followed that briefly halted flights in West Texas, including a shutdown at El Paso International Airport. Federal officials said the updated protocol is meant to address rising drone activity along the southern border while avoiding future travel disruptions. Fort Worth Food Fest Adds New Flavor The Fort Worth Food + Wine Festival expanded this weekend with , including Saturday's debut of Taste of Texas Row and a new Sunday finale called The Big Brunch. Organizers said the additions were expected to make this year's four-day festival its biggest yet. brought together chefs from Fort Worth, Dallas, Austin, Houston, and smaller Texas towns for a statewide culinary showcase at Clearfork. The event featured Michelin-starred chefs, James Beard honorees, and top regional restaurateurs. The festival wraps up today with The Big Brunch, a new closing event featuring coffee, quiche, doughnuts, and other favorites, as organizers highlight Fort Worth's growing dining reputation. | Flying together with our sponsor Get Your Pet Covered Before the Next Vet Visit A single trip to the vet can cost hundreds--or even thousands--when you least expect it. Lemonade pet insurance helps you get ahead of those surprise bills, with to help cover accidents, illnesses, tests, and more. You can also add coverage for routine care like vaccines, spaying, and microchipping, and even save more by bundling or insuring multiple pets. Click below to get your pet covered for as little as $10 a month--before you need it most. | North Texas: Dallas Cowboys' Markquese Bell was arrested Friday on charges of marijuana possession and possession of a controlled substance, according to Collin County jail records. () Lubbock: Layne's Chicken Fingers plans to open a third location after filing permits to renovate a former Arby's on Slide Road, with construction expected to begin in May. () Leander: A woman was sentenced to nearly three years in federal prison after admitting she embezzled more than $1 million from an Austin school for children with special needs and separately underreported her income. () Amarillo: Residents may face delays and confusion using the city's new utility billing system as new account numbers take effect, but officials will waive late fees through May during the transition. () Austin: Officials fired three IT employees, including the chief information security officer, as investigators examine allegations that staff simultaneously held jobs with both Austin and Dallas. () Wichita Falls: A woman was sentenced to six years in prison after admitting she mailed drug-soaked Bibles and other materials to Texas inmates. name: The Maine Wire
subject: Free Community College Made Permanent in Maine
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Free Community College Made Permanent in Maine (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=2bf3aa938f&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Libby Palanza on Apr 11, 2026 02:01 pm
As part of the recently signed supplemental budget, Maine has now made free community college a permanent fixture in the state. In recent years, a pandemic-era program has allowed several classes of graduating high school seniors to attend Maine’s community colleges both tuition- and fee-free. During the first wave of the program, approximately 6,400 students [...]

The post Free Community College Made Permanent in Maine (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=c7b3652dbd&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=d4c7869ff4&e=f093fa355c) .

** Hormuz Heist? Energy Markets Uncertain While Chinese Vessels Get VIP Treatment From Iran (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=5f66142c28&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Maine Wire Staff on Apr 11, 2026 01:31 pm
Under de-facto Iranian control, the Strait of Hormuz’s status remains questionable while the Axis of Autocracy, informally composed of China and Iran, accelerate efforts to devalue the U.S. dollar. Iran controls approximately one-fifth of the world’s oil and natural gas in the Strait of Hormuz, where it recently implemented a new “toll booth” strategy where [...]

** $400,000 Heist Of Maine Beer, Blueberries, Crabs Triggers Federal Indictment (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=108c1fc9b7&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Apr 11, 2026 12:22 pm
A New York man has been indicted for conspiring to steal hundreds of thousands of dollars’ worth of cargo bound for Maine and selling the items for illicit profit, the U.S. attorney announced. The goods allegedly stolen include beer worth $35,200, frozen snow crabs valued at $325,000 and pallets of blueberries. Romoy Forbes, 31, a [...]

The post $400,000 Heist Of Maine Beer, Blueberries, Crabs Triggers Federal Indictment (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=16887614d2&e=f093fa355c) appeared first on The Maine Wire (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=8e81dd47de&e=f093fa355c) .
Read the full story » (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=46ab11c523&e=f093fa355c)

** Portland Press Herald Glosses Over Fear At Maine’s Big City Library, Once An Urban Oasis, Now A Dangerous Drug Den Where Children Are At Risk (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=ab1ed2c20c&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Apr 11, 2026 11:45 am
Maine’s largest paper thought it was breaking news with a story about the huge rise in police calls at the library. But beyond a shallow catalog of police calls, the story never once mentions how this impacts children and families, placing them in literal fear of simply visiting their library. The piece also downplays what [...]

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis**
This might be your only warning...

According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way.

Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent.

And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts.

Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis:

[**"Food shortages are coming."**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22588/6374453/f16aaf9f7364c84f605f31df48f7f198d8635655/b3c6edc12f397ab2b77e34d88ebce20dd9383fe4)

Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months.

The loss will be beyond what you can imagine.

As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.

If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis.

It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food.

Well, no need to worry anymore...

When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits...

You will be able to calmly reassure your family that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat.

[**Click here to secure your own stockpile of best-selling survival food kits.**](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/22588/6374453/f16aaf9f7364c84f605f31df48f7f198d8635655/b3c6edc12f397ab2b77e34d88ebce20dd9383fe4)

When a crisis hits, the masses begin to panic, and grocery stores are wiped out. It quickly becomes every man for himself.

Don't make the mistake of waiting until it is too late.

Stock up now on these survival food kits while you can.

## Join us at the Louisa County GOP Vote No Rally! 🇺🇸

The push for redistricting started with Democrats in New York when they tried to get rid of three Republican seats. But Virginia Democrats keep lying to you about redistricting by saying it started with Texas. The fact is Virginia has a different constitution and Virginia is not New York or Texas. Virginia is at a crossroads. Don't let them take away your voice. Vote NO to unfair maps by April 21. Join us in Louisa County to help us get out the vote.

* When: Today April 9, 2026 | 2:00 PM - 4:00 PM
* Where: Louisa Courthouse Lawn, Louisa, VA

Honored Guests Include:
* Congressman John McGuire
* VA State Senator Luther Cifers
* VA Delegate Buddy Fowler
* John Reid, Host of the Reid Revolution
* David Botkins, State Central Committee Member

*** We will give out more vote NO To Unfair Maps signs. Get Involved: Learn the latest on redistricting and how you can help through door knocking, phone banking, or outreach.
Get involved, VOTE NO, and please tell a friend.
If you want to join Team McGuire and help us help Trump Save America, please contact Ramona Christian at ramona@mcguireva.com or call her at 434 391 4546.

Why Is Gov Spanberger So Unpopular? She Lied

| She said she was a moderate. She lied about redistricting. She lied about making Virginia more affordable. She lied about eliminating the car tax. She lied about standing up to unions. She lied about not coming after gun owners.
---
| Democrat Gerrymandering
---
|
### For the Democrats who say they don't like gerrymandering...
###

Here is a list of States with Zero Republican Representation. In these seven states, Republicans consistently earn between 38% and 48% of the statewide vote but hold 0% of the congressional seats:

* Massachusetts: Despite Republicans receiving roughly 30-35% of the vote in recent cycles, Democrats hold all 9seats.
* Connecticut: Republicans often garner over 40% of the vote, yet Democrats sweep all 5 districts.
* New Mexico: With a Republican vote share near 45%, the state's 3 seats remain entirely in Democratic hands.
* Maine: Even with a significant Republican presence (roughly 45% of the vote), Democrats control bothcongressional seats.
* New Hampshire: Republicans often split the popular vote nearly evenly (approx. 47-48%), but Democrats hold both of the state's 2 seats.
* Rhode Island: With approximately 38-42% of the vote, Republicans have zero of the state's 2 seats.
* Hawaii: Republicans hold roughly 30% of the vote but have no representation among the 2 congressional seats.

---
| "We Got Him" An Easter Miracle
---
| |
---
| To my Navy SEAL brothers, PJs, Army Special Forces, Night Stalkers, and our Intel and Cyber teams, as well as every individual involved: congratulations on a display of unparalleled teamwork and excellence.
"The Mission Timeline:
* Good Friday: Shot down behind enemy lines.
* Saturday: Concealed in the shadows of a cave crevice, evading capture.
* Easter Sunday: Rescued and flown out of Iran just as the sun began to rise.

A pilot reborn. Every soul home and accounted for. A nation stands in celebration. God is good."
-- Pete Hegseth, Secretary of War
(Photo is an AI artist rendition)
---
| 2 Bills Passed in 3 Weeks!
---
|

We all know results matter and talk is cheap. I'm proud to announce that Team McGuire has successfully passed two critical bills through the House with bipartisan support in just three weeks.
The Wintergreen Emergency Egress Act For 25 years, this issue remained unsolved, with six different past congressional offices in the 5th attempting to find a fix. By the grace of God, my team and I passed this bill out of the House in just six months.
The Make the District of Columbia Safe and Beautiful Act This bill codifies President Trumps Executive Order to keep D.C. safe and beautiful. Constituents from my district travel to D.C. everyday for work and leisure. These folks and all who visit deserve a safe capitol.
We are proving with the right work ethic and a commitment to working as a team, we can get Washington working again.
More success for you to announce soon. Thank you for allowing me to serve and thank you for your continued support!
