body:
The threat is real. Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there.

| | | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3DAUhZ9G7mT0Z3m2UBGyDKTYlElptNId64ItOVfXDvP2YQJ5gHSnOBy-8_38WD4ibljX73GHkC5cqC-4xxUrcMGO3EsjwscT67oYZbxUTmrzqukhh5S9NQMEPc_T25vXehpKiJPX1t-ye4BS2qas_JSMAmWTy9reBgyvJeW00UZP2o4up8dN6888uznNcBNOnUeODH1MrXagKzJegLW2V2p1TG0ftlCYjy7sF2Huwtxzq5Fh7PECLnAAdUgnQ06FsDPG2sdGqzD3FImeEmIqsnEB6vLzpAy1y19avg7zcsijHcLeT94XTsK-f_3xTf6jFsYTpJMI6yrsO9MJA4V8_MZtw-5n4dS6R9z-UvJ_a72C-RMAAP__OlSIhA)
---
Dear Faithful Friend, **Imagine this:** A man steps outside his own home in a quiet neighborhood. Suddenly, violence erupts, his kneecap shattered in a brutal attack. His car torched. His family terrorized for years, children taunted with slurs in the streets, living under police protection for nearly a decade. This isn't a scene from some distant war zone. **This happened in Bradford, England – to Nissar Hussain.** **His only "crime"? Leaving Islam and embracing Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior.** For 17 years, Nissar endured relentless persecution from his former community. The Church of England? _**SILENT.**_ Not one bishop stood with him or his family. **But Save the Persecuted Christians, where I’m proud to serve as a board member, refused to stand by. We brought Nissar here to the U.S. to help him share his story, and he is now fighting back boldly – in part by pursuing a groundbreaking legal case against 11 countries that still mandate death for apostasy. ** [**Your support has amplified his voice and his mission to expose this evil.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3DAUhZ9G7mT0Z3m2UBGyDKTYlElptNId64ItOVfXDvP2YQJ5gHSnOBy-8_38WD4ibljX73GHkC5cqC-4xxUrcMGO3EsjwscT67oYZbxUTmrzqukhh5S9NQMEPc_T25vXehpKiJPX1t-ye4BS2qas_JSMAmWTy9reBgyvJeW00UZP2o4up8dN6888uznNcBNOnUeODH1MrXagKzJegLW2V2p1TG0ftlCYjy7sF2Huwtxzq5Fh7PECLnAAdUgnQ06FsDPG2sdGqzD3FImeEmIqsnEB6vLzpAy1y19avg7zcsijHcLeT94XTsK-f_3xTf6jFsYTpJMI6yrsO9MJA4V8_MZtw-5n4dS6R9z-UvJ_a72C-RMAAP__OlSIhA) Nissar's story is heartbreaking, but it's not isolated. Over 380 million Christians face severe persecution globally, and the numbers are growing. _**In Iran, 254 believers were arrested**_ in 2025 alone for simply practicing their faith, escalating further amid the regime's war on Christians. _**In Nigeria, thousands have been slaughtered**_ by Islamist militants: entire villages massacred, girls held captive for years, all because they refused to deny Christ. _**In Pakistan, blasphemy laws **_are twisted to destroy Christian lives. _**In North Korea, owning a Bible**_ can mean a lifetime in a labor camp. **It is for all of these reasons that Save the Persecuted Christians is relentlessly educating Americans and rallying the faithful to recognize the threat before it takes deeper root here.** A powerful example: Our ongoing education and advocacy efforts helped fuel the overwhelming success on March 3, when **95% of Texas Republican primary voters stood up and voted to ban Sharia law** – sending a clear, faithful message: We will not let this ideology gain a foothold in America and threaten our freedoms or our persecuted brothers and sisters in Christ. **The threat is real.** _Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there._ We must be extra vigilant, and **we need your help right now** to keep pushing back. [**Q1 ends at midnight on March 31, and we’ve set a goal of 1,000 individual donations from believers across America to sustain this vital work. Will you be one of them today?**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3DAUhZ9G7mT0Z3m2UBGyDKTYlElptNId64ItOVfXDvP2YQJ5gHSnOBy-8_38WD4ibljX73GHkC5cqC-4xxUrcMGO3EsjwscT67oYZbxUTmrzqukhh5S9NQMEPc_T25vXehpKiJPX1t-ye4BS2qas_JSMAmWTy9reBgyvJeW00UZP2o4up8dN6888uznNcBNOnUeODH1MrXagKzJegLW2V2p1TG0ftlCYjy7sF2Huwtxzq5Fh7PECLnAAdUgnQ06FsDPG2sdGqzD3FImeEmIqsnEB6vLzpAy1y19avg7zcsijHcLeT94XTsK-f_3xTf6jFsYTpJMI6yrsO9MJA4V8_MZtw-5n4dS6R9z-UvJ_a72C-RMAAP__OlSIhA)
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3DAUhZ9G7mT0Z3m2UBGyDKTYlElptNId64ItOVfXDvP2YQJ5gHSnOBy-8_38WD4ibljX73GHkC5cqC-4xxUrcMGO3EsjwscT67oYZbxUTmrzqukhh5S9NQMEPc_T25vXehpKiJPX1t-ye4BS2qas_JSMAmWTy9reBgyvJeW00UZP2o4up8dN6888uznNcBNOnUeODH1MrXagKzJegLW2V2p1TG0ftlCYjy7sF2Huwtxzq5Fh7PECLnAAdUgnQ06FsDPG2sdGqzD3FImeEmIqsnEB6vLzpAy1y19avg7zcsijHcLeT94XTsK-f_3xTf6jFsYTpJMI6yrsO9MJA4V8_MZtw-5n4dS6R9z-UvJ_a72C-RMAAP__OlSIhA)
---
Your gift, especially a monthly commitment through The Defenders Guild, multiplies our impact and sustains the fight against this growing evil. [**Click here to give and carry the burden with us.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3DAUhZ9G7mT0Z3m2UBGyDKTYlElptNId64ItOVfXDvP2YQJ5gHSnOBy-8_38WD4ibljX73GHkC5cqC-4xxUrcMGO3EsjwscT67oYZbxUTmrzqukhh5S9NQMEPc_T25vXehpKiJPX1t-ye4BS2qas_JSMAmWTy9reBgyvJeW00UZP2o4up8dN6888uznNcBNOnUeODH1MrXagKzJegLW2V2p1TG0ftlCYjy7sF2Huwtxzq5Fh7PECLnAAdUgnQ06FsDPG2sdGqzD3FImeEmIqsnEB6vLzpAy1y19avg7zcsijHcLeT94XTsK-f_3xTf6jFsYTpJMI6yrsO9MJA4V8_MZtw-5n4dS6R9z-UvJ_a72C-RMAAP__OlSIhA) [**From media campaigns to conferences and everything in between, I’ve seen firsthand how effectively and tirelessly Save the Persecuted Christians guides a coalition of 200+ leaders in order to expose evil and rally the Church – and any support you can offer is well-placed.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3DAUhZ9G7mT0Z3m2UBGyDKTYlElptNId64ItOVfXDvP2YQJ5gHSnOBy-8_38WD4ibljX73GHkC5cqC-4xxUrcMGO3EsjwscT67oYZbxUTmrzqukhh5S9NQMEPc_T25vXehpKiJPX1t-ye4BS2qas_JSMAmWTy9reBgyvJeW00UZP2o4up8dN6888uznNcBNOnUeODH1MrXagKzJegLW2V2p1TG0ftlCYjy7sF2Huwtxzq5Fh7PECLnAAdUgnQ06FsDPG2sdGqzD3FImeEmIqsnEB6vLzpAy1y19avg7zcsijHcLeT94XTsK-f_3xTf6jFsYTpJMI6yrsO9MJA4V8_MZtw-5n4dS6R9z-UvJ_a72C-RMAAP__OlSIhA) **Paul wrote in Galatians 6:2, **_**“Carry each other’s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.”**_ **That is our mandate as the Body of Christ.** The Church must rise in one spirit, refusing silence in the face of darkness. Thank you for your faithfulness and courage in this hour. In Christ,
---
---
Eric Metaxas Member, Board of Directors Save the Persecuted Christians

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: I miss you, Peter...
body:
I’d really appreciate it if you opened this email

| | | | Alright, Peter, I’m just going to cut to the chase and say it: I MISS YOU!
For years, you’ve stood by me: stepping in when I needed it most and even generously contributing your hard-earned money to advance our conservative agenda.
**_And now, Peter, I’m asking you to stand with me once more... because this fight is far from over!_****_
_**Together, we were victorious in 2024, but as we head into the midterms, we will need to work twice as hard to maintain our Republican majority and continue providing President Trump with the fuel he needs to Make America Great Again.
Can I count on you again, Peter?

name: VoteVets
subject: The end of Trump’s presidency
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It's a crazy world out there, and we're trying to do our part to restore some sanity.
#
If Democrats are going to flip the Senate — and effectively end Trump's presidency — then we are going to have to win a lot of tough races.
Think about the states: North Carolina, Ohio, Alaska, Texas, Maine, Iowa, Florida — these are all states with Republican Senators and many of them recently won by Trump.
Cycle after cycle, when Democrats need to win the tough ones — VoteVets gets the call. Think about the states we carried last cycle, even when Donald Trump won there: Michigan, Arizona ... Veteran candidates ... VoteVets support.
This election is going to be one of the most important in modern American history. Is an imperial president going to get two more years of unchecked power? Or are we going to stop him?
VoteVets will be right at the center of stopping him. Our ads are the most effective. They speak to the centrists, moderates, and independents we need to win. They cut through. They are trusted messengers. Our ONLY limitation is resources.
And because we're talking about some big and expensive states, it means we have to ask. And hopefully — with everything going on in the world — today is a day you feel the desire to DO SOMETHING to stop Trump.
[**So please: contribute $5, $10, $50 to VoteVets today. We will put your donation to work flipping the races, seats and states we need in order to take back Congress and effectively end Donald Trump's presidency.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr26.8SLh3X&refcode=em260411-1-120&t=1&akid=35074%2E3013755%2EuhS-T5)

name: Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: A very well-timed donation to Jon’s reelection campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
First, it will require a candidate who can inspire and energize people all over the state.

**How do we win this November?**
It’s going to require two main ingredients.
First, it will require a candidate who can connect with, inspire, and energize people all over the state.
We’ve got that in Jon Ossoff. I travel with him across the state, watch him talk to people and how he _listens_ , and know in my heart that if we can get Jon’s message out (and rise above the dark money attacks), we are going to win this race.
That leads me to the second thing we need to win this race: A massive grassroots coalition — _the largest in Georgia political campaign history_ — to identify voters and turn them out to the polls.
Campaigning this way is hard, and it’s expensive. You have to reach people all across a large, diverse state, and you have to do it _over_ and _over_ again.
But it is the work that will reelect Jon Ossoff, and we can’t back down from it. Especially now that one of the biggest GOP Super PACs _just_ announced they plan to spend more than $40 million in Georgia alone.
**So please, I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t so important:**
[**Can you use this link to make a well-timed donation to Jon’s reelection campaign? We will put every donation directly to work organizing and mobilizing voters across Georgia.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260412-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=2058%2E5691347%2Elr7u85)
**[DONATE NOW](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260412-1-subs-b&t=2&akid=2058%2E5691347%2Elr7u85)**
Thank you so much, Peter. Every donation, every dollar, everything you do to support this campaign, it all brings us one step closer to victory in November.
Gratefully,
Ellen
Campaign Manager
Jon Ossoff for Senate

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=2058%2E5691347%2Elr7u85) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2058%2E5691347%2Elr7u85) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

body:
Hey Derek, it’s Josh Shapiro — and I’ll be honest: This email is going to look a little different. [_**But if you’re in a hurry, and you’re ready to win this jump ball of an election on November 3rd, I hope you’ll shoot me a few bucks ahead of our big fundraising deadline on Wednesday night.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129309855/613921128/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_041226_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjI4MzZkZC03NTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uLLXsXVaCVCp_AdqMbY5WzXzpXR1unBdoU1EC_wD0o=) Listen, if you had told me in 1991 that I’d be writing a campaign email about my ‘91 high school basketball season, I never would have believed you. But a recent trip down memory lane has got me thinking... I remember getting ready for my first game of the 1991 season. All of us on the team had high expectations that year — we were experienced, prepared, and ready to prove ourselves. Myself? I was the starting point guard. But scoring wasn’t on the top of my mind. Really, I loved the games when I racked up more assists than points. I was there to set my teammates up — to bring the ball up, kick it out to the open man, and run some damn effective pick-and-rolls. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129309856/613921129/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_041226_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjI4MzZkZC03NTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uLLXsXVaCVCp_AdqMbY5WzXzpXR1unBdoU1EC_wD0o=) _Yes, I’m the shorter one..._ I knew we had a good team that year. And I knew our opponents would underestimate us. So we took advantage, Derek — we went 25-3 that year, and even won our league championship. Thinking about it now, I see so many parallels between that team, and the team we’ve built today for this reelection campaign. We’re tough. We’re scrappy. And frankly, we’re a little underestimated. But that’s right where I want to be. **Here’s the thing: A lot of folks think basketball games (and elections!) are decided only in the final 30 seconds. But what really matters is every possession beforehand: Passing up a tough shot to drive to the lane. The defensive adjustments you make at halftime. The unselfish extra pass to your wide open teammate.** Those small, seemingly insignificant plays win games, Derek — and this election is no different. [_**I know a $5, $10, or $25 donation doesn’t seem like much — just like a routine lay-up in the second quarter of a competitive game. But on Election Day, when the outcome is down to the wire, we’ll look back on those lay-ups and those donations — and know that they made a difference. Please, will you chip in?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129309857/613921130/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_041226_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjI4MzZkZC03NTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uLLXsXVaCVCp_AdqMbY5WzXzpXR1unBdoU1EC_wD0o=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129309858/613921131/-1368017556?amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&refcode=email_041226_basketball&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjI4MzZkZC03NTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2uLLXsXVaCVCp_AdqMbY5WzXzpXR1unBdoU1EC_wD0o=)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is exactly how they want us to feel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I know we can defy the odds and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue for the first time since 2008 – but it won’t be easy.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
| | | |
---
Peter,

It’s easy to read the news these days and feel hopeless.
President Trump and his Republican allies are on a tear. They’re driving our country towards more chaos and division, and they scheme to make it hard to know where to begin to stop them.
_But that’s exactly how they want us to feel._ They want us to acquiesce. To do nothing. To stay at home this November.
**To that, I say tough luck.**
I know we can defy the odds and flip North Carolina’s Senate seat blue for the first time since 2008 – but it won’t be easy. Democrats have no chance to take back the Senate without winning this race, so the GOP is putting millions behind attack ads to defeat me. **Those attacks are working: A recent poll shows this race statistically tied.**
**[The only way I can fight back and win is with your critical grassroots support. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 to my campaign today – so together, we can win in North Carolina, take back the Senate and return power to the people?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8622?t=8&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8623?t=9&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8624?t=10&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8625?t=11&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8626?t=12&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
I’m a prisoner of hope, Peter. Today, I’m hoping you’ll join me.

Roy Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=1005%2E124072%2EZfbWns)

name: Team Vivek
subject: Do you still support Vivek?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek Ramaswamy and Rob McColley for Ohio

clean_body: | | = Peter, I want you to hear this directly from me. The national far-right machine that props up extremists like Derrick Van Orden with dark money just launched a new round of attacks against me. That doesn’t happen unless they’re worried. They see what you and I see every day. This race that’s close, WI-03 is a district that’s ready for change, and this is a working‐class campaign that’s building real momentum. They know Derrick Van Orden can’t run on his record, so they’re doing what they always do: lying, smearing, and hoping money will drown out the truth. I’m not running because this is easy. I’m running because our district deserves better than intimidation politics. But pushing back takes resources, and unlike Van Orden, I don’t have corporate PAC money to fall back on. If we’re able to flip this seat, it would go a long way toward bringing working folks a seat back at the table. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Every dollar helps us set the record straight, reach voters where they are, and show them that WI‐03 isn’t for sale. Thank you for standing with me when it matters, Peter. I won’t back down. With your help, neither will this campaign. Rebecca * If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: What a week! 😬
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, organizetexas
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640]
Peter,
If this past week proved anything, it’s that Donald Trump is out of his mind and out of control.
Instead of fighting to lower costs, he’s fighting to make it harder to vote [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/trump-mail-in-voting-lawsuit/] while threatening to annihilate entire countries [https://apnews.com/article/trump-iran-threats-civilization-war-crimes-758eb5cd680d7d275c4e1c38b2e01e6d] .
And if he continues to have his way without a shred of accountability, our democracy is done for.
We’re not about to accept that. We’re here to fight back, put Trump in check, and build a future ALL Texans deserve. Are you with us?
CHIP IN NOW to help TOP PAC turn out more Texans in the midterms! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640]
Democracy isn’t a spectator sport. It takes EVERYONE contributing and working together to move us forward, with EVERY person – no matter their age, race, gender, faith, or income – playing a role.
Unwavering solidarity coupled with tireless outreach is how we’ll power past MAGA and win BIG in November.
DONATE to provide us with the resources we need to move more voters to the polls! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640]
Between now and the midterm, Trump is going to Trump (a.k.a. “flood the zone” [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Flood_the_zone] ). It’s on US to stay united and focused (apply Critical Ignoring! [https://theweek.com/tech/critical-ignoring-ai-slop-internet] ) so that our movement can deal MAGA a resounding blow this fall.
Let’s get to it,
– Texas Organizing Project PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatAWeek&amount=10.00&refcode2=906c2806-7836-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640]

name: Senate Republican Fund
subject: Trump called in to say this personally.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Trump called into Fox News to sound the alarm. The Senate majority is everything — and it's not guaranteed. |
Fellow American,

Trump called into The Five on Fox News and said it plain:

**"We have to keep the majority, otherwise all of the things we've done are going to go down the tubes."**

That's it. That's the whole stakes of 2026.

Every Senate seat matters — even the ones we've fought over. Even the complicated ones. Because without the majority, none of it holds.

Are you committed to helping Senate Republicans hold the line in 2026?

[ **>> Tell us you're in — and chip in to protect the majority!** ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=70f9d3089384421586be1692fc6f3041&_e=u6HRG3acO0MhH-SJ3TU2PWr_Oibi4Tz8N8zbtrMOdTnMWniqlydUBlAzMzsTMk-ybBfAuYwvrXAxs-8RpCwuqMjCiNh9PV2pRksVnHjG84frJkmCFsMuvmh8kIurbLsMqqQkuw21bG-nqZ-7wv8-JMBYXApvuojf1sL5449WZY457QW5P01KwSU9ym3y41roYg55r3n2yoidzkjda1e9jK6fDWkbvBdNlf3ZNFy-mS7794FqfvXzQXIoWipHljv93bsURYm8joh8fmsJXbOxhh_NcBnJxpdsrifP9ezfZD34ygzmgj_dmj8vpCMDAevmsCvydOMCJ_wtsBXDj7ZubRjxLR2t2AmEkDxlM32nReBtcvVruGV7nIXHKmyxe4XdOq4ejTFYg_8dCT_J1AUjFFmcEsoTo7WiFXQfU8JZua1OLOO5ltJEv_mhoQc5CP-WmQjonp7qfc8vWoXR67Jh81B4HzDgLuLnDAIyxz7FBHiCTY5GQ_dMCkIaNG7Kxj00FIwItzCyS2u9I89nZqD6k_NNCWCJNanG7KihcUrmH_irXTYFI1TroeCKwvPtT8lWPscoHWtBUcA-QXU_mdNfflG5z0gb6MzdtyxuS70sTmczq3dJT0qMdd_O2aFg_oxeRlMoAoWr_4x2IPlguES7zntxp9aRcXhgOhehq_EcVLOdp2eiimZnjslOZFHjtmGor9ZeuKeDSnn2QKE95OsPkasj8W--U9F9PohHZTr-SeX0EH3NA-bFrXjQTFbyUyhPWFJGoW9biJKrFr5rV9gQ2RSb6tR4lAicTVJ9d_TcGrN-mKu34GBD2KhVb0LTPPsk6yi_WuWO8L0rad-ozGAearn-Jjtcd6MB14OLbBuFod1xqamjai5HYeMCjCtzIOF6mojZlQOHb_XWvhSyg2fqCA%3D%3D)

subject: This campaign is powered by people

body:
not billionaires and insiders

---
Friend, it's no secret that folks like you keep this campaign running.

That's why our Grassroots Donor Wall in HQ is covered with names of donors — **and it serves as a permanent reminder that our movement is powered by people, not billionaires and insiders**. ** _And, friend, I want your name on our wall._**
_[**Will you make a donation now to help me become the next governor of New Mexico and secure your spot on our Grassroots Donor Wall?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7301?refcode=jtk563-fr-nd&t=2&akid=8887%2E400544%2E87cZwu)_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7302?refcode=jtk563-fr-nd&t=3&akid=8887%2E400544%2E87cZwu)
---
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7302?refcode=jtk563-fr-nd&t=4&akid=8887%2E400544%2E87cZwu)
Here's the thing, friend: All eyes are on our race in New Mexico.

Fox News just called our race one of the GOP's top pickup opportunities, and on top of that, THREE Republicans are running against me in hopes of bringing their extreme agenda into our state.

**MAGA billionaires are already lining up to spend whatever it takes to buy this seat and flip our state red.**
_But we can't let that happen.
_
**The fight ahead will be tough — but when supporters like you pitch in, we can build something they can’t match: a people-powered campaign that reaches every corner of New Mexico. So please:****_[Chip in whatever you can spare today to add your name to our Grassroots Donor Wall and help keep New Mexico blue!](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7301?refcode=jtk563-fr-nd&t=5&akid=8887%2E400544%2E87cZwu)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7302?refcode=jtk563-fr-nd&t=6&akid=8887%2E400544%2E87cZwu)
---
Be fierce,

Deb

clean_body: The work has already begun, but April is crucial for laying the foundation we need to be ready for the months ahead. | = | Peter, We are starting April strong, but we need your help to keep up the momentum. This month, we’re aiming for an ambitious $50,000 goal , and every dollar raised will help us prepare for a tough and competitive primary against billionaire David Trone. The work has already begun, but April is crucial for laying the foundation we need to be ready for the months ahead. With everything at stake, we need supporters like you stepping up now more than ever. = This primary is going to be expensive, and it’s critical that we hit this $50,000 goal to ensure we can stand strong and fight for the issues that matter. Early support like yours helps us reach voters, build our team, and stay organized as we move forward. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for being part of this effort. name: Jose Javier Rodriguez
subject: Do you know what a People's Lawyer does?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ, DEMOCRAT, FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
Let me explain. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129315312/613935630/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_PeoplesLawyer_041226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA5YmUwMjQtN2MzNi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=srZGMUx2XiPlOAD3DUn3B6oTADquisYDCdsF21YGTRk=&emci=8da2ba66-1b35-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=109be024-7c36-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=32374386)

Hey Peter, You'll often hear me talk about becoming the "People's Lawyer," but do you know why I use that phrase? Many people aren’t sure who the Attorney General represents. They think the job is just about working with state agencies and the legislature. And, as your next Attorney General, of course, I’ll do that. **But as Attorney General, I’ll be an advocate for the people of Florida — not the government, special interests, or politicians. So for me, “the People’s Lawyer” is not just a slogan — it’s the job description.** I’ll be Florida’s advocate for the public interest. That means defending the rights of everyday Floridians, standing up for working families being squeezed by corruption and rising costs, and protecting our communities from powerful interests that think they can get away with anything. The Attorney General has real power to make a difference — to defend civil rights, investigate fraud, hold corrupt corporations accountable, and protect the people of our state. That’s why this race matters so much. **Florida needs an Attorney General who will fight for the public, not the powerful.** That’s the kind of leader I’m running to be. But I can’t win this fight alone. **[We’re building a movement to take our state back from corrupt special interests, and it’s going to take all of us. Will you chip in a few dollars today to help me become the People’s Lawyer Florida needs?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129315313/613935631/-2029901958?refcode=em_JJR_FR_PeoplesLawyer_041226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA5YmUwMjQtN2MzNi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=srZGMUx2XiPlOAD3DUn3B6oTADquisYDCdsF21YGTRk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129315314/613935632/-2029901958?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_PeoplesLawyer_041226&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA5YmUwMjQtN2MzNi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=srZGMUx2XiPlOAD3DUn3B6oTADquisYDCdsF21YGTRk=) **

name: Mark Warner
subject: Tax Day looks different this year for the 1%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129315461/613935912/-672863980?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TaxDay_260412_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjliZTAyNC03YzM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JSEGYYCjyyCoOijjjgpDyYMIH0oKOzylLnmdxau1YUg=) Derek,

Tax Day is this week. Across the country, Americans are filing their 2025 returns and taking stock of their finances.

Before I was a senator, I spent my career in business looking at the bottom line and seeing how things add up. It’s safe to say I’m a numbers guy.

**That’s why as Tax Day rolls around, all I can think about is the massive kickbacks the wealthiest Americans will receive after filing – all thanks to Trump, Congressional Republicans, and their disastrous Big Ugly Bill.**

In fact, the top 1% of the wealthiest Americans are estimated to get a _**$1 TRILLION**_ tax cut over the next decade because of Trump’s bill. But everyday working families? They’re getting screwed.

In order to pay for these huge tax cuts for the richest few, Trump slashed funding for life-saving programs like SNAP, cutting off food assistance from millions of folks in need. It crippled our rural hospitals, putting _ten_ hospitals at risk of closure right here in Virginia. It kicked millions of Americans off Medicaid and left hundreds of thousands of Virginians without health care access.

**Frankly, it’s appalling. Trump and his Republicans knew this bill was cruel and reckless, yet they passed it anyway.**

The good news is, this November, we have the chance to elect Democrats who will actually fight on the side of working families – and what happens here in Virginia could be what turns the tide. [_**That’s why I’m asking: will you pitch in to my campaign? Every little bit helps Democrats win the midterm elections and put some overdue guardrails on this president and administration.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129315462/613935913/-672863980?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TaxDay_260412_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjliZTAyNC03YzM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JSEGYYCjyyCoOijjjgpDyYMIH0oKOzylLnmdxau1YUg=) The good news is, this November, we have the chance to elect Democrats who will actually fight on the side of working families – and what happens here in Virginia could be what turns the tide. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The fight continues, Mark Warner Before you go: We’re asking people like you – who care deeply about our democracy and the future of our country – to join us in our fight to help Democrats win the midterms and bring accountability and transparency to Washington. =****** | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Laura Gillen
subject: “it would be the end of the Trump presidency”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
That's the Speaker of the House admitting out loud what we already know: this midterm is a referendum on everything Trump has done and everything he still wants to do.

| Peter,

I don't usually quote Mike Johnson but he said something important recently:
---
| | **"If we lost the midterms — heaven forbid, if we lost the majority in the House — it would be the end of the Trump presidency in a real effect."**
---
That's the Speaker of the House admitting out loud what we already know: this midterm is a referendum on everything Trump has done and everything he still wants to do.

But Republicans aren't sitting still. Trump has a $300 million super PAC. Outside groups are already polling races and writing checks. The NRCC has seats like mine at the top of their list. They are going to spend whatever it takes to hold this majority.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Whataburger
body:
I’m foreseeing quite a few more Whataburger stops in this campaign.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
There is nothing better at the end of a long day on the campaign trail than a trip to Whataburger. It’s an iconic Texas staple, and always a good place for a quick bite.
[](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1797?c0=em_ms_gh_20260412_1_whataburger.5F_M1H&refcode=em20260412-909&t=1&akid=909%2E299639%2EfWt2WX)
**We’ve still got about seven months until Election Day, so I can already foresee a few (or a lot?) more stops at Whataburger over the course of this campaign.**
I don’t have Greg Abbott’s mega-millions behind me, but I don’t need that. I know we can win this race with real grassroots support from people ready for a change.
With that support, we can visit Texans all over the state and share our message about the better future that is possible for Texas if we turn the page on Abbott.
And we can stop at Whataburger after to refuel and do it all again the next day.
**[Will you donate $13 — the average cost of a combo at Whataburger — now to help keep my campaign on the road meeting voters in every corner of Texas?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1797?c0=em_ms_gh_20260412_1_whataburger.5F_M1H&refcode=em20260412-909&t=2&akid=909%2E299639%2EfWt2WX)**
[Donate $13 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1797?c0=em_ms_gh_20260412_1_whataburger.5F_M1H&refcode=em20260412-909&t=21&akid=909%2E299639%2EfWt2WX)
Thank you,
Gina Hinojosa

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260412-1-b1&t=23&refcode2=909_299639_fWt2WX&akid=909%2E299639%2EfWt2WX)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260412-1-b2&recurring=1&t=24&refcode2=909_299639_fWt2WX&akid=909%2E299639%2EfWt2WX)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=25&akid=909%2E299639%2EfWt2WX)

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point PAC
subject: We can win the election BEFORE election day…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
One proven program that can decide the midterms.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Turning Point PAC | | | | | [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
---
| | Hey Patriot,
---
Here’s the deal...
We’re now just months away from **the most consequential midterm cycle** of our lifetime.
**Democrats smell blood.**
They’re pouring everything into regaining Congress so they can reopen the border, raise your taxes, and dismantle the America First agenda one piece at a time.
**Complacency is not an option.**
Turning Point PAC is not waiting. We are the only major conservative force that has already proven it can win the early-vote war that decides modern elections.
[ ](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
The Chase the Vote operation deployed thousands of ballot chasers across every battleground.
They didn’t just knock doors, they built real relationships, helped conservatives return their ballots, and put hundreds of thousands of votes on the board before Election Day.
_That work helped secure the White House and showed Republicans how to win the mail-in game._
For 2026 we’re expanding even bigger: full-time chasers already active, Super Chase neighborhood events rolling, and a growing list of endorsed America First champions who will protect our Congressional majority.
**Turning Point PAC is the organization that funds these exact programs.**
Your support directly powers the ballot-chasing army and the candidates who will stand with President Trump.
The ground war has already started. The Left is moving. Let’s make sure conservatives show up bigger, earlier, and stronger.
**[Chip in to Turning Point PAC right now and help lock in the wins long before election day>>](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDR9AAwAAAAAAAKM8EBzg0sqsXdsySB_xTaSRu48wOa4reUNgGvblowdEaFg7ZIEqrCUFhvvClBGW7vi76H66yqoQLlUhGzKjOmZh0rhq3haRf9EFiQDOA)**

[DONATE $50](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $100](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NDR9AAwAAAAAAAKM8EB00cCPqMTbpDdvsXlRVagVT0RFhzl_yk9OdxPTHhdRjNAVRMKJGxbbAcujpZJUV4GqEDuW_r0uDBwgeKYK8QFCVNZb2p6aKza9NA)
[DONATE $250](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $500](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)
[DONATE $1,000](https://click.parlermailer.com/?%3D%3D)

Thank you for being in this fight,
Tyler Bowyer
Executive Director, Turning Point PAC
|
---
Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
| | **_Paid for by Turning Point PAC_**

name: David Hogg
subject: I’m turning 26 today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
The best way to celebrate? Elect more young leaders.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260412-1&t=1&akid=3362%2E587540%2EyZQLms)
**It’s my birthday, Peter! I just turned 26 today. 🥳**
It’s been an incredible week, and I’m truly grateful to everyone who reached out to celebrate with me. It means a lot to be surrounded by friends, family, and teammates like you who are part of this powerful movement we’re building here together.
I said the same thing last year, but I don’t need any birthday gifts or greeting cards. I’ve got something else in mind. Something that will actually make a difference.
Since we launched **Leaders We Deserve** , we’ve been working around the clock to build a powerful, grassroots-funded organization dedicated to electing the next generation of leaders. I’m putting everything I’ve got into this work day after day because I believe this is a bellwether moment for our democracy and our future.
**We need _MORE_ Millennial and Gen Z voices in the rooms where decisions are made — and with _YOUR_ help, we’re making that happen.**
The work we’re doing together means everything to me, and I can’t think of a better birthday present than seeing people like you step up and join this fight.
So if you’re looking for a way to fight back, to invest in our future, and to show what this movement is made of, this is our moment to show our strength. **[Peter, will you pitch in $5 now to join our movement and fight for our future?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260412_1_birthday.zjRPBR&refcode=em20260412-3362&amount=5&t=2&akid=3362%2E587540%2EyZQLms)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260412_1_birthday.zjRPBR&amount=5&refcode=em20260412-3362&t=21&akid=3362%2E587540%2EyZQLms)**
Thank you for everything, truly.
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
P.S. We are building a lasting movement together that is bigger than any one election. **[So for my 26th birthday, I have to ask — can you commit to a $26 monthly donation to power our work?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/5200?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260412_1_birthday.lRdFOm&refcode=em20260412-3362&t=22&akid=3362%2E587540%2EyZQLms)**
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/5200?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260412_1_birthday.lRdFOm&refcode=em20260412-3362&t=23&akid=3362%2E587540%2EyZQLms)
* * *

clean_body: The best way to celebrate? Elect more young leaders. It’s my birthday, Peter! I just turned 26 today. 🥳 It’s been an incredible week, and I’m truly grateful to everyone who reached out to celebrate with me. It means a lot to be surrounded by friends, family, and teammates like you who are part of this powerful movement we’re building here together. I said the same thing last year, but I don’t need any birthday gifts or greeting cards. I’ve got something else in mind. Something that will actually make a difference. Since we launched Leaders We Deserve , we’ve been working around the clock to build a powerful, grassroots-funded organization dedicated to electing the next generation of leaders. I’m putting everything I’ve got into this work day after day because I believe this is a bellwether moment for our democracy and our future. We need MORE Millennial and Gen Z voices in the rooms where decisions are made — and with YOUR help, we’re making that happen. The work we’re doing together means everything to me, and I can’t think of a better birthday present than seeing people like you step up and join this fight. So if you’re looking for a way to fight back, to invest in our future, and to show what this movement is made of, this is our moment to show our strength. Thank you for everything, truly. David Hogg Leaders We Deserve P.S. We are building a lasting movement together that is bigger than any one election.

name: Virginians For Fair Elections
subject: We can’t ignore these numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260412-457&t=1&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_1.YWC9nx&amount=3&refcode=20260412-457&t=2&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
In some parts of Virginia, turnout is higher in Republican-led areas right now. That tells us MAGA Republicans are showing up early and falling in line behind Donald Trump’s push to tilt the playing field before the midterms.
[**Can you help us fight back and turn the tide on this vote? We need to overcome Republicans’ numbers and their misinformation that is flooding the Commonwealth.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_1.YWC9nx&amount=3&refcode=20260412-457&t=3&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
That’s the bad news.
Here’s the good news: **this election is far from decided.**
Millions of ballots are still left to be cast. Virginia voters still have the power to level the playing field and make sure the 2026 elections are decided by people, not politicians.
But only if we match their energy.
Early voting is already underway. Election Day is April 21. And this race is shaping up to come down to enthusiasm and turnout in these final weeks.
Right now this is the state of the election:
* Turnout is ahead in Republican-held areas
* Some polls show the YES vote trailing, while others show it within reach
* This will come down to who shows up and who gets reached in time

Meanwhile, MAGA-funded misinformation is flooding mailboxes and feeds across the Commonwealth, trying to confuse voters and slow our momentum.
_That’s why we’re going all in._
But here’s the reality: **reaching the voters who will decide this election takes resources, and we’re up against big money trying to block this amendment.**
We cannot afford to fall behind right now. If we’re going to win, we need to expand our outreach, stay on the air, and keep building momentum through Election Day.
[**Will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can to help power this final push?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_1.YWC9nx&amount=3&refcode=20260412-457&t=4&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_1.YWC9nx&amount=3&refcode=20260412-457&t=23&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)**
This is a close election. We always knew it would be. But this moment is a flashing red warning sign, and also an opportunity.
If we act now, if we meet this moment with everything we have, we can still win this and protect fair elections for years to come. Let’s not look back and wonder what more we could have done. **We don’t want to wake up with regrets on April 22.**
Let’s do all we can right now to fight back and win.
Thank you for being with us,
Virginians for Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=24&refcode2=457_12592_5de3ox&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=26&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)
* [Unsubscribe](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=457%2E12592%2E5de3ox)

Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
Contributions or gifts to Virginians for Fair Elections are not tax deductible.

name: JB Pritzker
subject: Something’s happening in NH —
body:
It’s
Governor JB Pritzker.

I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is
serious: Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in
to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260412_1.NDwD2F&refcode=em20260412-1&t=1001&akid=6049%2E582294%2EqcRSao ]Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you rush $5
or more to elect Chris Pappas and keep New Hampshire blue?

Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a
chance at taking back a majority in the Senate. That’s why this race is
being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.

And the NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the
Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu.

This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and
we have to be ready to fight back.

Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough
campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a
race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260412_1.NDwD2F&refcode=em20260412-1&t=1002&akid=6049%2E582294%2EqcRSao ]If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will
you chip in $5 or any amount today to help him defend New
Hampshire’s seat?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260412_1.NDwD2F&amount=5&refcode=em20260412-1&t=1021&akid=6049%2E582294%2EqcRSao ]Donate $5 »

I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260412_1.yuHDuT&refcode=em20260412-1&t=1022&akid=6049%2E582294%2EqcRSao ]so thank
you for supporting his campaign today.

With gratitude,

JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260412_1.yuHDuT&refcode=em20260412-1&t=1023&akid=6049%2E582294%2EqcRSao ]JB Pritzker

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6049%2E582294%2EqcRSao

I was born and raised in Southwest Ohio - the son of legal immigrants, raised in a middle-class home. No handouts. No special favors. Just the basic ingredients of the American experiment: Hard work. Faith. Family.
I went on to build businesses, become a husband and father of three, and live out the promise of this country. [That promise is still alive, but it needs to be revived.](http://links.magaallies.com/u/click?_t=ec6977da27e4463794af691eb6b01adc&_m=e512353758664b02b465ccd99c995657&_e=CcddwRnqxBbNuA_1gxWF4MO0-Z_5nxqZr9mBsLHyB1O7Fdx06_67KDrz8benh6iOGDVSRvIYYSCCnV9jR9q-3mlDA3wmW4tIxeN0IqKWmah_ZpIVubmT6gbyUsXGQG0FOxGSgdw_x7rNLLMjFQHvkVq_dcBZxWeY2ZsYFqhm7iGW-8b1rfkPK0aqtc4AgvYGCfDC86wCce4Cdi0S0wrbqJNMs9gQKmcDLr3Ghb3cYTXA4r61v4XJvARO9D6SVSi6ENPz6Uo6wxTC9gis-nKt8xOaJgkZl8STagpSAIpUcLNgulGpZqHxHvdWOnygLqW7ToFXDrKNS3vTrgfdTSzivBxFBPUaUScXx9tx9WR32I12TM3KNJ74fDhzKQ-3u3AMLpfdWs_-DTeUbx0f9xcZ5RWIRI_NJbBH-kuoUApIJMBsONEXQFB0z2Dw7BttJPkD9hySQWZ2TshiXTKe7qCTDuSKat33wJFIAjMXPjo1Yj9KiH0WAsfcf3o1gTC5BFjTsPr5Tcrpsa5MAS8tPxS37ruo8oACQTeuHSlUXGCtZMtxT0mSy5LHZeUaF-0Lv9zNJIDBng0AuqqpyC4WXcFAfI1YLJ32QvpoPtg0ZlzwwGtU6QVrFeH-HEt44ksZ86ngUoVKysegUyqr5dkzGabVWpd3yNGoA0gUgP7Rxn-FIrJqKTv8M0ALqJxfnzjv2v-BkHJ9KJqLaGwFHsFqYOkBlg8xSLgHmEsG8YoPfqx9yc8%3D)

clean_body: Join us to restore the American Dream. | Hi, Vivek here. My message to you is this: I was born and raised in Southwest Ohio - the son of legal immigrants, raised in a middle-class home. No handouts. No special favors. Just the basic ingredients of the American experiment: Hard work. Faith. Family. I went on to build businesses, become a husband and father of three, and live out the promise of this country. In Ohio, we're fighting to unleash a new era of excellence. A state where young people believe in themselves. Where achievement is celebrated. Where freedom isn't negotiable. | Thank you, and God bless you, Vivek Ramaswamy | | Paid for by Vivek Ramaswamy and Rob McColley for Ohio 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: Martin Sheen
subject: Activism is what I do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Friend, it's Martin Sheen. You may know me from acting ‐‐ that's how I've made my living. **But activism is what I do to stay alive.**

I've stood in solidarity with farm workers and advocated for those fleeing poverty and violence. I've worked to protect our environment, and I've been arrested dozens of times for civil disobedience. Through all these experiences, I've learned that **you have to keep up the fight. You can't give up.**

And that couldn't be more true than it is today. We need to stand up to Donald Trump _every single day_ as he works to undermine the values that make America great. [**Will you show me you're in this fight now by signing this petition? >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/23066?ask=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260412-MartinSheen-SheenStandUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260412-MartinSheen-SheenStandUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=23417%2E9716520%2ESSC6zB)

So much has already happened since Trump's return to office. The Trump administration dismantled the Department of Education, endangered Social Security and Medicare, targeted immigrants, slashed aid to the most vulnerable Americans and others around the world, fired thousands of hardworking federal employees, shamelessly attacked the very guardrails of our democracy, gutted the Environmental Protection Agency...

I could go on and on, but the point is this: Any one of these actions would be devastating. _Together, they're disastrous._

As an activist, it's my responsibility not just to take note, but to **take action**. That's why I'm reaching out to you here and now, friend ‐‐ when we all stand for what we believe in, our voices together are louder than any one of us alone.

[**So it's on all of us to act. My petition standing up to Trump is awaiting your signature. Will you join me and thousands of other dedicated activists by taking action today? >>**](http://go.dscc.org/go/23066?ask=7&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260412-MartinSheen-SheenStandUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260412-MartinSheen-SheenStandUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=23417%2E9716520%2ESSC6zB)

Thank you. Our country needs us.
Martin Sheen

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/23066?ask=7&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260412-MartinSheen-SheenStandUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260412-MartinSheen-SheenStandUpToTrump-Pros-sl1&akid=23417%2E9716520%2ESSC6zB)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress
body:
Trump doesn’t care about Michigan’s future. He’s willing to sacrifice our state to fuel his political agenda and inflate his ego.

| Hi Peter,

Donald Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” is already a disaster for Michigan.

This law slaps tariffs on key goods, raises prices on everyday essentials, and hurts Michigan families and businesses. What was sold as a “deal” is really just a handout to corporate interests at the expense of hardworking people.

Trump doesn’t care about Michigan’s future. He’s willing to sacrifice our state to fuel his political agenda and inflate his ego.

**But I’m not letting that happen. I’m fighting back.**

I signed onto legislation to oppose this bill, but this fight isn’t just about one law. It’s about standing up to an agenda that puts politics over people and leaves Michigan families to foot the bill.

[_**I’ll never stop fighting for Michigan – and I know you won’t either. clean_body: Trump doesn’t care about Michigan’s future. He’s willing to sacrifice our state to fuel his political agenda and inflate his ego. | = | Hi Peter, Donald Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” is already a disaster for Michigan. This law slaps tariffs on key goods, raises prices on everyday essentials, and hurts Michigan families and businesses. What was sold as a “deal” is really just a handout to corporate interests at the expense of hardworking people. Trump doesn’t care about Michigan’s future. He’s willing to sacrifice our state to fuel his political agenda and inflate his ego. But I’m not letting that happen. I’m fighting back. I signed onto legislation to oppose this bill, but this fight isn’t just about one law. It’s about standing up to an agenda that puts politics over people and leaves Michigan families to foot the bill. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for standing with me. Jeremy Moss * | | = Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress Jeremy Moss for Congress 2211 S Telegraph Rd PO Box 7023 Bloomfield Hills, MI 48302 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

Null, _this changes everything._
**FIRST:** Trump won Michigan in 2024, and our state was named one of the most likely to flip red this November.
**THEN:** Trump launched his dangerous and illegal war in Iran. Gas prices started soaring. The stock market started spiraling. _And Trump's grip on power began teetering._
**NOW:****Michigan's open seat is primed and ready for us to deliver Democrats a Senate majority that we were told was nearly impossible only a couple of months ago.**
But Trump and national Republicans are watching these headlines just like we are, and they're going to use every opportunity to fire up their far-right billionaire base.
**[I need you with me now more than ever. Will you rush $5 or more now so we can keep up this momentum, take on MAGA's millions, and win this race for all of us in November?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/16947?t=3&akid=2716%2E49239%2EzjpS_u)**

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Can I be honest
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Getting here wasn't easy, Peter
Peter: **[In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a split donation of $10 between Heartland Patriots and my campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102698?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=1&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe)** But first, will you let me explain who I am, why I'm in this race, and the difference your donation will make?
As the daughter of a Pueblo woman, I was taught the value of hard work from a very young age.
My mother was born and raised in a train boxcar, where the Laguna people built a community far from their home. She proudly served in the U.S. Navy, raised four kids as a military wife, and devoted more than two decades to Indian education at the Bureau of Indian Affairs.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102698?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe)
I am blessed to come from generations of resilient and fierce Pueblo women – **and I am the person, mother, and leader I am today because of them.** _But getting here wasn't easy, Peter, and the hard work and resilience I learned proved essential._
Like many New Mexicans, I know what it’s like to struggle. I was a single mom living paycheck to paycheck, relying on government programs like SNAP, WIC, and Medicaid to help keep my child fed and healthy. **Every day, as hard as it was, I had to get back up and keep going.**
But my struggle made me fierce. It fortified my resolve to build a brighter future – not only for my child, _but for every family dreaming of and fighting for a better life._
That's why I decided to run for office in 2018. _And I won._ I became one of the first Native American women elected to Congress, and in 2021, the first Native American cabinet secretary in U.S. history. **Now, I'm running to be the next governor of New Mexico to help move our state toward a future where everyone can thrive.**
**Every step of my journey has been possible because people like you believed in me, Peter. So please:[Can I count on you to chip in $10 or more right now to be split between Heartland Patriots and my campaign help me win, keep New Mexico blue and deliver progress for working families?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102698?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe)**
If you have stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Deb Haaland and Heartland Patriots will process instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102699?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102699?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102699?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102699?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102699?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102699?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102698?refcode=em20260412-10295&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=10295%2E614464%2EG5Vihe)
---
I know that it takes a village – in life, and in politics – and that's why I'll never stop fighting for our communities.
Thank you for standing with me,
Deb

The truth is: Alaska is the Democrats’ VERY BEST CHANCE to take back the Senate majority this year.

I won’t sugarcoat it — it’s going to be one hell of a fight. But I know what it takes to win in “red states” where people think you can’t elect a Democrat.

So let me say this LOUD and CLEAR: Mary has what it takes. **Mary knows how to win tough races and has won statewide in Alaska before.**

But she can’t pull this off without a HUGE team of people who care about our country behind her.

Billionaires and super PACs will spend UNGODLY sums — I’m talking about tens of millions — to defeat Mary and take Alaska off the map for Democrats. Unless we all do everything we can, we’re handing this seat right back to a corrupt politician, and the Senate majority to DC Republicans.

clean_body: = I’ll cut the BS and get right to it. = | | = I’ve spent nearly half a century electing Democrats and winning tough elections across the country, so please take my word for it when I say this — we gotta get serious about Alaska’s U.S. Senate race. The truth is: Alaska is the Democrats’ VERY BEST CHANCE to take back the Senate majority this year. I won’t sugarcoat it — it’s going to be one hell of a fight. But I know what it takes to win in “red states” where people think you can’t elect a Democrat. So let me say this LOUD and CLEAR: Mary has what it takes. Mary knows how to win tough races and has won statewide in Alaska before. But she can’t pull this off without a HUGE team of people who care about our country behind her. Billionaires and super PACs will spend UNGODLY sums — I’m talking about tens of millions — to defeat Mary and take Alaska off the map for Democrats. Unless we all do everything we can, we’re handing this seat right back to a corrupt politician, and the Senate majority to DC Republicans. It was a selfless move from Mary Peltola to jump into a tough race like this! But she did it because she understands how high the stakes are for all of us. Now I’m hoping you do too... If everyone reading this pitched in a few bucks, we'd make sure Mary has the resources she needs to take on this fight with room to spare. Unfortunately, not everyone gives, so it’s that much more important that YOU do. So I’m asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mary Peltola and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Mary is fighting for all of us AND for fish, family, freedom — nothing wrong with that! I hope you join me and fight for her too. Thanks as always, James Carville If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: James Talarico
subject: When I was 28, I almost died
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
When I was 28 years old, I almost died.
I was running in my first race for the Texas House. I decided to walk the entire length of my district — 25 miles in one day — holding town halls along the way. I wasn’t worried — I hike Big Bend every year!
But about halfway through, I started feeling nauseous and fatigued. I threw up a couple of times on the way, but figured I was just dehydrated. Somehow, I finished.
When I got home, I slept for 36 hours. My family rushed me to the ER, where nurses checked my blood sugar. I was immediately diagnosed with type 1 diabetes. I was in diabetic ketoacidosis, which ends in coma and death without insulin.
When I got out of the ICU, I went to Walgreens to pick up my first 30-day supply of insulin. It cost me $684 for a necessary medicine that costs Big Pharma $10 to produce. I didn’t have that kind of money (most Texans don’t, either) — so I put it on my credit card.
This is why so many people with diabetes ration or skip doses. Some of them die because of it.
**So when I got elected, I passed bills to cap the price of insulin at $25 a month.**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260412-re-ak&t=1&akid=574%2E1347274%2Efil761)
For years, politicians allowed Big Pharma to push people into bankruptcy or face death because corporate profit came first. With our bill, we put an end to Big Pharma’s manipulation of the insulin market, which drives up prices to maximize profit.
It’s time to take our fight for guaranteed health care to our nation’s capital and finally put the lives of Americans over the profits of billionaire mega-donors and special interests.
But I’ll be honest: it’s going to be expensive. **Big Pharma will likely come after me in this race, pouring millions of dollars into corporate PACs to defeat our movement.** And we have to fight back without a single dollar from corporate PACs.
**[Your support would mean a lot to me. If you believe we need new leaders fighting for the people in Washington, please consider making a donation to our campaign today.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260412-re-ak&t=2&akid=574%2E1347274%2Efil761)**

I know what it means to fight for my life. In the U.S. Senate, I’ll fight for yours.
James

Peter Willis,

On No Kings Day, MILLIONS of us sent a message too loud to ignore: our
democracy belongs to us – not billionaires, not mega-corporations, not
kings.

Now, Our Revolution is joining the May Day Strong coalition for a bold
next step: a Nationwide Economic Blackout on May 1 – and we need your help
to make it count.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/36387?source=email-20230412&t=1061&akid=10523%2E5885482%2E8wIHhn ]Headline: Nationwide General Strike Planned for May 1: No Kings

resistance by REFUSING to do business as usual: No School. No Work. No
Shopping.

Over Billionaires

Inspired by Minnesota’s game-changing general strike for justice earlier
this year, on May 1 people will choose to walk out, shut it down, and take
their place in the streets. They’ll only buy local, walk out of classrooms
and workplaces if they’re able, and demand – with their bodies and wallets
– a democracy that always puts workers before billionaires.

This is more than a protest – it’s a tactical escalation. It’s an economic
show of force, echoing the fearless organizing that shook Minnesota this
winter.

We can’t and won’t back down now. Trump and his billionaire cronies are
counting on protest fatigue. They think last month’s record-breaking
turnout was a one-off. Let's prove them wrong.

Our organizing team moved straight from No Kings into May Day Strong – and
we’re not letting up for a second. But to keep up the momentum we need
your support right now.

help us fuel this day of protest across the country.

When we organize, we win.

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d540b68e-1c84-4d3f-bfa5-1f29b0cbc977?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Something big is happening in our part of Pennsylvania.
For a long time, we've had a representative who pretends we don't exist. He doesn't hold town halls, he doesn't answer our questions, and he tells us to suck it up and deal with it when we have a problem.
We just learned that **he 's been secretly working with DHS to bring the ICE detention centers here this whole time.** Even though for months, our district has made it clear that we absolutely do not want them.
This is par for the course with Dan Meuser. He's made a lot of people think we should just sit on our hands, because it's just not worth it to fight for change.
**They 've given up on him - and that's just the way he likes it.**
[CHIP IN](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d540b68e-1c84-4d3f-bfa5-1f29b0cbc977?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But something is shifting. People are getting tired of having no voice while their communities are treated like a dumping ground. They're getting sick of watching costs go up and health care get cut with no one to turn to for help, and no one to hold accountable.
You can feel it out on the campaign trail. Our part of PA is fired up. And November is coming.
We won't let Dan operate in the dark anymore. The more people hear about him, the angrier they are. And the more they hear about our campaign, the more they believe that something better really is possible.
**So I 'm asking you to help us keep getting our message out there. We want everyone in every corner of our district to know that we don't have to accept this sad excuse for representation anymore.**
**[Be a part of what's happening here. Spread the word. And chip in today to help us win.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d540b68e-1c84-4d3f-bfa5-1f29b0cbc977?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[DONATE NOW](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d540b68e-1c84-4d3f-bfa5-1f29b0cbc977?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thank you,
Rachel Wallace

clean_body: Help! We couldn’t find your signature! We launched this petition a few days ago, and we wanted YOU to be the very first to sign. I was even planning to flag your signature for JD Vance himself! ** \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: MAGA Breaking News Alerts Subject: Will you go on the record for Pres. Trump & Elon Musk? To: Elon Musk and MILLIONS of Americans are asking for one simple thing from Congress: Pass the SAVE America Act to REQUIRE VOTER ID! The House passed this commonsense bill, but guess what the Senate is doing? NOTHING! We must make it clear: "TRUMP'S AGENDA MUST PASS!" That's why we're calling on one million America-First Patriots to make their voices heard and DEMAND that voter ID becomes the law of the land. Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrodrrr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrodrrr]
I need to fill you in.
National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me.
That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a $100,000 emergency goal so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts.
So I’m personally asking: Will you split $20 between my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrodrrr] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-defeatmtg&amount=20.26]
DONATE TO FLIP OHIO! >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrodrrr]
I don’t make requests like this lightly. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far.
Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power.
But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.
This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and Resist Reclaim Rebuild so we can handle whatever comes next. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sherrodrrr]

Thank you so much – for everything.
