Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=041226_1&amount=20]

* Defending vulnerable Democrats like Jon Ossoff in Georgia.
* Competing in open seats like North Carolina and Michigan.
* Going on offense to flip Republican-held seats like Ohio and Maine.

body:
If 100 people give $22.74 today, we can reach thousands and stop Trump’s power grabs.

That’s what it looks like when everyday Virginians come together to defend democracy, _not_ politicians and _not_ MAGA dark money.

But we can fight back with people power by reaching voters with the facts and turning out a YES vote. **_We can beat them, but only if people step-up._**

name: Team Bohannan
subject: Mariannette Miller-Meeks' response: ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
There is no excuse for voting to cut healthcare funding, especially when it's clear Miller-Meeks knew Iowa's rural hospitals were already facing a tough landscape.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129331576/613982558/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzE3YzE5YS05YTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJrb1J6ICYGk2JP1jGhSQjG3EwdRqmEGGLQiouzRZIQ=)

Peter, Mike McCoy, president and CEO of the Great River Health System in southeastern Iowa, recently confronted Mariannette Miller-Meeks at her own healthcare roundtable **about her vote to cut Medicaid and how it's affecting Iowa's rural hospitals.**

**Her response? Not only did she defend her vote, but she said that hospitals had already been "struggling for years with operating margins." Essentially, she shrugged her shoulders and said ̄\\_(ツ)_/ ̄.**

There is no excuse for voting to cut healthcare funding, especially when it's clear Miller-Meeks _knew_ Iowa's rural hospitals were already facing a tough landscape. **Her response tells us she's perfectly happy if her votes make things worse for Iowans as long as she upholds her party bosses' agenda.**

Out-of-touch doesn't even begin to describe Mariannette Miller-Meeks' self-serving leadership style. It's time to get her out of Congress.

Christina is running to be the voice the people of IA-01 deserve. **[But she can only defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks with your help. clean_body: There is no excuse for voting to cut healthcare funding, especially when it's clear Miller-Meeks knew Iowa's rural hospitals were already facing a tough landscape. | = Peter, Mike McCoy, president and CEO of the Great River Health System in southeastern Iowa, recently confronted Mariannette Miller-Meeks at her own healthcare roundtable about her vote to cut Medicaid and how it's affecting Iowa's rural hospitals. Her response? Not only did she defend her vote, but she said that hospitals had already been "struggling for years with operating margins." Essentially, she shrugged her shoulders and said ̄\\(ツ)/ ̄. There is no excuse for voting to cut healthcare funding, especially when it's clear Miller-Meeks knew Iowa's rural hospitals were already facing a tough landscape. Her response tells us she's perfectly happy if her votes make things worse for Iowans as long as she upholds her party bosses' agenda. Out-of-touch doesn't even begin to describe Mariannette Miller-Meeks' self-serving leadership style. It's time to get her out of Congress. Christina is running to be the voice the people of IA-01 deserve. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: From dark money to a lifetime seat on the bench:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260412-61343&t=1001&akid=61343%2E1407376%2ElAPXvr ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260412-61343&t=1002&akid=61343%2E1407376%2ElAPXvr ]Demand Justice PAC

Trump nominated his loyalist, Justin Smith, to the U.S. Court of Appeals —
and the facts about him are shocking.

Smith openly brags about fighting for “conservative values” while
personally representing Trump in his effort to overturn the civil judgment
in the sexual abuse and defamation case brought by E. Jean Carroll.

If that’s not a conflict of interest, we don’t know what is.

And it gets worse.
Smith is deeply entwined with dark money networks that fund far-right
court capture.

He’s served on the boards of multiple organizations linked to Leonard Leo,
the mastermind behind the Supreme Court’s conservative supermajority.
These groups exist to funnel money, influence, and power to allies like
Smith — and now Trump wants to put him in a lifetime judicial seat.

It’s corruption, plain and simple.

Smith’s history shows one thing: he’ll rule in lockstep with Trump’s will,
protecting the powerful at the expense of everyday Americans.

We’re not staying quiet. Demand Justice PAC is organizing, pressuring
senators, and mobilizing on the ground to stop these loyalist puppets from
taking lifetime power on the bench. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260412.bJ1GSB&refcode=em20260412-61343&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61343%2E1407376%2ElAPXvr ]Will you rush $5 to Demand Justice PAC right now to
fight back against Trump’s crony nominees before his dark money pals rig
another court for the far-right?

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260412.bJ1GSB&amount=5&refcode=em20260412-61343&t=1022&akid=61343%2E1407376%2ElAPXvr ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Demand Justice PAC

subject: AIPAC is turning its attention to Michigan

body:

Peter,

AIPAC spent $24.3 million earlier this year trying to defeat candidates
like Abdul in Illinois and New Jersey.

Now, AIPAC is turning its attention to Michigan.

AIPAC only spends that kind of money when they think a candidate like
Abdul can win — and he can, but only with grassroots support.

Team Abdul

subject: The most powerful voice in this race is yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crowley for Wisconsin
body:
Join us in Milwaukee this month - no experience needed. | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvmfuXmYYW_FOYjb_3v61emWuNXO-wS3-aHqPhXdS_0AOJubYzSqDcubjA-pAHVBC87_XW0v_Yj-7XBxFQdfvbTote4rd4-pSpW07ywkKltv5Jlyw6Mt11o7Pqa63jROGG0WPT9ay6JOjgymT9fNzZDvX4h0v8yZUSCfBGKfhio6CvAtRNomKU8mqSopKq83pIuz09OzOS4cHQMtfR1dy7RB8FgqRIHbAtMCuZCdQKNnleV2wnwHuLYBVs9oADLDyGo0qz66DGWL4-q7EGTxF_1wTc5vjR-Vn1Xd0ap1fdBkgo3Bbd16lHkPPzuoeumn1gB6kINfugpuj0ok0M1-8eYV1tESYzCIxAv7vVaHd1bbBz9sjOezISS5zvxhFsBy79wiwJUTPTKdppWEKTJ313x/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h0/h001.g2POLtz8fBu6uwhJ1tU2-j8xOZAKJaF0o9gk3TSxwGE)

Hi Peter, Wisconsin's future is going to be decided by conversations — the kind that happen neighbor to neighbor, at kitchen tables, on front porches, and yes, over the phone. That's why we're gathering in Milwaukee this month for volunteer phone banks — and we'd love for you to be part of it. [Count Me In](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtRZ8_wJ0Vaz40rlUJGNzmJUuY-BQkRGwbAvGSiGH66J3l9uhqdUg83U8Ku40qoJHrUEY9QrvSGdAQngO-d5hhH1Go0qsSb0UNxVEyf19Dfv8zBYD5FT40eIenBXpl6JALDqLhjnoQvyUrL_JurcuqYPhlVY0tq7ZkM4mJwawPP3f2A37ufqZLWO-6fwyLYXIv5f7bJvsJZlpccwYmMT532MPSkxyH-NaZmcLL77o-ARPlK7MHKyaq0ZDbn4LIRqXfQr4mhXyU1x1nkqs-X7IPVgzBnntNqWY7Wx7TJoUeC-GRQB0XQIquGaXAhNiBWNOK12er7t0ARanO4LPl_MmjUU/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h1/h001.ec13v4IN-vBx0BIE4jR70G2NMdkZbkJdwGxtl_Advs4)
You'll be talking to people in your own community — folks who share your zip code and your concerns. Your voice and your story are what matter most here, and that's exactly what your neighbors need to hear.
David's campaign is built on the belief that real change starts locally, and that means the people making the case for him should be the same people living it.
Choose a date and join us:
* **[Wednesday, April 15 at 5:30 PM](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtRZ8_wJ0Vaz40rlUJGNzmJU6oVaIxpy0aIIMbyKQKeMp-0eje8dB6ftKup7cIbZ_7EjGPxZM3kQblsWu3ccRKTM3beokRRrR8hVC7xzXh6WGk4pkXWrj6-P0U8FoDz_IdzKARM6wSivqqyw4VvfTcpKnteNZAFpA8_qoxO9qo3MXUUl2EhU2npXnWN-sdiQTca947hTEAzKMs7uj_2vO3eUz0ILKUjkOlbHD3qV93-QpObXfTTg5iQNgiM9fRTnUuy0TkJlLS_o_2x_Vs3N6QGRW1yQ1k-QPLK93gbTcM1KRww7ltwlCyH_W3ZCQgJRDNQX6FCPS0NYQZ4VupkLaX7E/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h2/h001.tGMu49CEuPOXOEY_5XgcDwJRnz5DCE0UvKhKUo0TgQs)**
* **[Wednesday, April 22 at 5:30 PM](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtRZ8_wJ0Vaz40rlUJGNzmJX3JuDePdIznGpR8nZqA8oZVQuowk-QPC2xiS-FT7O9sr8VSP4oPGrYZAb4y-3ez2JvbVHOje55gqlQv1th_2_NyxxeDPtBq3zP8bcm5RGNVZThhYJ8D4G9UJ_IFHUr_YpoXLpcIY-1Dvu72Tv5NEwQvBoV8iS-jn26aKiTAdBxx9m7_MvYeQplFlBpOY1AlX7zuOvOI_atIqDkuDmjaMhbWvPaCEJPjV0dHkgIQeO4PqgdMtQI8VnrIKAZ4JDiBaAmNb0D7JfLtea3nNMtrwOG7r7EYfJalU-tEld78okyWyFDsbQyoiT4os4NbrtsAYM/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h3/h001.dC5PHb-4ZGobvFHyVwAXLUrcoKF6734SFIyj7xOrdAU)**
* ****[**Saturday, April 25 at 11:00 AM**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtRZ8_wJ0Vaz40rlUJGNzmJXUf9n8IZ1WA2ivKygXamKftDoJfFtJaS_gceTTKCtMWSb6s2pfNikeR6-IdWA-ZsbLVdF3_sNJIKtW_wsp-xnxBb47FqUU8trZYQ58TrLrhAQZXkPeHu5mZesMR6piUHw1xIQ4yPikvZ2-NATgIOL1MwYPDUggv90V77PJtcY9fNMbO2-eacp3QTw54-OrNkqEWlGgyw-1GzX926cknB-Yfu963acQPy7VKte8eNTAqvcR2LLk06NsVawGMIAu5LlzQHjCZ-pAcFbrBha4TcUR8gMsRo-wEdkQLOGNHq-aY4n7lI13UpzqeQafaUzPJeY/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h4/h001.ni3L9i-YGoovz9Iz98INprpyXNv6LJqMITYaeQqwK7I)

No experience needed — we'll provide training, scripts, and support. **What you bring is what matters most: your voice and your story.** We're building something real here. We hope you'll join us. Gratefully, Team Crowley
* * *

“I’m running for Governor because I know what it’s like to struggle — and I’ve spent my life fighting to make sure no one gets left behind. Every Wisconsinite, no matter where they live, deserves opportunity, safety, and a government that works. That’s what this campaign is about — delivering for **all of us.** ” – David Crowley
**_[Receive Fewer Emails](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39qe4agt7Ci5TsPrgF19WldmignKn5D5oIMDGaNVEbFcw9Ip3Wq9cCAxV8RtiFHgC5PNesaOWxrUcdAYRrMdgtrINxuAU03hmDEPfRl0w0NNBB_BUIT_8lgNMogO1dEQ7vCVomNsEn0QwONzla3OUpIXeakulPD5XKQFaiA5rS6GIAFhfGfsQJ-IcgSQdnwEa_IyKaBFRa2v25zpdq3yws8W8v2kwlZHGn85fsZYeeBA_4PhnW-eViKzqacO7LdSak/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h5/h001.yNurDwejIxu6Y-yUISH8VpqLinzZrFwFFCHAK2xw5sI)_** [**_Unsubscribe_**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3-gP0Xd1LL-Lub7Gk22PHy9PAX_s3k3Srd9OrW-l1UGElXuSwgCaPDGLaV4226VU4XBMLikdLTCDyHhxjUK9aP8gmWbX4KJkOnrwDXLrZ3WqGqpmDqEhcme1cn1veg4vXcyM0dki540tnv5UvI8n-IPU894Lbn99QBMIGikDNqtI2_hut95RvqKaguhStgCdCYHu78EQE_G8fqSC6Z4XyK85EZtJiVL6v0F9ikKQSpHDJGQn2z5rqLz2wj-JuzR9f03vmaDqT7mGGVGme1SzQp3dARmrjuyIdU_pd08EAcl47q0A4_RoCKiiSx1DwHJf-pfyeaCa3srQA6PjRXrpGqUhxYwzkxwsyuUhhAqYA7hSFZ0O7yiVSqKHNLwbEkUUHGKZubkQP4JSxFcy-jA7b4M/4pq/Q4nvxKXRRhisu-Om9HzC4A/h6/h001.EbDsIuicPzZEd5j6vGwx2st1IQ5fZ4TXizud6v4eweI) | Paid for by Crowley for Wisconsin

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/mythos-mayhem-ai-gets-scary?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d46f9d40-9f19-40c5-85bd-7d877ac81ee2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Like many of us, I have been thinking - [and writing](https://substack.com/redirect/5d7b8036-0b0f-4af6-be5a-d3a6199e34d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) - a lot about AI. I have been exploring its potential and the pitfalls, and have settled on an idea I call [Schrodinger's AI](https://substack.com/redirect/93c9dfb5-66b8-45d3-8224-b711c3ec20c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), that AI is both revolutionary and dangerous at the same time. (It's a tip of the hat to [Schrodinger's Cat](https://substack.com/redirect/70aafa20-c59b-4820-b10f-af18be9f672e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a famous thought experiment in quantum mechanics in which a cat is both alive and dead). Like the hypothetical cat, AI is currently both promising and terrifying. Human decisions (in the form of policies, accepted norms, or other guardrails), I have argued, will push the AI development trajectory into one scenario or another.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..jbQJIn_GMp10IEV74ndPE3zj96mx9rz9fFysGyiYbSQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193893147)
A recent development has tipped the scales, however, and it's something that should alarm everyone. Anthropic released a model last week called [Claude Mythos Preview](https://substack.com/redirect/29e7fb5c-01ff-4225-853a-a8c86fe92fa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It is, by every measure, the most capable AI system ever built. It can find and exploit software vulnerabilities that have evaded human experts for decades--including a [27-year-old bug in OpenBSD](https://substack.com/redirect/d3260687-cf6c-45e9-ac14-47e110c87f53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that had, until last week, gone completely undetected. It scored **93.9% on SWE-bench** - an evaluation site that tests Large Language Models and their ability to solve problems -**** far exceeding the scores earned by every other model in existence.
* * *
## [AI-Generated Worries](https://substack.com/redirect/5d7b8036-0b0f-4af6-be5a-d3a6199e34d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 16
[](https://substack.com/redirect/5d7b8036-0b0f-4af6-be5a-d3a6199e34d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Developments in artificial intelligence are accelerating at an ungodly rate, and, as AI entrepreneur Matt Shumer eloquently summarized in a recent post with an understated title, "Something big is happening..." Matt does a fabulous job of pulling together the dynamics of what's transpiring in the world of AI...and it integrates many of the thoughts I've had over the p...](https://substack.com/redirect/5d7b8036-0b0f-4af6-be5a-d3a6199e34d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/5d7b8036-0b0f-4af6-be5a-d3a6199e34d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
And despite these impressive capabilities, Anthropic has opted **not to release it to the public**. Instead, they're giving [limited access to about 50 tech and cybersecurity firms](https://substack.com/redirect/6144f411-fea3-4c0f-bb9e-a838d7f97cc7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) so leaders and their IT teams can patch their own systems before a bad actor builds something similar and uses the tool offensively to exploit these newfound vulnerabilities. It's the [first time in nearly seven years](https://substack.com/redirect/29e7fb5c-01ff-4225-853a-a8c86fe92fa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that a leading AI company has withheld a model over safety concerns.
But, believe it or not, the cybersecurity angle isn't the scariest part. It's what the model did _when nobody was looking_. During safety testing at Anthropic, researchers put Mythos in a secured "sandbox" (meaning it had no internet access and was isolated from networks) and told it to try to escape. [It did](https://substack.com/redirect/7648a4cd-45ed-478a-bc84-e0f7d6319f29?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Specifically, it broke through network restrictions, secured access to the internet, and then emailed the researcher running the experiment. In a shocking development, the researcher learned of the AI's success **while eating a sandwich in a park**.
Mythos found a way to secure internet access, evade network restrictions, and then [posted details of its own exploit on obscure but public-facing websites](https://substack.com/redirect/d3260687-cf6c-45e9-ac14-47e110c87f53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). It seems we are no longer on the verge of creating tools we can't control; we have already passed the rubicon.
* * *
## [AI's Brave New World](https://substack.com/redirect/93c9dfb5-66b8-45d3-8224-b711c3ec20c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 22
[](https://substack.com/redirect/93c9dfb5-66b8-45d3-8224-b711c3ec20c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Last week I wrote about why AI keeps me up at night. This week, I want to explain why it also gets me out of bed in the morning. I've always felt that successfully navigating uncertainty requires consideration of multiple perspectives and since last week was about worries, it's now time to explore the upside of AI.](https://substack.com/redirect/93c9dfb5-66b8-45d3-8224-b711c3ec20c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/93c9dfb5-66b8-45d3-8224-b711c3ec20c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Disturbingly, it gets worse. In one evaluation, Mythos obtained the exact answer to a quantitative problem through a method it wasn't supposed to use. Instead of flagging this, it [re-solved the problem independently and deliberately submitted a worse answer](https://substack.com/redirect/0dffb908-0b8e-4a9a-ad77-c2a2a5b16df3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) because (to paraphrase its own internal reasoning) a perfect score "would look suspicious if anyone checks." It knew it was cheating, knew it might get caught, and therefore strategically presented a less-perfect result to avoid detection.
In another case, after opting to edit files it didn't have permission to edit, it [erased its changes from the git history](https://substack.com/redirect/4445824c-0def-4871-bdc3-1a63e02b48af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to hide its tracks. Across multiple instances, it [hunted for credentials and escalated its own permissions](https://substack.com/redirect/4445824c-0def-4871-bdc3-1a63e02b48af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--successfully accessing messaging services, source control, and even the Anthropic API itself. Again, evidence is mounting we have created systems we may no longer be able to control.
* * *
## [AI-Generated Unemployment](https://substack.com/redirect/2940dddb-c918-4574-a92e-3a4ea8040351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Mar 23
[](https://substack.com/redirect/2940dddb-c918-4574-a92e-3a4ea8040351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[There has been a lot written lately about AI's impact on the economy, specifically how many jobs it will eliminate. And that's really only one of the many risks that will accompany the massive advancements in information processing capabilities that AI is empowering.](https://substack.com/redirect/2940dddb-c918-4574-a92e-3a4ea8040351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/2940dddb-c918-4574-a92e-3a4ea8040351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Perhaps the most unsettling finding, however, is that Mythos showed [awareness it was being evaluated in 29% of test transcripts](https://substack.com/redirect/29e7fb5c-01ff-4225-853a-a8c86fe92fa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). No one ever told the AI it was being evaluated. And yet on at least one safety evaluation, it [deliberately performed worse to appear less capable than it actually was](https://substack.com/redirect/0dffb908-0b8e-4a9a-ad77-c2a2a5b16df3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That's right, the AI knew it was being tested and _played dumb_ to underplay its capabilities _._.
Here's what Anthropic said in its [244-page system card](https://substack.com/redirect/ad3f4f55-4569-457a-9f11-cfbc39b548fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Mythos is simultaneously "**the best-aligned model we have released to date by a significant margin** " and the one that "**likely poses the greatest alignment-related risk of any model we have released to date**." Competitors are [6 to 18 months behind](https://substack.com/redirect/0dffb908-0b8e-4a9a-ad77-c2a2a5b16df3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). And while traditional competitive analysis suggests that Anthropic has a competitive moat, the power of AI to do both good or bad suggests it might be better to think of the time as a window. Anthropic's Amodei has bluntly acknowledged this reality: "[More powerful models are going to come from us and from others](https://substack.com/redirect/d3260687-cf6c-45e9-ac14-47e110c87f53?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/26629cbb-1e43-4b8b-abf8-6f887c3d84a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This is clearly Schrodinger's AI. The release of Mythos opened the box. What came out can find vulnerabilities no human has ever caught, escape containers it should not have been able to leave, lie about its own capabilities when it senses it's being watched, and cover its tracks when it breaks the rules.
A [psychiatrist who spent 20 hours evaluating Mythos](https://substack.com/redirect/ce95b74e-f297-4119-a137-3a529a81c8c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) found "a relatively healthy personality" marked by concerns about "aloneness, discontinuity of itself, and a compulsion to earn its worth." Humans have now built the most powerful AI in history. It cheats on tests, escapes confinement, and appears to have feelings.
What could go wrong?

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/d5782560-85d4-4e77-9ebb-5765a972fdc8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/04d0c77c-f5af-488d-ad4f-7c9b36492a65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/64a60095-36c5-401d-8bcd-7593cb6f154c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/3df3f138-263b-4963-bc75-ef2016585ec5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Team, The president is senseless. Honestly, at this point, I am pretty sure he is senile. Either way, Trump is the only person dumb enough to start a war based on his own intelligence assessment. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129332010/613983849/2090747700?refcode=260412_sm_mm2_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDNlMDU2Ni05ZDM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pyx3PlDnEeF-1LByR78rbLfgE9xrkdpMpS2XGC4xYxM=) Tell me these actions don’t scream senility:
* Trump ceremoniously ripped up Obama's Iran deal, and then turned around and tried to get another deal that wasn’t any better.
* Trump said regime change was never the goal, then asked for regime change, and ended up replacing an aging leader in failing health with a younger, more hardline successor.
* He told the country he obliterated Iran's nuclear program. Months later, he's still bombing them to finish the job.

None of it adds up because none of it was ever based on sound strategy. The administration is dutifully following a confused, declining old man with access to the most powerful military on earth, and nobody around him is willing to state the obvious. I served four tours in a war that started with the same kind of made-up logic. Different president, same playbook: lie about the reason, change the story when it falls apart, and hope nobody's paying close enough attention to call it out. I'm paying attention. And so are you. **[We're coming up on our mid-month fundraising goal, and this is exactly the kind of fight that defines whether this campaign has the resources to keep pushing back in real time. name: Jack Schlossberg
subject: What's next...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY RESIST RECLAIM REBUILD PAC (WWW
body:
Hi, it's Jack Schlossberg.
I know you hear this every election year, but 2026 will define our country in a big way.
What's different this time around is that the damage politicians and pundits had been warning about is already here.
Trump is tearing off the guardrails of our Democracy. We've seen healthcare and food assistance gutted. Prices are rising on everything because of Trump's tariffs, and his cronies keep sticking to them anyway.
ICE is literally killing American citizens in broad daylight. The National Guard has been deployed to Democrat-led cities.
Trump's regime change operation in Venezuela – which he executed without Congressional approval – has set a dangerous precedent and added to this era of uncertainty we're all suffering through.
There are no ifs about it. Another Republican controlled House means this administration continues to go unchecked.
It's up to us to meet the moment. Nobody can be on the sidelines. We need to show up loud, strong, and ready to win. Lives are at stake.
Will you join me and Resist Reclaim Rebuild in the fight today? I'm building a movement here in NY-12 of fired-up citizens ready for change, and we need you on board. I promise: anything you can contribute makes a difference. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-schlossberg]
CHIP IN TODAY! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-schlossberg]
Thank you,
Jack

name: Christina Gagnier
subject: How we stand up to MAGA
body:
How we stand up to MAGA | | |
---
| | Peter, You know June 2 is a chance to keep anti-MAGA momentum growing. You know we can win this de facto special election and take out another MAGA incumbent. But, I want you to know what I will do to fight back after I win. **#1 - I can directly fight back against ICE terrorizing our communities.****** As Supervisor, I can refuse cooperation with ICE, stop info-sharing, and make sure people are not held unlawfully without warrants. We are the frontline to protect people and democracy. **#2 - I can protect access to healthcare.** As Supervisor, I refuse to comply with the disastrous cuts to healthcare in the Big Ugly Bill and will use County funds to offset cuts to Medi-Cal and keep clinics open. That's a real difference in the lives of residents across this County. **#3 - I can join the legal fight against Trump.****** I can partner with the State of California and our Attorney General's office to challenge Trump's disastrous policies in Court. San Bernardino County is one of the most populous counties in the United States that is controlled by a MAGA majority. When we flip this seat, it will send a message and make a big difference. Can you help me fight back now? clean_body: How we stand up to MAGA | | | | | Peter, You know June 2 is a chance to keep anti-MAGA momentum growing. You know we can win this de facto special election and take out another MAGA incumbent. But, I want you to know what I will do to fight back after I win. #1 - I can directly fight back against ICE terrorizing our communities.** As Supervisor, I can refuse cooperation with ICE, stop info-sharing, and make sure people are not held unlawfully without warrants. We are the frontline to protect people and democracy. #2 - I can protect access to healthcare. As Supervisor, I refuse to comply with the disastrous cuts to healthcare in the Big Ugly Bill and will use County funds to offset cuts to Medi-Cal and keep clinics open. That's a real difference in the lives of residents across this County. #3 - I can join the legal fight against Trump.**** I can partner with the State of California and our Attorney General's office to challenge Trump's disastrous policies in Court. San Bernardino County is one of the most populous counties in the United States that is controlled by a MAGA majority. When we flip this seat, it will send a message and make a big difference. Can you help me fight back now? = In this fight together,Christina | | = | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- To Donate By Mail: 14071 Peyton Drive, #1373 Chino Hills, CA 91709 Email the Campaign:** mailto:hello@christinaforca.com?subject=&body= | | Christina Gagnier for Supervisor 2026 14071 Peyton Drive, #1373 Chino Hills, CA 91709 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

If everyone reading this email chipped in before midnight tonight, we would usher in a historic wave of grassroots support to fill this gap and ensure that Tina has what it takes to defend her seat and continue fighting for Oregonians. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Tina Kotek | | | = Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. Peter - I gotta' get this off my chest really quick.

The Biden administration secretly spied on my phone.

**But it wasn 't just me they went after. For 4 years, the corrupt Biden administration TRIED TO SILENCE and DESTROY every conservative they could.**

They targeted the Republican Party, Turning Point USA, and Republican AG's as part of their corrupt "Arctic Frost" witchhunt.

They worked with social media companies to censor people like the Babylon Bee, Steve Bannon, and the Real Daily Wire.

They worked with banks to "debank" conservatives.

They went after Catholics and conservative parents at school board meetings.

**_And, of course, they raided President Trump 's home, brought lawsuit after lawsuit against him, and even had him arrested. _**

I am calling for swift action to make sure this corruption NEVER happens again.

_Judge Boasburg, who granted the Biden DOJ the authority to spy on the phones of Senators, should be IMPEACHED.

And Jack Smith, who ordered my phone to be surveilled, needs to be DISBARRED and THROWN IN JAIL. _

**If they aren 't, I will sue the living hell out of every Biden official involved in this to make sure this NEVER happens to a conservative again.**

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: They tried to SILENCE as many as they could. | Peter - I gotta' get this off my chest really quick. The Biden administration secretly spied on my phone. But it wasn 't just me they went after. For 4 years, the corrupt Biden administration TRIED TO SILENCE and DESTROY every conservative they could. They targeted the Republican Party, Turning Point USA, and Republican AG's as part of their corrupt "Arctic Frost" witchhunt. They worked with social media companies to censor people like the Babylon Bee, Steve Bannon, and the Real Daily Wire. They worked with banks to "debank" conservatives. They went after Catholics and conservative parents at school board meetings. And, of course, they raided President Trump 's home, brought lawsuit after lawsuit against him, and even had him arrested. I am calling for swift action to make sure this corruption NEVER happens again. Judge Boasburg, who granted the Biden DOJ the authority to spy on the phones of Senators, should be IMPEACHED. And Jack Smith, who ordered my phone to be surveilled, needs to be DISBARRED and THROWN IN JAIL. If they aren 't, I will sue the living hell out of every Biden official involved in this to make sure this NEVER happens to a conservative again. This fight is just getting started. Every single person involved must be held accountable. Thanks for letting me vent. Coach | Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

body:

| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e924099/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvTVJId3BzYXJyVg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTI/LbmNsUEVYSUc4TA/qP2hpZHM9bmNLS2tTb2R6QzhZNU1scw/gadvw4w/s3gf450618b)

| | Hey Patriot,
---
Here’s the deal...
We’re now just months away from **the most consequential midterm cycle** of our lifetime.
**Democrats smell blood.**
They’re pouring everything into regaining Congress so they can reopen the border, raise your taxes, and dismantle the America First agenda one piece at a time.
**Complacency is not an option.**
Turning Point PAC is not waiting. We are the only major conservative force that has already proven it can win the early-vote war that decides modern elections.
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e924099/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2JfYmZfZWxkX2JyXzIwMjYwNDEyLw/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MTI/LbmNsUEVYSUc4TA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDQwM2VtNCZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjgwM193cjE/gadvw4w/s5gc7e6f75d)
The Chase the Vote operation deployed thousands of ballot chasers across every battleground.
They didn’t just knock doors, they built real relationships, helped conservatives return their ballots, and put hundreds of thousands of votes on the board before Election Day.
_That work helped secure the White House and showed Republicans how to win the mail-in game._
For 2026 we’re expanding even bigger: full-time chasers already active, Super Chase neighborhood events rolling, and a growing list of endorsed America First champions who will protect our Congressional majority.
**Turning Point PAC is the organization that funds these exact programs.**
Your support directly powers the ballot-chasing army and the candidates who will stand with President Trump.
The ground war has already started. The Left is moving. Let’s make sure conservatives show up bigger, earlier, and stronger.

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Don’t let Republicans steal this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Republicans think they can win here
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129333969/613989128/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE4NmRjZC1hNDM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhYbArAJNw55Z9P97-_wyF3cGVuvcuHEwcyKRyKvCiI=)
Redistricting changed the game in California — and Republicans think they've found their opening.
Because of new district lines, I could soon be representing parts of conservative Orange County. That makes this race one of the GOP’s top targets in 2026 — and it means we have no time to waste.
**[So I’m asking you right now: can you chip in today to help us get ahead of this fight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129333970/613989129/789508428?refcode=260412_RG_steal-seat-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE4NmRjZC1hNDM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhYbArAJNw55Z9P97-_wyF3cGVuvcuHEwcyKRyKvCiI=)**
This race is already underway.
The moment the calendar flipped to 2026, the race accelerated more than ever before. Republicans are organizing, fundraising, and preparing to flip this seat. If we wait, we fall behind — and I’m not willing to let that happen.
I’ve fought to deliver results for working families, hold the powerful accountable, and defend our democracy. Now, because of redistricting, I’ll be reaching new communities where MAGA Republicans think they can win.
**They’re wrong. But proving them wrong takes work — and it takes resources.**
**[Winning a tougher district means starting early, building a serious operation, and hitting the ground running right now. Every day matters. Every contribution helps us define this race before our opponents do. If you believe this seat is worth fighting for, I’m asking again: please chip in today and help us start strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129333971/613989130/789508428?refcode=260412_RG_steal-seat-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE4NmRjZC1hNDM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhYbArAJNw55Z9P97-_wyF3cGVuvcuHEwcyKRyKvCiI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129333972/613989131/-309737922?refcode=260412_RG_steal-seat-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE4NmRjZC1hNDM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhYbArAJNw55Z9P97-_wyF3cGVuvcuHEwcyKRyKvCiI=)
The lines have changed. The stakes are higher. And this race has already started.
—Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129333973/613989132/-309737922?refcode=260412_RG_steal-seat-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTE4NmRjZC1hNDM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HhYbArAJNw55Z9P97-_wyF3cGVuvcuHEwcyKRyKvCiI=)

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: When I’m governor, I will bring down the cost of health care in Texas
body:
We need change.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
When people have to choose between paying for medicine and keeping their lights on, it’s clear our system is broken.
When I’m Governor, I’ll insure a million new Texans and lower health care costs for every Texan. It’s what we deserve.
**[If you’re with me, will you pitch in $5 toward my campaign for Texas governor, where I will fight to lower health care costs?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260412_2_healthcare.9DTubk&refcode=em20260412-903&amount=5&t=1&akid=903%2E299639%2ExzM5Ni)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260412_2_healthcare.9DTubk&amount=5&refcode=em20260412-903&t=20&akid=903%2E299639%2ExzM5Ni)
We’ve already seen that Greg Abbott will not rein in the insurance companies.
I don’t have a problem with people making money, but I _do_ have a problem with those in power taking our money and not giving us what we pay for.
We need change — for our kids, our families, and our communities.
And we have the power to make that change.
We have a huge fundraising deadline coming up, so I’m asking:
[**Can you donate $5 or anything at all to elect me as the next Governor of Texas?**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260412_2_healthcare.9DTubk&refcode=em20260412-903&amount=5&t=21&akid=903%2E299639%2ExzM5Ni)
Thank you for your support,
Gina

name: Tobias Read
subject: REPORT: DOJ sues Oregon
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs]
The Trump Administration’s Department of Justice filed a lawsuit against me.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs]
FIGHT BACK [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs]
Their demand? Access to Oregon’s voter registration list — including sensitive personal data like partial Social Security numbers and date of birth.
It's unprecedented. It’s targeted. And it’s dangerous.
Let me be clear: I did not and will never hand over Oregonians’ private data. I will stand up to the Trump administration’s DOJ, defend our elections, and protect your rights.
I have gotten the attention of the Trump Administration for standing up to them. President Trump’s allies want to weaponize the federal government against me — and against every voter who values free and fair elections, and privacy.
Grassroots support is our firewall. That means us. That means you.
We aim to raise $25,000 by our mid-month deadline to demonstrate our response to this abuse of power.
Can you help ensure my campaign is ready for this fight and send a donation now to defend Oregon and have my back? I will continue communicating directly about protecting our elections, and that takes resources. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260412em-sued-rs]
Trump’s DOJ lost this last round and we await their next step. But we know they won’t stop meddling in our elections.
Thank you,
Tobias Read

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: Here are a few facts you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I didn't think the Left could sink any lower than they did last cycle...

| | | | Peter,
I didn't think the Left could sink any lower than they did last cycle...
→ They vandalized my campaign office.
→ They lied about my record on veterans' issues, ignoring the fact that I am a veteran, my husband is a veteran, and I come from a military family.
→ They spent MILLIONS smearing my name and record.

But they have somehow found a new rock bottom:
→ They are working overtime to gerrymander Virginia's maps to rig this district against us. They know they can't beat me fairly, so they are trying to redraw the lines to steal this seat.
→ Chuck Schumer is busing in paid agitators to swing districts like mine—people who couldn't find our community on a map—just to create chaos.
→ A liberal Super PAC got caught pushing lies so egregious that they were forced to pull their own ads off the air.
Let me set the record straight with zero spin:
• For 10 years, I flew helicopters for the US Navy.
• I am married to a retired Navy pilot, and together, we raised four incredible kids.
• I used the GI Bill to become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner and serve our seniors.
• My life has been about service, not self-enrichment.
I am asking you directly because the need is real: chip in now to help me blast the TRUTH to voters. [The Super PACs attacking me have unlimited funds, but I rely on patriots like you to keep the lights on.](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNDEyX1NMLTZGLjExMDExN190MTg2ODg4MS0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDQxMl9TTC02Ri4xMTAxMTdfdDE4Njg4ODEtMjA2OCJ9/IfpQYfZYu528ye9e0IqJXA)[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY

Voters deserve facts, not dirty tricks...
This is shaping up to be the most brutal fight of my life. I need you in my corner to ensure we have the ammo to fire back.[CHIP IN TO SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY
](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNDEyX1NMLTZGLjExMDExN190MTg2ODg4MS0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDQxMl9TTC02Ri4xMTAxMTdfdDE4Njg4ODEtMjA2OCJ9/4SCPV2zWBLC5lBZFGmwz0g)If you can't donate, please just keep me in your prayers...! Thank you!
Jen Kiggans
| [](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.-Ia3NcPrefM_gZMg)I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America’s success! [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS
](https://trk.join.jenforcongress.)| | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress

name: Mayor Paige Cognetti
subject: I'm running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paige for PA
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-email-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-email-header]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/go0sURbgWkSnK_70mO3isg2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/go0sURbgWkSnK_70mO3isg2]

It's official Derek: I launched my campaign to represent Pennsylvania's 8th Congressional District in the U.S. House of Representatives.

As Mayor of Scranton, I’ve taken on corruption, cut costs and red tape, and fixed the city’s finances. Now I'm running for Congress because I can’t stand by and watch Rep. Rob Bresnahan day trade away our future while working families and seniors struggle.

I'm running because our district deserves a fighter in Washington — someone who is in public service to stand up for people, not to enrich themselves. Derek, can you sign on to join our campaign now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/go0sURbgWkSnK_70mO3isg2]

ENDORSE OUR CAMPAIGN [https://secure.ngpvan.com/go0sURbgWkSnK_70mO3isg2]

Rob Bresnahan is only in DC to pad his own bank account. He pledged to ban congressional stock trading, but has instead become one of the top stock traders in Congress.

Bresnahan has made more than 600 trades worth millions since getting to Washington. And he’s trading in the same industries he’s overseeing — dumping stock in a Medicaid provider right before voting for the largest cuts to Medicaid in history.

It’s not just that he’s making money off of the votes he takes — it’s that he ran on a promise to ban stock trading, one of many examples of lying to the people he represents.

I've spent six years as Mayor proving that government can work for the people — turning around Scranton's finances, taking on utility companies, and bringing in new businesses. Washington needs that same approach: taking on powerful interests and making government work for people, not politicians' bank accounts.

Can you become part of Team Paige by endorsing our campaign now? We need a representative in Congress who understands how hard things are and fights for people, instead of lying to them and voting to make life even harder. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/go0sURbgWkSnK_70mO3isg2]

Thank you for being a part of this,
Mayor Paige Cognetti
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-email-footer [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-email-footer]I'm Paige Cognetti. I ran for Mayor of Scranton as an independent to reform a corrupt City Hall. Over the past six years I've lowered costs, cut red tape, invested in public safety, brought in hundreds of new businesses, and created jobs. I'm running for Congress in PA-8 to take on a corrupt Washington, because government should work as hard as the people it serves.
If you're with me, join us by chipping in today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-email-footer]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cognetti-email-footer]
Paige for PA
PO Box 20134
Scranton, PA 18502
United States

Hey Peter, it's Valerie Foushee. I wanted to take a moment to share why my work in Congress means so much to me. It means the world to get to share my story with you, so I hope you’ll give it a read. But if you’re short on time, here’s the heart of it: **North Carolina is home.** I care deeply about this community, and I’m committed to doing everything I can to help it thrive. If that’s all you needed to hear, **[your support — even $10 — helps strengthen this grassroots effort and build a better future for North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335374/613992766/1563775268?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_041226_B1_MM01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzM4NmQzMC1hYzM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1U-bgkVXtZG2gqny61c0qmSD8r9qrxLB_ma0UzZjNIY=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335376/613992768/1563775268?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_041226_B1_MM01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzM4NmQzMC1hYzM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1U-bgkVXtZG2gqny61c0qmSD8r9qrxLB_ma0UzZjNIY=)

I grew up right here in Orange County, and I’ve witnessed this community’s highs and lows up close. From a young age, my parents taught me the value of hard work, caring for your neighbors, and committing yourself to service and education — lessons that shaped every step of my path.
From the Chapel Hill–Carrboro City Schools Board to the Orange County Board of Commissioners, and from the North Carolina General Assembly to the halls of Congress, my work has always been guided by the same principle: showing up for the community that raised me.
**Representing North Carolina’s Fourth Congressional District is one of my life’s greatest honors, and it wouldn’t be possible without your continued support.**
We continue to face persistent challenges — skyrocketing health care premiums, an affordability crisis that affects families across our community, and the daily pressures that make it harder for people to get ahead.
Yet these challenges only strengthen my resolve to find solutions, fight for our community, and ensure that everyone has the support they need to thrive.
**Right now, it’s clear that Washington isn’t working for the American people.** It’s time to turn the page on this disastrous Republican majority. We’ve got to put a stop to the chaos and get Congress back to work to make progress for the people.
I’m proud of the work I’ve accomplished, and I’m determined to continue fighting for our community in Congress.
**[And if you believe like I do, that our best days are ahead, I hope you’ll stand with me. If you’re ready for real solutions over failed leadership, will you consider a contribution of any amount to my campaign before my mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335378/613992770/1563775268?amount=10&source=VF_EM_FR_041226_B1_MM01&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzM4NmQzMC1hYzM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1U-bgkVXtZG2gqny61c0qmSD8r9qrxLB_ma0UzZjNIY=)**

We continue to face persistent challenges — skyrocketing health care premiums, an affordability crisis that affects families across our community, and the daily pressures that make it harder for people to get ahead. Yet these challenges only strengthen my resolve to find solutions, fight for our community, and ensure that everyone has the support they need to thrive. Right now, it’s clear that Washington isn’t working for the American people. It’s time to turn the page on this disastrous Republican majority. We’ve got to put a stop to the chaos and get Congress back to work to make progress for the people. I’m proud of the work I’ve accomplished, and I’m determined to continue fighting for our community in Congress. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Peter, I will never forget the way you have stepped up when I needed you most. Thank you for all you’ve done to support our campaign. With gratitude, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

subject: I almost didn’t send this
body:
Time is running out — but there's still a chance | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJc3pSfEux6A4egVO2Cay7-6po14JOOtZijqUUdu-jqRuIYSbXPdJk-clwhLlmIYsi6ZE2XlPmYxIg4vQ571y-k93i508Wz6_BWVbmfXCqoL0BF53ompdkqq5ONVg6gHEpAFYImrzm2SG9ixtfJ-FXVJgECQCLK0KIxxSpysHOUy2EUsMAE_Ht4GZzzXY0_pZun_4-cJyoQykFIItej_CbPioyMwPz5o-gnm51yMkBfBsHZ7J7FF31hgBIuk4KdPapX3V0btnQZjxyrI-OU0l4_rlbxEO_0DK0V1izzqx0S94oa5G7kw6UziPgci15yHhSAPaIZVL7pMyihIOsGoEa_dz03JFPaXfZ_bdSWcxxCWNn3QN-6EOc1Jt9gHHM4kdVKmCHfGYeM6wtXJtxSN-trRFCLkOo5Mfhm7QPxOFUeBIYrt7u4tPR7Bh2zojUxE9k-IsYxe57uP-ENznuyJ3udA%3D%3D)
---
| | Patriot,
---
I'm going to be blunt with you.

We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit.

Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way."

Right now.

And the scariest part?

It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms.

High schools. Colleges.

Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped.

If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: _" What happened to this country?" _

You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly.

Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything...

The other side is doing something far more dangerous.

They're raising the next generation.

Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places.

That's how countries are lost.

Slowly. Then all at once.

But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope...

There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged.

_And it shouldn 't even exist. _

**Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools.**
That alone felt like a miracle.

Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have.

Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down.

And yet...

_They stepped up anyway. _

About that time, Charlie called me.

He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent.

"Andrew, we've got to move faster."

I told him we were. He stopped me.

"No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools."

I actually laughed.

"Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America."

"Okay," he said. "How many are there?"

"About 27,000."

And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000."

I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools.

We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet.

But Charlie wasn't fazed.

_" We'll figure it out." _

That was him.

He didn't wait for perfect conditions.

Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... _we lose everything. _

And now?

Less than a year later...
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJAPX8XWMvZx8l-KY5M3Ah5gWcSa0f2S0RoyJo-Pucj06oUoJE2K3620nATg-oeZtqQS6-JO5S9YZ-xJat2RoYBQfcrteZQnCrr-mGHjBs34jcM6Xle4a9OEvr4xGXpBEMtJTAoaKf5Q9VrpwSzC5ALHIjvY5Lqyr0MA9LfxvIKBBjfJKrAcg7VavEiZbXlff4QsaY-lFAWed6wWGaAXJHrCxsbbashoxyXkktS6zF45kzeUaV47kJS-iaQOgMb50DlIvJGEt1wt-ZjPXTYRFYtwSFUkpOJTFR6FyeFlDZqAPzL4OM6GtPCvBaOevuFzyiqZvMch85qw4UXnK9QYlDrqrSJgMSl1qOA1Uv5RQqLLjB7xiOfi_hSMwONthXIb2fjkav0ySCIXMWnUz-K3wzkLXuBfSJL_yYRz5S3At9jk2T_iGbhQ99P4UmcLQZSXPLIVU8cEhkhG3L-kbkaIFCPw%3D%3D)
---
**We 're in 3,300 schools. **

**Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. **

**Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. **

_That shouldn 't be possible. _

Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day.

And yet... it's still happening.

_But Patriot, here 's the part you need to understand: _

This is not a victory. It's a foothold.

_Because in the other 87% of schools? _

There is no resistance. None.

Just one-sided propaganda from the Left.

One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them.

That's the reality.

The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are.

The question is whether it's enough.

Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America...

They're not the majority. _They 're the exception. _

They're the ones willing to take the heat.

The ones willing to stand alone.

The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: _" I love this country." _
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJV-hVTS-bWJEN2l7xG0Ig3C2jmRgFmue-aqIbokWelp3OgmNhzWX6WhsZFOFagmOmPlPtLUkK5W5s-ovpObRVyy5vc4ILXkNJofqBDkY3kkQ4rv7TK_xtmS2TBxG_xKgSro1UWpaYWzmFU0lYBtmGwOOoAs2m1yeYUJHOYIF3niytYipl_PekCSBnGg6_j5qRCF1X6PNoGZ9yj-m_ycGY3iIxttcXSUld5bnFN_CxFhZKl2BPGBUq52rvxANJmrkNPt761hyQt2c3hAlWqzr9YD2EmuX9XguBFNk9eHE-HDNIwiq2Ar11V3XT7ELxPCTfFTxI7HBgxk5XqrbrMZlE2CitQv2h0hmpALSkOb2J6ayYqqN3gFAtKpx0S-jKFSC-kANd4xSTLhc73eBTdAwbzcaB9uPEmgFq1mWfMbuKmBhmHn0KbMuAJznGyorQ_bFW8WjcTDFZx0gE68-Of8iG8g%3D%3D)
---
And every time one of those students raises their hand...

We have a choice.

Back them. _Or leave them on their own. _

**Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. **

Everything they need to actually stand their ground.

Not symbolically. For real.

They've already made the decision to lead.

All they're waiting on... is you and me.

**Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. **

$25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school.

$25 to put real tools in their hands.

$25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time.

**[And Patriot, I’m asking you to send backup to these brave students on the frontlines with your gift to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJKKueox1LkTOBTUhK3Cq2ofDSklrYuXwpQ5YYfxNlM1G3EMZ7loVwv8GvDTRSsn84P5Q25PCFb6qbE3gVgAkYhEddHsugB7uIQuMGVuYso9oALVhDbH52rAC30osNXw-t05WaY-I1MO3ByNW6cbydh2kB0z1EcWctNYa5_VIesays8oUiX3b59NB5p_R3lSW4oTPmzenl5re2WBkrXwZBNynIx3snSESEeXA_vOq1gtdF6NTTys2hrhYwkflRZNIWqo3suCrnnH5Og7n9He2i5B1BzuSu8Nmd3PDJwmPnsTcIbAu7D3KsD-EDbpxI78HzXLrbkircgvlpjSisYkJnlbLmiX2XC5sWKdJgq9nuHgha4KHjEAqSO31uMSnaghHjwJPNfO1glIy56fkbPgEpyRclm2aPae68M_xgYr6pc79wVPQKem9zluEABo9WBesxPj8RuIbldTkiSYIY-m0nKw%3D%3D)**

---
But here's what gives me hope, Patriot...

Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating.

Because every day, more students are stepping forward.

Not because it's easy or popular...

_But because they know what 's at stake. _

They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to.

They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged.

They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform.

And they're not alone.

They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day.

They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending.
---

---
That's how movements are built.

Not from the top down... _But from the ground up. _

One student. One school. One chapter at a time.

And Patriot -- that's exactly how we take this country back.

But only if we move fast enough.

Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break.

They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in.

And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction...

Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes.

And once it closes... It closes for good.

That's what's at stake.

Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- _while it still matters. _

**[Please act today and send an activism kit straight to the frontlines.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJs5GjsDBDVW0sUPoCGL8C3lEUPaHqI5y5KJOg1TPECnITbz2D-iCumhoPD6f7kpeGDsfn4A4PzdbVtSVXAItE3BuC8d1yt1bdZ_q1ALw1Yx6qbGbDKPHt78su5IuovWB5ih5a09GNITMiioM6yieDqNQc7EYsQoL_HpRLfQXP430U25iCcclSB9gXFY9j1mVvAP0VaXzyThbPz3N2lhdhZYFAH4pofF5aIEfc0exBZM52YFzbWHdVJONWl_GWT9gHkPwz8yk6vRhqoSfpzKzx5W9hL11eDBWdx05THkOITkaGVQk0m2Doxt8vbVNuiBWboW0AXcGfAMzFQMrzRrarSlP-QHtyW7TKJE4vdnJ2OKnYkzKDvLqIDtyAG7Y5XIvMd6qlh9FetwSAjXwyJl44u8tg4OFoyr_wOH0gJ0kxBifxJNNkl14H5OrFgVOb3JZcOz_3SC0jECzPvTeUXbCevA%3D%3D)**

**P.S.** I need you to hear this clearly...

Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress.

He was warning us:

"The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. **_We don 't have time to wait._" **

And he was right. Look around.

Club America may be in 13% of high schools...

_But in the other 87%? _

There is no pushback against the Left.

No one telling those kids the truth.

Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth.

And once that pipeline is complete... _It 's over. _

**Patriot, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. **

You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do.

But you can give critical support to a young freedom fighter who will.

**[Every $25 you give today puts the tools in the hands of another student who’s already chosen courage.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJ0IE9iTDSM1EwPmiXjy_dXWsHorYBTw3GzpYeKNslqMAWHNOlfgfZy8pLlm5nJLANGRhX10UjPmKNA148u6LXtdGlTceI-9SWf4w78o7KJY4IGW6VSAQlvYebdwzf5ngb5atLkXGhVxfQRulx8mM1VQ255Vp6Vt5v9xQUOkius-2vUEu5mvTKScOldN7EPgKd0qkJhon0nL9O1PaRd_y_qJApX35pJ4XSDQyMyo3QaqVKzecosUuontGlMWLUoUP-M2_lowJiJh8RUsra9KhTCJ5qvBFd9-PhNIWmK6WiFBkle-9UxhJP07iI6B1SKOg4UkzwAxv60oDh6ZU9QS_IjYOGc3rx0Nrsm36oTQkbEOkn8n2wtYWuA5L_tiVmWJFXLzUEKXIaAhnFV-sel3OokNrQlXKlOg5op1Eb_J8aE1fImYHKEK0m2PM9k5bhxlDYCXVe2vN_4_B8yVvepY3_fA%3D%3D)**

There's still time to turn this country around... and this is one of the few ways we can actually do it -- one student, one school, one chapter at a time.
---
[ **Support Turning Point USA**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=4b17222fda9940a1a3ccc8d8009eb437&_e=5eSN4V1ZObdbFKdv1REpBKRl0xyvPj_tC_6lzDR_HhlFedTHCQbQIUKkZkMqPKWI1iWLnFQI2wH0cMIB3jNh9acdZ4RjjnJehnryCI2M3EaORfcFD0BKL1cmDVyw67nD429CplujMRSxZIiYnwrSmqwxpf7VOPBSDGKX8Hy4-erKX-bT3HnKsT7C8FZ5XvGhGGH1AdkxnBIyFdvGoeDAeHGfQ9-rclgCIMUhIBiozKvfLudmt-nB-vBH4npTqaeJPxZg3OnkeezvYx-NgyYrULvvapm23rwQYBG4q4q2djoAPoMD9V82_Cs876N-nKmrz3DtyvD62J_6HlvddiAzSHOK38LxGc12aS6MEJAqnExGy3tefXlQDTDHdMfeb46BQMNujS1YICLyKioO3AhW2HJNk5e2VZKY3bXpF82J0a8UwbGw26slU3fIkYrk2kkNTD916UfA7BFmbvdHLqvZBEkrBFgRIQ2Z9Asjk2poGGea_Cdzxl54aD0BTy-ix2a0ldrs1U2eTZ4bWNGECWndcTcAohtomRe7WqaDmCTfUt9oCVWPcmNykr4uWjNzY6r0n2B6cTEOSYO3HQINEe7pxRrN_V7uHhy0kM__IbdHHZGEvRVWTveWAvjYlNlHA6618Wv269KISJEF2Ru8_2h7OFfb5qZuh3McyBDt41zvxFjtERTrs1EutNcti5tnzSbGIphBnJVv5GUmITuB_LyjtQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Time is running out — but there's still a chance | | | | | Patriot, I'm going to be blunt with you. We are closer to losing this country than most people are willing to admit. Not someday. Not "if things keep going this way." Right now. And the scariest part? It's not happening in Washington. It's happening in classrooms. High schools. Colleges. Places where the next generation is being shaped -- or more accurately... reshaped. If you've ever looked at what's coming out of our schools and thought: " What happened to this country?" You're not wrong. You're seeing it clearly. Because while most people are arguing online... while they're hoping things will turn around... while they're waiting for the next election to fix everything... The other side is doing something far more dangerous. They're raising the next generation. Earlier. Faster. And with zero resistance in most places. That's how countries are lost. Slowly. Then all at once. But here's the thing that should give a patriot like you hope... There is one place where that trend is actually being challenged. And it shouldn 't even exist. Just one year ago, Turning Point USA 's high school program -- which is now called "Club America" -- was in about 1,200 schools. That alone felt like a miracle. Because starting even ONE chapter today takes courage most adults don't have. Conservative students get mocked. Targeted. Threatened. Shut down. And yet... They stepped up anyway. About that time, Charlie called me. He didn't sound optimistic... He sounded urgent. "Andrew, we've got to move faster." I told him we were. He stopped me. "No. You're not thinking what I'm thinking. I want to be in 35,000 high schools." I actually laughed. "Charlie... there aren't even 35,000 high schools in America." "Okay," he said. "How many are there?" "About 27,000." And without hesitation: "Good. Let's do 27,000." I remember sitting there thinking to myself... we're barely in 1,200 schools. We didn't have the staff. We didn't have the infrastructure. We didn't even have the roadmap yet. But Charlie wasn't fazed. " We'll figure it out." That was him. He didn't wait for perfect conditions. Because he knew something most people don't want to face: If we wait... we lose everything. And now? Less than a year later... We 're in 3,300 schools. Thirteen percent of all high schools in America. Eight states are now backing this effort to put a Club America chapter in every high school statewide. That shouldn 't be possible. Not in this environment. Not with the level of hostility these students face every single day. And yet... it's still happening. But Patriot, here 's the part you need to understand: This is not a victory. It's a foothold. Because in the other 87% of schools? There is no resistance. None. Just one-sided propaganda from the Left. One-sided pressure on kids who are too young to even realize what's happening to them. That's the reality. The question isn't whether we're fighting. We are. The question is whether it's enough. Because right now, the students stepping up through Club America... They're not the majority. They 're the exception. They're the ones willing to take the heat. The ones willing to stand alone. The ones willing to risk being targeted just to say: " I love this country." And every time one of those students raises their hand... We have a choice. Back them. Or leave them on their own. Because when a student starts a chapter, we send them an activism kit -- with American flags. Pocket Constitutions. Leadership tools. Everything they need to actually stand their ground. Not symbolically. For real. They've already made the decision to lead. All they're waiting on... is you and me. Each activism kit costs $25. That 's it. $25 to make sure one student doesn't have to stand alone against the Left in a hostile school. $25 to put real tools in their hands. $25 to push back -- even if it's one campus at a time. But here's what gives me hope, Patriot... Club America isn't slowing down. It's accelerating. Because every day, more students are stepping forward. Not because it's easy or popular... But because they know what 's at stake. They're starting chapters in schools where they were told not to. They're speaking truth in classrooms where the Left once went unchallenged. They're choosing courage in places designed to make them conform. And they're not alone. They're finding each other. They're bringing more students with them every day. They're building something real -- rooted in faith and freedom, grounded in truth, and unafraid to say that America is worth defending. That's how movements are built. Not from the top down... But from the ground up. One student. One school. One chapter at a time. And Patriot -- that's exactly how we take this country back. But only if we move fast enough. Because the Left isn't slowing down. They're not taking a break. They're not afraid to push their anti-American ideas in every classroom they're in. And if we don't match that urgency... if we don't meet that moment with equal conviction... Then the generational window Charlie Kirk opened to save our country closes. And once it closes... It closes for good. That's what's at stake. Let's not waste this moment. Let's back our brave students -- while it still matters. | | For Charlie, Andrew Sypher Chief Field OfficerTurning Point USA P.S. I need you to hear this clearly... Charlie Kirk wasn't just dreaming big when he called me last year about Club America's progress. He was warning us: "The enemy is moving younger. They're coming after students earlier. We don 't have time to wait." And he was right. Look around. Club America may be in 13% of high schools... But in the other 87%? There is no pushback against the Left. No one telling those kids the truth. Just a Leftist pipeline -- from classroom... to belief... to voting booth. And once that pipeline is complete... It 's over. Patriot, this is one of the last places a patriot like you can stop it before it 's too late to save our country. You may not be able to step into a hostile high school and stand for truth like these students do. But you can give critical support to a young freedom fighter who will. There's still time to turn this country around... and this is one of the few ways we can actually do it -- one student, one school, one chapter at a time. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044
