# [Whipsawed](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/04/12/whipsawed/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on April 12, 2026
---
| **District Round-up 04.12.26**
---
Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e7123fec34d8c07368b0264e91457094955149510f0401119bfd3d19863f11a5&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5338fe0ccb663ec2e6cb6d19b585b9f7&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0)**
---
| **Whipsawed**
---
Many thanks to DFA Gettysburg for publishing this week’s Legislative Corner while we are all still recovering from the horrendous statements of the President of the United States on the heels of the high holiday of those who purport to be Christian.
---
_Dear Reader,_
---
_I am sorry to learn of the wrench in your neck as you were whipsawed yesterday from the President of the United States declaiming, “A whole civilization will die tonight, never to be brought back again,” to, mere hours later, “...I agree to suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks,” – all announced by social media posts, instead of press conferences, an address of the nation, or any other normal way The President might make such pronouncements to the American People._
---
_Well, no American president should ever make his first pronouncement. Because of it, over 70 lawmakers immediately called upon members of Trump’s cabinet and leaders of both houses of Congress to invoke the 25th Amendment which reads in Section 4. “Whenever the Vice President and a majority of either the principal officers of the executive departments or of such other body as Congress may by law provide, transmit to the President pro tempore of the Senate and the Speaker of the House of Representatives their written declaration that the President is unable to discharge the powers and duties of his office, the Vice President shall immediately assume the powers and duties of the office as Acting President.”_
---
_Unfortunately, no matter what crimes against humanity and constitutional law Trump commits, his cabinet wholeheartedly approves and Republicans in Congress, like our own U.S. Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, silently condone them._
---
_While I’m not a doctor, I feel safe in diagnosing our country’s illness as, “Republican Necrosis” with obvious symptoms such as: abuses of power, oath betrayals, treason, utter corruption, grift, denial of Due Process, lying, and breathtaking incompetence with secondary complications of extreme stress, higher costs of living, and, of course, neck pain._
---
_In such a severe case, I can only prescribe – “VoteDemocratsOnly” which is the brand name, or by its generic name – “ProgressivesSaveOurCountry.” By inhibiting Republican power through the uptake of Impeachment and Removal from Office, many of those above complications would subside over time._
---
_Side effects include, but are not limited to: public trials of criminals such as an elected president, members of his cabinet, corrupt Supreme Court justices, and Members of Congress, re-establishing trust with jilted Allies, rebuilding social safety nets of Medicaid, Medicare, ACA, and SNAP for those in need, affirming a truly representative American Democracy with a Congress that does not abandon its power, other very involved processes to counter the harm of Republican Necrosis._
---
_But this 250 year old patient is worth saving._
---
_Take two doses – the first on May 19th and second on November 3rd – and reach out to me anytime before either. If successful, you should start to feel some relief by the morning of November 4th._
---
_To learn more about my campaign, including how I would vote on recent legislation in comparison to John Joyce, please visit my website:[www.bethfarnhamforcongress.com](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=6e77ec6d635e2a54c8c87dbc111fa3e9540f38979339cc936b2023dc096a8b0e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=31f04f4029885c35a0d712ee5550d8e4&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9ncmV6OC5yLnNwMS1icmV2by5uZXQvbWsvY2wvZi9zaC8xZjhKSUtYd0hHYkVnSWtLZTl4TmtkWmJGaC9zcmc5ZDFVRGVYek4&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0) where you can also sign up for my newsletter, District Round-up._
---
_Together, we Choose Democracy and the health of our country!_
---
_Sincerely,_
---
_Beth_
---
| | **Punishing Everyday Americans at the Gas Pump**
---
| | |
---|---|---
Everyday Americans are being punished at the gas pump for Trump’s war on Iran.
---
Monday’s gas price at the same Cross Keys Sheetz in Adams County is up another $.20.
---
That’s a $.40 increase within a two week time period.
---
But it doesn’t have to be this way.
---
You can stop the pain by voting for sane people like me, Beth Farnham, to represent us in Congress and check the power of an abusive president.
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=026dfeafba1ae677fb676cdd91323455d854169fa171e3208aea96bc0009913a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=95aebdd32d1c06e694909ecf302a75f2&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0) and Affordability!
---
| **Fighting the Transource Power Line**
---
| |
---
In the fight against the Transource Power Line Project, testimony at PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS is paramount.
---
Last night, I attended an informative presentation hosted by the Coalition to Protect Franklin County (CTPFC) whose mission includes, “...To procure the rich, agricultural heritage of Franklin County so as to be free from unnecessary and harmful impacts to our landowners, to our environment, and to our waterways.”
---
Lori Rice and Karen delivered important information of fighting the Rice Ringold Transource power line project that is proposed to run 29 miles right through the heart of Franklin County, sprouting 5-7 towers, each 13 stories high, per mile, cutting a 130 ft wide path. Besides the infringement of this blight on cherished farmland, pristine woods, and natural habitats, the power line will require pesticide spraying, maintenance, and untold effects of the electromagnetic fields (EMF)s on the health of those who live nearby.
---
And no one has justified this intrusion, except maybe, the proposed awful AI Data Centers that Elon Musk and his supporters are trying to force everywhere.
---
My takeaway?
---
We can fight this.
---
Ten years ago, CTPFC successfully fought off such and endeavor, and recently, the eastern part of this proposed project was effectiviely shot down.
---
Darryl Lawrence who currently serves as the Consumer Advocate of Pennsylvania’s Office of Consumer Advocacy (OCA) presented a slide show which I’ll link in the comments and relayed the importance of PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS. His office will request them after Transource’s parent company, PJM, files an application with the Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission to build the powerline.
---
What can the people do?
---
Show up, swear in, deliver written statements, and make verbal statements at the PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS. At PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS, the testimony of live people, or that of their physically-delivered statements not only goes onto the record of the case, but can be used by the OCA for their arguments on behalf of the utility rate-paying customers.
---
And ohmygoodness are customers paying those rates.
---
You see, those big power companies have a lot of perks on their side and two of them cost the ratepayers in ways the general public usually doesn’t know about.
---
The first is most concerning – even if the power company abandons the project, it may be reimbursed a significant amount of money for having agreed to the project in the first place. In other words, rate-paying customers have to pay the power company for money they would have earned. Not all of it, but not nothing.
---
The second is that power companies are incentivized to build because rate-payers begin paying when they’ve only begun the project. In other words, the project does not have to be completed before customers are seeing bigger bills.
---
So it’s crucial that the power company never gets any agreement in the first place.
---
Meanwhile, and this is getting down in the weeds, because the power company was successfully rebuffed by the Third Circuit Court recently, PJM decided that since a component of their business is regulated by the federal government, then the state of Pennsylvania had no right of “supremacy” to supercede any agreement they have with the federal government and refuse them their build.
---
Therefore, a 3 out of 9 judge decision in Harrisburg’s Middle District Court was taken to allow the case to proceed past the Supreme Court of Pennsylvania and go straight to a federal court to be argued. However, that Middle District Court made that decision without the full bench, so State Attorney General, Dave Sunday, who appointed Daryl Lawrence, on behalf of OCA is requesting that it be decided by the full bench. If PJM would simply acknowledge that states have authority over siting of transmission lines, granted to them through the Federal Powers Act, then taxpayers wouldn’t have to waste their hard-earned money fighting this nonsense on top of rising utility bills.
---
There are other considerations, such as PJM not acknowledging the nearly $200 million they spent in litigation, etc, when calculating their benefit/cost ratio to land above the 1.25 threshold and some weird leaps in their annual declared benefit/cost ratios, but you can discuss that with Karen.
---
Lastly, it’s important to make the point –
---
IF the power lines are justified by the need of the community, then PJM doesn’t have to force a new path across the precious landscape – they have ample ability to bury lines where the infrastructure already exists, or they can run them under or next to local highways. Sure, it costs them more money, but saving the land, and therefore the people, the flora, and the fauna, are worth it.
---
| **“Graphic Design is My Passion”**
---
A number of weeks ago, I was encouraged to make more social media posts with graphic design, so here are a few. Enjoy!
---
| | |
---|---|---
---
| **Meeting Voters in Mifflin and Juniata Counties**
---
Many thanks to [Mifflin County Democrats](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=eb4d53ce1ad6160de2c2aea417d3ec1411bf30f95eba6a03f629106ecfbd036f&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=89d1102d205375d6993039af317c8480&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0) and [Juniata County Democratic Committee](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=52494a81979bc79f5b6aedad710e8b8bcc13d3972554e62cf29d5e8cc432b81a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5123ea390de3f9a04e80810d8a3a8ad4&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0) candidate meetings today! I truly enjoyed being able to take the time to answer voter questions alongside Sean Steeg, John Zangari, Wendy Morgan, and Connor Lamb.
---
Sidenotes – the Mifflin brunch was fantastic and Connor Lamb very graciously shared the microphone after his speech to let the candidates keep answering questions from voters. We look forward to him running his next race!
---
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4407ebc35f93b42ffe29fad3babca7d1645bfd056cee7c4829a00d51abbba566&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=1b30698ecdd6163587e75ab054a17e06&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0) !
---
| |
---
| **Charity of the Week!**
---
Please donate, if you can, to Central Pennsylvania Food Bank!
---
“The Central Pennsylvania Food Bank is a nonprofit dedicated to ending hunger in 27 central Pennsylvania counties. An affiliate of [Feeding America](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=98f7c41f5c1266f91f5720019d7aa1750cdb52e15aed97282692bd5373c92462&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=3453805e1904f81498b82f46d7ff0290&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5mZWVkaW5nYW1lcmljYS5vcmcv&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0) and [Feeding Pennsylvania](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=a6eae6ca8d4de5e06a258d356875e3bbca873aa63c3f902fd9f277051618f24e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6999&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=b93238d6b9f0e6cfea08704b7b5b989d&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5mZWVkaW5ncGEub3JnLw=&email_id=e11a297068c9379923018357526cf2b0), we partner with nearly 1,100 local agencies to provide nutritious food, build community collaboration, and advance innovative solutions.
---
Since opening our doors in 1982 in a converted movie theater in Steelton, we have grown into a multi-hub food distribution organization grounded in strategic infrastructure and community impact. In 1994, following a successful $1.5 million capital campaign, we moved into our purpose-built warehouse in Harrisburg. That facility expanded in 2012 to 75,000 square feet, enhancing our capacity to deliver fresh, healthy food.
---
In 2002, we added a second Healthy Food Hub in Williamsport to better serve the northern tier of our territory, and that facility underwent a major expansion in 2016 to support deeper rural reach and partner growth.
---
**In 2025, we opened the Hollidaysburg Healthy Food Hub in the Allegheny Mountain region, to serve Blair, Bedford, Centre, Clearfield, Fulton, Huntingdon, and Mifflin counties. This new hub boosts healthy food distribution, expands cold-storage capacity, and strengthens our ability to source local food for communities that have faced persistent gaps in access.** “
---

clean_body: District Round-up 04.12.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you... | | | | | or ---|---|--- By Elizabeth Farnham on April 12, 2026 | District Round-up 04.12.26 Dear Neighbor, Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: | Whipsawed Many thanks to DFA Gettysburg for publishing this week’s Legislative Corner while we are all still recovering from the horrendous statements of the President of the United States on the heels of the high holiday of those who purport to be Christian. Dear Reader, I am sorry to learn of the wrench in your neck as you were whipsawed yesterday from the President of the United States declaiming, “A whole civilization will die tonight, never to be brought back again,” to, mere hours later, “...I agree to suspend the bombing and attack of Iran for a period of two weeks,” – all announced by social media posts, instead of press conferences, an address of the nation, or any other normal way The President might make such pronouncements to the American People. Well, no American president should ever make his first pronouncement. Because of it, over 70 lawmakers immediately called upon members of Trump’s cabinet and leaders of both houses of Congress to invoke the 25th Amendment which reads in Section 4. “Whenever the Vice President and a majority of either the principal officers of the executive departments or of such other body as Congress may by law provide, transmit to the President pro tempore of the Senate and the Speaker of the House of Representatives their written declaration that the President is unable to discharge the powers and duties of his office, the Vice President shall immediately assume the powers and duties of the office as Acting President.” Unfortunately, no matter what crimes against humanity and constitutional law Trump commits, his cabinet wholeheartedly approves and Republicans in Congress, like our own U.S. Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, silently condone them. While I’m not a doctor, I feel safe in diagnosing our country’s illness as, “Republican Necrosis” with obvious symptoms such as: abuses of power, oath betrayals, treason, utter corruption, grift, denial of Due Process, lying, and breathtaking incompetence with secondary complications of extreme stress, higher costs of living, and, of course, neck pain. In such a severe case, I can only prescribe – “VoteDemocratsOnly” which is the brand name, or by its generic name – “ProgressivesSaveOurCountry.” By inhibiting Republican power through the uptake of Impeachment and Removal from Office, many of those above complications would subside over time. Side effects include, but are not limited to: public trials of criminals such as an elected president, members of his cabinet, corrupt Supreme Court justices, and Members of Congress, re-establishing trust with jilted Allies, rebuilding social safety nets of Medicaid, Medicare, ACA, and SNAP for those in need, affirming a truly representative American Democracy with a Congress that does not abandon its power, other very involved processes to counter the harm of Republican Necrosis. But this 250 year old patient is worth saving. Take two doses – the first on May 19th and second on November 3rd – and reach out to me anytime before either. If successful, you should start to feel some relief by the morning of November 4th. To learn more about my campaign, including how I would vote on recent legislation in comparison to John Joyce, please visit my website: where you can also sign up for my newsletter, District Round-up. Together, we Choose Democracy and the health of our country! Sincerely, Beth | | Punishing Everyday Americans at the Gas Pump | | | ---|---|--- Everyday Americans are being punished at the gas pump for Trump’s war on Iran. Monday’s gas price at the same Cross Keys Sheetz in Adams County is up another $.20. That’s a $.40 increase within a two week time period. But it doesn’t have to be this way. You can stop the pain by voting for sane people like me, Beth Farnham, to represent us in Congress and check the power of an abusive president. Together, we and Affordability! | Fighting the Transource Power Line | | In the fight against the Transource Power Line Project, testimony at PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS is paramount. Last night, I attended an informative presentation hosted by the Coalition to Protect Franklin County (CTPFC) whose mission includes, “...To procure the rich, agricultural heritage of Franklin County so as to be free from unnecessary and harmful impacts to our landowners, to our environment, and to our waterways.” Lori Rice and Karen delivered important information of fighting the Rice Ringold Transource power line project that is proposed to run 29 miles right through the heart of Franklin County, sprouting 5-7 towers, each 13 stories high, per mile, cutting a 130 ft wide path. Besides the infringement of this blight on cherished farmland, pristine woods, and natural habitats, the power line will require pesticide spraying, maintenance, and untold effects of the electromagnetic fields (EMF)s on the health of those who live nearby. And no one has justified this intrusion, except maybe, the proposed awful AI Data Centers that Elon Musk and his supporters are trying to force everywhere. My takeaway? We can fight this. Ten years ago, CTPFC successfully fought off such and endeavor, and recently, the eastern part of this proposed project was effectiviely shot down. Darryl Lawrence who currently serves as the Consumer Advocate of Pennsylvania’s Office of Consumer Advocacy (OCA) presented a slide show which I’ll link in the comments and relayed the importance of PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS. His office will request them after Transource’s parent company, PJM, files an application with the Pennsylvania Public Utility Commission to build the powerline. What can the people do? Show up, swear in, deliver written statements, and make verbal statements at the PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS. At PUBLIC INPUT HEARINGS, the testimony of live people, or that of their physically-delivered statements not only goes onto the record of the case, but can be used by the OCA for their arguments on behalf of the utility rate-paying customers. And ohmygoodness are customers paying those rates. You see, those big power companies have a lot of perks on their side and two of them cost the ratepayers in ways the general public usually doesn’t know about. The first is most concerning – even if the power company abandons the project, it may be reimbursed a significant amount of money for having agreed to the project in the first place. In other words, rate-paying customers have to pay the power company for money they would have earned. Not all of it, but not nothing. The second is that power companies are incentivized to build because rate-payers begin paying when they’ve only begun the project. In other words, the project does not have to be completed before customers are seeing bigger bills. So it’s crucial that the power company never gets any agreement in the first place. Meanwhile, and this is getting down in the weeds, because the power company was successfully rebuffed by the Third Circuit Court recently, PJM decided that since a component of their business is regulated by the federal government, then the state of Pennsylvania had no right of “supremacy” to supercede any agreement they have with the federal government and refuse them their build. Therefore, a 3 out of 9 judge decision in Harrisburg’s Middle District Court was taken to allow the case to proceed past the Supreme Court of Pennsylvania and go straight to a federal court to be argued. However, that Middle District Court made that decision without the full bench, so State Attorney General, Dave Sunday, who appointed Daryl Lawrence, on behalf of OCA is requesting that it be decided by the full bench. If PJM would simply acknowledge that states have authority over siting of transmission lines, granted to them through the Federal Powers Act, then taxpayers wouldn’t have to waste their hard-earned money fighting this nonsense on top of rising utility bills. There are other considerations, such as PJM not acknowledging the nearly $200 million they spent in litigation, etc, when calculating their benefit/cost ratio to land above the 1.25 threshold and some weird leaps in their annual declared benefit/cost ratios, but you can discuss that with Karen. Lastly, it’s important to make the point – IF the power lines are justified by the need of the community, then PJM doesn’t have to force a new path across the precious landscape – they have ample ability to bury lines where the infrastructure already exists, or they can run them under or next to local highways. Sure, it costs them more money, but saving the land, and therefore the people, the flora, and the fauna, are worth it. | “Graphic Design is My Passion” A number of weeks ago, I was encouraged to make more social media posts with graphic design, so here are a few. Enjoy! | | | ---|---|--- | Meeting Voters in Mifflin and Juniata Counties Many thanks to and candidate meetings today! I truly enjoyed being able to take the time to answer voter questions alongside Sean Steeg, John Zangari, Wendy Morgan, and Connor Lamb. Sidenotes – the Mifflin brunch was fantastic and Connor Lamb very graciously shared the microphone after his speech to let the candidates keep answering questions from voters. We look forward to him running his next race! Together, we ! | | | Charity of the Week! Please donate, if you can, to Central Pennsylvania Food Bank! “The Central Pennsylvania Food Bank is a nonprofit dedicated to ending hunger in 27 central Pennsylvania counties. An affiliate of and , we partner with nearly 1,100 local agencies to provide nutritious food, build community collaboration, and advance innovative solutions. Since opening our doors in 1982 in a converted movie theater in Steelton, we have grown into a multi-hub food distribution organization grounded in strategic infrastructure and community impact. In 1994, following a successful $1.5 million capital campaign, we moved into our purpose-built warehouse in Harrisburg. That facility expanded in 2012 to 75,000 square feet, enhancing our capacity to deliver fresh, healthy food. In 2002, we added a second Healthy Food Hub in Williamsport to better serve the northern tier of our territory, and that facility underwent a major expansion in 2016 to support deeper rural reach and partner growth. In 2025, we opened the Hollidaysburg Healthy Food Hub in the Allegheny Mountain region, to serve Blair, Bedford, Centre, Clearfield, Fulton, Huntingdon, and Mifflin counties. This new hub boosts healthy food distribution, expands cold-storage capacity, and strengthens our ability to source local food for communities that have faced persistent gaps in access. “ Please visit their website: | Beth volunteering at the Harrisburg Hub| Jack volunteering at the Harrisburg Hub ---|--- | Comparing and Contrasting Votes on Legislation Check out how Joyce recently voted, how I would have voted in comparison, and why! | | If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. name: Roy Cooper
subject: We can win this swing state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I’ve never lost a race.
#
Taking back legislative power in Washington during these midterm elections is how we can quell the federal government’s dangerous actions. By electing Democrats and flipping the U.S. Senate, we can return accountability to our government. We can restore the checks and balances that are designed to protect the people from the powerful.
**[I’m asking you to join me with a donation to split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee today. Can I count on you to be among the donors to help hit our April goal? Give $5, $50, or whatever works for you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102706?refcode=em20260412-10299&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10299%2E614464%2EY50pEM)**
Peter, you already know that our race here in North Carolina is the key to whether we can take back the Senate for the people. Both parties are counting on this seat to build their majorities.
And it really could go either way. **This is one of only three Senate contests rated “toss-up” — and North Carolina is one of the last true swing states on the map.**
Right-wing Republicans are going to great lengths to defeat me (they’re willing to invest just about any amount of money against us) because they’re terrified that we can flip this seat blue for the first time since 2008.
**[But Peter, this is set to be the toughest fight of my career, and I am counting on you to be with me. Please pitch in any amount to split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee that fits in your budget today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102706?refcode=em20260412-10299&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=10299%2E614464%2EY50pEM)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and State Democrats Committee will process instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102707?refcode=em20260412-10299&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=10299%2E614464%2EY50pEM) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102707?refcode=em20260412-10299&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=10299%2E614464%2EY50pEM) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/102706?refcode=em20260412-10299&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=10299%2E614464%2EY50pEM)

name: Wes Moore
subject: (dog photo inside)
body:
Peter, we all need something to keep us grounded right now.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1268%2E1086043%2EiInZZh)
Peter, we all need something to keep us grounded right now. For me, it’s the simple pleasures: Spending time with my family (and our dog, Tucker), watching Maryland sports, and being in the great outdoors.
I always love enjoying quality time with my family, especially our dog, Tucker! We adopted him three years ago, and he’s part Shih Tzu, part Poodle. He’s an absolute delight to have around and makes spending time together even more special.
I’m always tuned into sports, and I couldn’t be more excited about this season for the Orioles. Go O’s!
I also enjoy spending time outside, and if you ask me, Maryland’s got some of the best nature in the country. I recently hiked this trail in St. Mary’s, and can’t wait to get back out there now that the weather’s warming up!
Now that I’ve shared a few things that make me happy, I want to know: **_What’s bringing you joy right now? Reply to this email!_**
I can’t wait to read your response.
Elevate,
Wes

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=1268%2E1086043%2EiInZZh)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1268%2E1086043%2EiInZZh)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

| | | | Peter,
We’re about to confirm our official records regarding ICE enforcement and the removal of violent illegal criminals, and we realized that we don’t have ANY confirmed response from 34223 yet.
The Left is claiming the American people don't want these criminals removed. We need to prove them wrong with hard data from your area before my deadline at 11:59 PM.

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: It’s Go Green forever... but
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Just for a second... Go BLUE! |
#
---
Team, Look, you may know that I’m a huge Michigan State fan. For me, it’s Go Green forever. But just for a moment... I’ll say it: **Go Blue!** After this week, it’s hard not to feel proud seeing Michigan show up on a national stage and win. _(And yes, you might’ve seen the sweater.)_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335679/613993771/-1809995024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260412_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5ZTk3ODktYjAzNi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NgvhyoZeOLY8Ekti7_L5WBV7cp3ZsnzwLj4ClHmoTFY=) But here’s the thing. We’ve got our own high-stakes race coming up. **Michigan is once again one of the most important battlegrounds in the country.** Not only will we have the Governor’s race and elections down the ballot — but with an open Senate race, and House races that could flip the majority for Democrats, **Republicans are going to spend big to flip all of these seats red.** Fight Like Hell PAC’s work has never been more important. Last election, with your help, we elected Elissa Slotkin to the open Senate seat in _one of the closest races in the country._ If we want to defend all of our hard-fought progress, then we will have to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-work the GOP right now. **[Can you chip in $10 today to help us organize, fight like hell, flip the House and Senate, and keep Michigan blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335680/613993772/-1650739985?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260412_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5ZTk3ODktYjAzNi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NgvhyoZeOLY8Ekti7_L5WBV7cp3ZsnzwLj4ClHmoTFY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335681/613993773/-1809995024?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260412_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODQ5ZTk3ODktYjAzNi1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NgvhyoZeOLY8Ekti7_L5WBV7cp3ZsnzwLj4ClHmoTFY=)

clean_body: Just for a second... Go BLUE! | Team, Look, you may know that I’m a huge Michigan State fan. For me, it’s Go Green forever. But just for a moment... I’ll say it: Go Blue! After this week, it’s hard not to feel proud seeing Michigan show up on a national stage and win. (And yes, you might’ve seen the sweater.) = But here’s the thing. We’ve got our own high-stakes race coming up. Michigan is once again one of the most important battlegrounds in the country. Not only will we have the Governor’s race and elections down the ballot — but with an open Senate race, and House races that could flip the majority for Democrats, Republicans are going to spend big to flip all of these seats red. Fight Like Hell PAC’s work has never been more important. Last election, with your help, we elected Elissa Slotkin to the open Senate seat in one of the closest races in the country. If we want to defend all of our hard-fought progress, then we will have to out-organize, out-fundraise, and out-work the GOP right now. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Back to Go Green tomorrow. 😉 — Gretchen Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO BOX 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: Sherrod Brown via Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: The GOP is spending $79 million to defeat me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335792/613994060/416781771?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.12_Brown_Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTMwMjZlZi1iMTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CvpXq0r0K4UCvUgBJHAgABqe3cKfWBKKzJFLkvqbuc=) Folks, I need to fill you in.

**National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me.**

That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a **$100,000 emergency goal** so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts.

[**_So I’m personally asking: Will you split $15 between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand to help us get there? _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335793/613994061/416781771?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.12_Brown_Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTMwMjZlZi1iMTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CvpXq0r0K4UCvUgBJHAgABqe3cKfWBKKzJFLkvqbuc=) | | [ CHIP IN $15 >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335794/613994062/416781771?amount=15&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.12_Brown_Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTMwMjZlZi1iMTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CvpXq0r0K4UCvUgBJHAgABqe3cKfWBKKzJFLkvqbuc=)
---
I don’t make requests like this lightly. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far.

Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power.

**But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.**

This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. [**_Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand so we can handle whatever comes next._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/129335795/613994063/416781771?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.12_Brown_Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_30d60d_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTMwMjZlZi1iMTM2LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8CvpXq0r0K4UCvUgBJHAgABqe3cKfWBKKzJFLkvqbuc=)

clean_body: = Folks, I need to fill you in. National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me. That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a $100,000 emergency goal so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts. = | | = I don’t make requests like this lightly. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far. Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power. But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out. This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much – for everything. Sherrod * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

body:
Things are heating up quickly so I wanted to keep you in the loop

| Hi team, it’s Maddie from New Dems.

With the midterms approaching quickly I know things are heating up fast, that’s why I wanted to take a quick second check-in with you about the status of New Dems.

**→ Seven of the DCCC’s red-to-blue targets are New Dem endorsed candidates

→ New Dems make up 20 of the 24 frontline members holding the line in Congress

→ New Dems endorsed 9 more candidates in hotly-contested seats that will be crucial to securing the House majority**

Right now, we have a choice. We don’t have to let Trump bulldoze our democracy by gutting Social Security, suppressing votes, and acting without oversight.

We can invest in New Dems candidates, flip the House in November, and bring back common-sense, solution-oriented leadership back to Congress – but we need you. **[Will you join New Dems in the fight to flip the House, stop Trump, and dismantle the MAGA trifecta this November? We don’t have to let Trump bulldoze our democracy by gutting Social Security, suppressing votes, and acting without oversight. name: Team Porter
subject: 6 days. No room for error.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41132%2E3422442%2EuN7bNf)
Peter,
**We’re one week away from our filing deadline,** and when it hits, our fundraising numbers go public.
In a race this competitive, that number will send a clear message about whether Katie has what it takes to _break into the top two_ and earn a spot on November’s ballot.
Right now, Katie is being _outspent by opponents flooding the airwaves with ads_ —drowning out her message.
If we’re going to close the gap, we need the resources to fight back and reach as many voters as possible and spread Katie’s vision for California.
She’s fighting for real solutions: lowering costs for working families, single-payer health care, less expensive housing, tuition-free public college, and free child care.
Unlike her opponents, Katie isn’t taking corporate PAC money. She’s not writing herself massive checks. She’s powered by people pitching in what they can to build a campaign that actually represents them.
With just **6 days left** , we need to put up the strongest number possible so we can expand our reach, compete with the barrage of ads, and prove that a people-powered campaign can break into the top two.
**[Will you chip in $5 before the April 18th deadline to help us reach more voters and make sure Katie earns a spot on November’s ballot?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260412_2_ak.5Kazlw&refcode=em20260412-41132&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41132%2E3422442%2EuN7bNf)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260412_2_ak.5Kazlw&refcode=em20260412-41132&t=22&akid=41132%2E3422442%2EuN7bNf)
Thank you,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260412-41132&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41132_3422442_uN7bNf&akid=41132%2E3422442%2EuN7bNf)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=41132&t=24&akid=41132%2E3422442%2EuN7bNf)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=41132)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=41132&t=25&akid=41132%2E3422442%2EuN7bNf)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Stand with House Dems (VPP)
subject: Democrats’ SCATHING demand to JD Vance >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
“Immediate action is necessary”
| **70+ Democratic Lawmakers Demand JD Vance Invoke the 25th Amendment:
"Immediate Action is Necessary"** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106795?t=6&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq) [**House Democrats are RIGHT — we can’t wait another minute to remove Trump from office. Sign our letter standing with Democrats in this fight: Only 500 signature spots available »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106795?t=7&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106795?t=8&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq)
---
TO: House Democratic Caucus
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: I stand with you! **_Dear House Democrats,_**

Your fight to REMOVE Donald Trump from office after his disgusting threats is exactly the energy we need right now.

The American people are sick and tired of him acting like a KING above the law — making a mockery of our reputation, violating the Constitution, and jeopardizing our national security.

**Your commitment to speaking out and DEMANDING accountability gives me hope that we can end this dark chapter in our history.**

**I’m so grateful to have you leading the way!**

[**That’s why I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to show my solidarity, help House Democrats FLIP the few seats we need to take back the majority, and END Trump’s MAGA dictatorship »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106795?t=9&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106795?t=10&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=23608%2E878179%2EzCYHgq) to request fewer emails. name: Voter Registration Team at Voter Action Project
subject: How we make an impact for the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work is crucial, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help.
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you step up with $30 or more today to help register 10 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=041226_2&amount=30]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=041226_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=041226_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=041226_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=041226_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=041226_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=041226_2&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The midterm election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can be game-changing. Can you pitch in with $30 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of voter registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=041226_2&amount=30]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=041226_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=041226_2&amount=20]

name: Jeff (Friends of Lofgren)
subject: With your support, we’ll be one step closer to flipping the House in November.

name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point PAC
subject: “Polite nagging” changed history. Here’s how.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Hard truth: Most of your political donations change nothing.
| | | [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5551409/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYk1Fa1VROHV6aw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA0MTI/LbmNsUEVxdUJRWQ/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUtjbEVaVHBxNFdscw/gadwTtQ/sep0a0354e8)
| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5551409/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19oYXRyLXBvZG8tZHJzX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA4Lw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA0MTI/LbmNsUEVxdUJRWQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtNyZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc4Nl9mdGQx/gadwTtQ/s2j8a5c284e)
---
| | Friend,
---
This may be uncomfortable to hear.
But most political donations don’t change who wins elections.
They fund activity, not outcomes.
They pay for:
* TV ads that voters ignore
* Consultants who write memos
* Events that make insiders feel important

Meanwhile, elections are decided by something much more basic:
**➡️ Which side puts more paper in the ballot box.**
Charlie Kirk understood this before anyone.
In 2024, he deployed THOUSANDS of ballot-chasers to find and engage voters who hadn’t participated in recent elections.
His teams would follow up, visit, call, text...**__they did whatever it took__** to ensure voters banked their votes before Election Day.
He jokingly called his ballot-chasing operation “polite nagging.”
**Well, Charlie’s polite nagging won _big_.**
Republicans didn’t just win – they _swept_ – and Charlie’s ballot-chasing army delivered all 5 swing states for President Trump.
**[Now, we’re digging in ahead of Midterms and the Democrat’s billion dollar ground effort is already in overdrive. Will you stand with us right now?](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5551409/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19oYXRyLXBvZG8tZHJzX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA4Lw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA0MTI/LbmNsUEVxdUJRWQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtNyZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc4Nl9mdGQx/gadwTtQ/s2j8a5c284e)**
Turning Point PAC is funding a hiring surge: **700 _new_ full-time ballot-chasers** to join teams already deployed in key districts.
Each ballot-chaser has a clear operational target:
➡️ Find and identify voters and commit to banking **10 ballots a day** in the early voting periods
For this new class of 700 chasers, that adds up to:
* 7,000 votes per day
* 140,000+ votes in 20 days

**Those margins decide Congress.**
Don’t waste another dollar on strategies that feel good but don’t produce wins.
Fund logistics. Fund turnout. Fund ballot-chasing.
🟢 $50 → Sponsors **1 ballot-chaser** 🟢 $100 → Sponsors **2 ballot-chasers** 🟢 $250 → Powers a **targeted turnout team** 🟢 $500 → Funds a **major precinct push** 🟢 $1,000+ → **Maximum impact**
Invest in what works.

[CHIP IN](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e5551409/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy90cHBhY19kb25fc2Jfc2ZtY19oYXRyLXBvZG8tZHJzX2JyXzIwMjYwNDA4Lw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjA0MTI/LbmNsUEVxdUJRWQ/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MDMyMGVtNyZ1dG1fdGVybT0yMjc4Nl9mdGQxJmFtb3VudD01MA/gadwTtQ/s7p3647182f)

For Charlie, ****
Tyler Bowyer
Executive DIrector
Turning Point PAC
|
---
Non-Contribution Account (For TPPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TPPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TPPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
| | **_Paid for by Turning Point PAC_**
---
| | |
---

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

What if Trump's toughest critics on Iran are not defending America First at all -- but misunderstanding it?

# [Tucker is wrong by Booker Scott](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=193996481&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzOTk2NDgxLCJpYXQiOjE3NzYwMzE0MDksImV4cCI6MTc3ODYyMzQwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.LH6M57n0AoILhOTyDwG-GsRLlTkIDk7J9iCBSGZ7Egs)
### What if Trump's toughest critics on Iran are not defending America First at all -- but misunderstanding it?
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| Apr 12
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=193996481&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzOTk2NDgxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NjAzMTQwOSwiZXhwIjoxNzc4NjIzNDA5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vPpXw7D7Gi3Sg5JqMAV3HCnJkxl1rpDrYu4pWSRpfvI&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d0c7820c-b1f3-4619-bdd8-e3380f65d51e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Opinions are strong concerning the current Iranian conflict, and recent polls suggest that most Americans believe Trump will commit ground troops to the conflict, at 65%. Likewise, another poll shows the majority, 53%, oppose any American involvement in Iran. Trump's base may seem split, but polls don't reflect that, as 84% of the MAGA base trusts Trump's judgment.

Once prevalent conservative commentators Tucker Carlson and Megyn Kelly have been boisterous in opposition, and that has brought ire from Trump and his supporters. Tucker Carlson and others claim Trump has abandoned his "America First" campaign promises of no more wars. Tucker Carlson is just wrong.

I would argue that there is nothing more America First than protecting Americans. Iran has killed over 1,000 Americans since 1979, and there was no end in sight for the 'death to America' chants. Critics will also claim, including Tucker Carlson, that this is Netanyahu and Israel's war. Again, Tucker Carlson and others are just wrong.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bb645ce4-22ab-4ba1-8db2-107b35816d43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
If Tucker and others would open their eyes and consider the entire board, they would see that the game being played is for long-term stability in the region, with less reliance on Israel and the Mossad for intelligence. Ultimately, it means less American involvement and no more foreign wars, just as Trump promised when campaigning. It means fewer American deaths.

If Tucker and others would only consider the last two years, they may have a greater understanding of the true objectives, and those objectives can only be seen as America First, but Tucker is just wrong. Since Hamas invaded Israel on October 7, 2023, killing over 1,200 Jews, Israel has decimated Hamas in Gaza.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.rhFYAB80W2DBa1DcHlSixffS8j6E6vyzSFou4FZX1EU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=193996481)
Since October 8, 2023, Hezbollah has steadily bombed north and central Israel. In return, Israel decimated the Hezbollah leadership in Lebanon, and they continue to take out Hezbollah targets and leadership with the IDF operating within Lebanon today. The UN tried to intervene 20 years ago in a designated area of Lebanon from the Latani River to the Lebanon-Israel border, but Hezbollah ignored it and has occupied the ground for years.

Soon after Trump took office in 2025, the US Military targeted the Houthis in Yemen in an "Operation Rough Rider." The campaign started in March and ended in May 2025 when Trump declared a cease-fire. The Houthis agreed to end their attacks on ships in the Gulf of Aden and the Red Sea. The US targeted Houthi radar defense systems and missile sites.

Hezbollah, Hamas, and the Houthis are all Iranian proxy fighters, funded and equipped by the Iranian rogue regime responsible for creating chaos throughout the Middle East and the world. Since October 7, 2023, the Israeli and American response to that attack has brought no response from any of the Arab nations in the region. Not one, for over 2 years, and this is where Tucker and others are misguided in their analysis. In fact, Tucker is just wrong.

A Middle East with a cooperating Iran benefits all their neighbors, and that's why not one country has objected for over 2 years as Israel and America bombed common adversaries, the Iranian proxies. That's also why there was no widespread regional war after 'Midnight Hammer' in June 2025. But, there is more Tucker and others are wrong about.

Throughout the 2010's, some Arab nations were creating alliances with Israel. In Trump's first term, nations signed the Abraham Accords, which created an alliance for trade among some Arab nations with Israel. They also started sharing intelligence information to eradicate the Iranian threats to all nations in the region.

The Abraham Accords created relationships between old enemies by opening trade among them. They have discovered that each is far more financially beneficial as an ally instead of an adversary. Meanwhile, Trump's first foreign trip as the 47th president was to Saudi Arabia-UAE and he brought back trillions of dollars for investments in the US.

It's also mutually beneficial, from an intelligence perspective, for the Arab nations and the US to continue to form alliances because, in time, that will lessen the dependence on Israel and Mossad for America. Even that would make Tucker and others happy. If America can trust its new Arab nation partners, it is mutually beneficial for the US, Israel, and the Arab nations. An alliance, driven by peace through strength and the dollar.

Tucker Carlson and others are just wrong because ultimately, this Iranian conflict and future regime change, and new Iranian governance keep Americans more secure. And, I have never seen anything more America First than the current take-down of the Iranian rogue murderous regime to keep Americans safe.

Promises made, promises kept. Trump campaigned on no more foreign wars, and his moves, along with alliances with old and new partners, give the best hope for a future with less involvement in a place 100% of Americans don't want to be, the Middle East.

Tucker is just wrong.

Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer

name: Cory Booker
subject: Holding Trump accountable starts in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260412-491&t=1&akid=491%2E12592%2EcTrGY7)
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_3.7bdCX8&amount=3&refcode=20260412-491&t=2&akid=491%2E12592%2EcTrGY7)
Hi, it’s Senator Cory Booker.
**We’re at a critical moment right now.** **[**Will you join me and donate $3 to support the YES campaign for redistricting in Virginia right now?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_3.7bdCX8&amount=3&refcode=20260412-491&t=3&akid=491%2E12592%2EcTrGY7)
Trump is making power grabs across the nation to rig the 2026 midterms. He knows that his policies are unpopular, his approval is plummeting, and Republicans are going to lose across the board _unless they stack the deck._
**I’ve had enough. Virginia is where we can fight back.**
The YES campaign is on-the-ground in Virginia, reaching as many voters as they can before Election Day on April 21. But we **only** have **nine days left** to cut through Republican noise and misinformation.
[**This is an all in moment. Can you give $3 or more today to the YES campaign for redistricting in Virginia today?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260412_3.7bdCX8&amount=3&refcode=20260412-491&t=4&akid=491%2E12592%2EcTrGY7)

Let’s keep this momentum going — together.
With love and gratitude,
Cory Booker

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: The GOP is spending $79 million to defeat me.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
This is urgent

| | |
---
Friend, I need to fill you in.
**National Republicans just released their targets for the midterms, and Ohio was #1 on their list. They’re planning to flood our state with $79 MILLION worth of attack ads to defeat me.**
That means we’ll need more resources to fight back earlier than we thought. So I sat down with my finance team, and we set a **$100,000 emergency goal** so we can launch our own TV and digital ads sooner and reach voters before the GOP’s spending spree starts.
**_[So I’m personally asking: Will you split $5 between my campaign and Deb Haaland to help us get there?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7946?refcode=jtk562-bu-nd&t=1&akid=8892%2E400544%2EOWi0x2)_**
I don’t make requests like this lightly, friend. But this may be the biggest moment of our campaign so far.

Thousands of people have joined this grassroots team, and I am so humbled to have you on board, too. We’re building historic momentum, and it’s terrifying to the corporate special interests and billionaires who want to keep my opponent in power.
**But we can’t slow down now. Because if we don’t have the resources to fend off their ad blitz, the GOP could tip the balance of this race and completely drown us out.**
This team has never let me down before, which is why I’m coming to you now. **_[Please, if you have a few dollars to spare, I really need you to chip in to my campaign and Deb Haaland so we can handle whatever comes next.](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7947?refcode=jtk562-bu-nd&t=2&akid=8892%2E400544%2EOWi0x2)_**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Deb Haaland will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $10 >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7948?refcode=jtk562-bu-nd&t=3&akid=8892%2E400544%2EOWi0x2)
---

---
Thank you so much – for everything.

Sherrod
|

Peter ,
Republicans are panicking over the Virginia redistricting vote.
They can feel the momentum slipping, so now they’re running to court and trying to stop Democrats.
They want this election tied up in lawsuits, confusion, and manufactured chaos because they know exactly what a clear Democratic win would mean: a shot at fairer maps and a real path to flipping House seats in November.
Remember: Donald Trump is the one who helped kick off this modern redistricting arms race when he demanded Texas hold a special session to redraw its maps last summer so he could keep control of the House. Republicans carved up the map, rigging the rules and squeezing every advantage they could out of the process. They loved aggressive redistricting when it worked for them.
Now that voters have a chance to fight back, the RNC is suing to keep Virginia from leveling the playing field after their actions in Texas.
That is why next Tuesday’s results cannot be close. We need a decisive victory.
GOTV PAC is working to make that happen by turning out the voters who will decide this election, the people who are with us but do not always show up unless somebody reaches them, reminds them, and gets them to the polls.
Can you rush a donation right now to help us finish this fight strong before next Tuesday? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpac2026?refcode=em04122026]

clean_body: [] [] Peter , Republicans are panicking over the Virginia redistricting vote. They can feel the momentum slipping, so now they’re running to court and trying to stop Democrats. They want this election tied up in lawsuits, confusion, and manufactured chaos because they know exactly what a clear Democratic win would mean: a shot at fairer maps and a real path to flipping House seats in November. Remember: Donald Trump is the one who helped kick off this modern redistricting arms race when he demanded Texas hold a special session to redraw its maps last summer so he could keep control of the House. Republicans carved up the map, rigging the rules and squeezing every advantage they could out of the process. They loved aggressive redistricting when it worked for them. Now that voters have a chance to fight back, the RNC is suing to keep Virginia from leveling the playing field after their actions in Texas. That is why next Tuesday’s results cannot be close. We need a decisive victory. GOTV PAC is working to make that happen by turning out the voters who will decide this election, the people who are with us but do not always show up unless somebody reaches them, reminds them, and gets them to the polls. Can you rush a donation right now to help us finish this fight strong before next Tuesday? name: Team Hong
subject: "Wait, this lady seems cool as hell"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong
body:
Sustainer Sunday
# [](https://francescahong.com?refcode=em20260412-2714)
Peter,
There's a lot of negativity on social media these days. And as the Democratic frontrunner, Fran is a prime target for trolling.
But sometimes, even a negative post can bring people together.
That's how Ella Thompson from Superior became a supporter.
* * *
_I started following Fran on Instagram back in July after seeing her respond to a racist troll. The post was meant to be negative, but I immediately thought — "wait, this lady seems cool as hell."_
_I imagine I speak for a lot of people when I say it's incredibly frustrating to watch politicians make vague statements and promise to fix things, only to do what feels like nothing. Fran is different. She doesn't just try to help on a government level — she helps on a community level. She's out there protesting with us. She's doing mutual aid. She's doing these things to the point where I genuinely wonder how she has the time for it all._
_I support Fran because she's not some detached politician. She's a passionate community organizer, ready to take her talents to a statewide level._
_**—****Ella Thompson, Superior**_
* * *
Running a campaign these days means showing up everywhere _—_ including online spaces. And while we don't recommend feeding the trolls, the best way to slay them is building real community.
[We're almost halfway to our April goal of 50 new monthly donors.](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260412.YDjROZ&refcode=em20260412-2714&t=1&akid=2714%2E105371%2E-aCzjn)
**[Chip in today and help us get there!](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260412.YDjROZ&refcode=em20260412-2714&t=2&akid=2714%2E105371%2E-aCzjn)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.francescahong.com/go/1?c0=em_ms_fh_20260412.YDjROZ&amount=5&refcode=em20260412-2714&t=21&akid=2714%2E105371%2E-aCzjn)**
With gratitude,
Team Hong
**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_fh_footer?refcode=em20260412-2714&t=22&refcode2=2714_105371_-aCzjn&akid=2714%2E105371%2E-aCzjn)**
---
Email us: [info@francescahong.com](mailto:info@francescahong.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most powerful tools that grassroots campaigns like ours have to reach everyday people across Wisconsin and beyond, so thank you for reading to the end.
The more people who engage with our emails, the more likely we’ll go straight to your inbox. For a free and easy way to help our campaign, please [click this link to our website](https://francescahong.com/) after you finish reading our emails.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.francescahong.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=23&akid=2714%2E105371%2E-aCzjn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.francescahong.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2714%2E105371%2E-aCzjn)

Paid for by Friends of Francesca Hong

I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
